title: Large-Scale LiDAR Consistent Mapping using Hierachical LiDAR Bundle Adjustment
title_zh: 使用分层 LiDAR 束调整进行大规模 LiDAR 一致测绘
abstract: Reconstructing an accurate and consistent large-scale LiDAR point cloud map is crucial for robotics applications. The existing solution, pose graph optimization, though it is time-efficient, does not directly optimize the mapping consistency. LiDAR bundle adjustment (BA) has been recently proposed to resolve this issue; however, it is too time-consuming on large-scale maps. To mitigate this problem, this paper presents a globally consistent and efficient mapping method suitable for large-scale maps. Our proposed work consists of a bottom-up hierarchical BA and a top-down pose graph optimization, which combines the advantages of both methods. With the hierarchical design, we solve multiple BA problems with a much smaller Hessian matrix size than the original BA; with the pose graph optimization, we smoothly and efficiently update the LiDAR poses. The effectiveness and robustness of our proposed approach have been validated on multiple spatially and timely large-scale public spinning LiDAR datasets, i.e., KITTI, MulRan and Newer College, and self-collected solid-state LiDAR datasets under structured and unstructured scenes. With proper setups, we demonstrate our work could generate a globally consistent map with around 12% of the sequence time.
summary: Reconstructing an accurate and consistent large-scale LiDAR point cloud map is crucial for robotics applications. The existing solution, pose graph optimization, though it is time-efficient, does not directly optimize the mapping consistency. LiDAR bundle adjustment (BA) has been recently proposed to resolve this issue; however, it is too time-consuming on large-scale maps. To mitigate this problem, this paper presents a globally consistent and efficient mapping method suitable for large-scale maps. Our proposed work consists of a bottom-up hierarchical BA and a top-down pose graph optimization, which combines the advantages of both methods. With the hierarchical design, we solve multiple BA problems with a much smaller Hessian matrix size than the original BA; with the pose graph optimization, we smoothly and efficiently update the LiDAR poses. The effectiveness and robustness of our proposed approach have been validated on multiple spatially and timely large-scale public spinning LiDAR datasets, i.e., KITTI, MulRan and Newer College, and self-collected solid-state LiDAR datasets under structured and unstructured scenes. With proper setups, we demonstrate our work could generate a globally consistent map with around 12% of the sequence time.
abstract_zh: 重建准确且一致的大规模激光雷达点云地图对于机器人应用至关重要。现有的解决方案，位姿图优化，虽然时间高效，但并没有直接优化映射一致性。最近提出了LiDAR束调整（BA）来解决这个问题；然而，在大比例尺地图上这太耗时了。为了缓解这个问题，本文提出了一种适用于大比例尺地图的全局一致且高效的制图方法。我们提出的工作包括自下而上的分层 BA 和自上而下的位姿图优化，结合了两种方法的优点。通过分层设计，我们用比原始BA小得多的Hessian矩阵大小解决了多个BA问题；通过位姿图优化，我们可以平滑有效地更新 LiDAR 位姿。我们提出的方法的有效性和鲁棒性已经在多个空间和时间大规模公共旋转激光雷达数据集（即 KITTI、MulRan 和 Newer College）以及结构化和非结构化场景下自行收集的固态激光雷达数据集上得到了验证。通过适当的设置，我们证明我们的工作可以用大约 12% 的序列时间生成全局一致的图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于大规模地图的全局一致且高效的LiDAR建图方法，结合分层LiDAR光束法平差与位姿图优化。
AI.motivation: 现有位姿图优化方法虽高效但无法直接优化映射一致性，而LiDAR光束法平差（BA）虽能解决此问题但计算量过大，需在大规模地图中平衡效率与一致性。
AI.method: 采用自底向上的分层BA（通过减小Hessian矩阵规模降低计算量）与自顶向下的位姿图优化相结合的方法，融合两者优势。
AI.result: 在KITTI、MulRan等大规模数据集及自建数据集上验证，可在约12%的序列时间内生成全局一致地图。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效兼顾了大规模LiDAR建图的全局一致性与计算效率，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Mahsa Bastankhah,Krishnendu Chatterjee,Mohammad Ali Maddah-Ali,Stefan Schmid,Jakub Svoboda,Michelle Yeo
title: Online Admission Control and Rebalancing in Payment Channel Networks
title_zh: 支付通道网络中的在线准入控制和再平衡
abstract: Payment channel networks (PCNs) are a promising technology to improve the scalability of cryptocurrencies. PCNs, however, face the challenge that the frequent usage of certain routes may deplete channels in one direction, and hence prevent further transactions. In order to reap the full potential of PCNs, recharging and rebalancing mechanisms are required to provision channels, as well as an admission control logic to decide which transactions to reject in case capacity is insufficient. This paper presents a formal model of this optimisation problem. In particular, we consider an online algorithms perspective, where transactions arrive over time in an unpredictable manner. Our main contributions are competitive online algorithms which come with provable guarantees over time. We empirically evaluate our algorithms on randomly generated transactions to compare the average performance of our algorithms to our theoretical bounds. We also show how this model and approach differs from related problems in classic communication networks.
summary: Payment channel networks (PCNs) are a promising technology to improve the scalability of cryptocurrencies. PCNs, however, face the challenge that the frequent usage of certain routes may deplete channels in one direction, and hence prevent further transactions. In order to reap the full potential of PCNs, recharging and rebalancing mechanisms are required to provision channels, as well as an admission control logic to decide which transactions to reject in case capacity is insufficient. This paper presents a formal model of this optimisation problem. In particular, we consider an online algorithms perspective, where transactions arrive over time in an unpredictable manner. Our main contributions are competitive online algorithms which come with provable guarantees over time. We empirically evaluate our algorithms on randomly generated transactions to compare the average performance of our algorithms to our theoretical bounds. We also show how this model and approach differs from related problems in classic communication networks.
abstract_zh: 支付通道网络（PCN）是一项很有前途的技术，可以提高加密货币的可扩展性。然而，PCN 面临的挑战是，某些路由的频繁使用可能会耗尽一个方向的通道，从而阻止进一步的交易。为了充分发挥 PCN 的潜力，需要提供通道的充值和再平衡机制，以及在容量不足时决定拒绝哪些交易的准入控制逻辑。本文提出了该优化问题的形式模型。特别是，我们考虑在线算法的角度，其中交易随着时间的推移以不可预测的方式到达。我们的主要贡献是具有竞争力的在线算法，随着时间的推移，这些算法具有可证明的保证。我们根据随机生成的交易经验评估我们的算法，以将我们的算法的平均性能与我们的理论界限进行比较。我们还展示了这种模型和方法与经典通信网络中的相关问题有何不同。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了支付通道网络（PCN）中的在线准入控制与再平衡机制，旨在解决通道资源耗尽导致交易失败的问题。
AI.motivation: 支付通道网络在提升加密货币可扩展性方面潜力巨大，但频繁交易会导致单向通道资源枯竭，需通过准入控制与再平衡机制保障交易连续性。
AI.method: 提出基于在线算法的优化模型，设计具有理论性能保证的准入控制算法，并通过随机交易数据验证算法效果。
AI.result: 实验表明算法平均性能接近理论下界，同时揭示了该模型与传统通信网络问题的差异性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为PCN资源管理提供了理论保障的在线算法框架，为实际部署提供了新的技术思路。

authors_text: Bo Sun,Lin Yang,Mohammad Hajiesmaili,Adam Wierman,John C. S. Lui,Don Towsley,Danny H. K. Tsang
title: The Online Knapsack Problem with Departures
title_zh: 出发时的在线背包问题
abstract: The online knapsack problem is a classic online resource allocation problem in networking and operations research. Its basic version studies how to pack online arriving items of different sizes and values into a capacity-limited knapsack. In this paper, we study a general version that includes item departures, while also considering multiple knapsacks and multi-dimensional item sizes. We design a threshold-based online algorithm and prove that the algorithm can achieve order-optimal competitive ratios. Beyond worst-case performance guarantees, we also aim to achieve near-optimal average performance under typical instances. Towards this goal, we propose a data-driven online algorithm that learns within a policy-class that guarantees a worst-case performance bound. In trace-driven experiments, we show that our data-driven algorithm outperforms other benchmark algorithms in an application of online knapsack to job scheduling for cloud computing.
summary: The online knapsack problem is a classic online resource allocation problem in networking and operations research. Its basic version studies how to pack online arriving items of different sizes and values into a capacity-limited knapsack. In this paper, we study a general version that includes item departures, while also considering multiple knapsacks and multi-dimensional item sizes. We design a threshold-based online algorithm and prove that the algorithm can achieve order-optimal competitive ratios. Beyond worst-case performance guarantees, we also aim to achieve near-optimal average performance under typical instances. Towards this goal, we propose a data-driven online algorithm that learns within a policy-class that guarantees a worst-case performance bound. In trace-driven experiments, we show that our data-driven algorithm outperforms other benchmark algorithms in an application of online knapsack to job scheduling for cloud computing.
abstract_zh: 在线背包问题是网络和运筹学中经典的在线资源分配问题。其基础版本研究如何将在线到达的不同尺寸和价值的物品装入容量有限的背包中。在本文中，我们研究了一个包含物品出发的通用版本，同时还考虑了多个背包和多维物品大小。我们设计了一种基于阈值的在线算法，并证明该算法可以实现订单最优竞争比。除了最坏情况下的性能保证之外，我们还致力于在典型情况下实现接近最佳的平均性能。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种数据驱动的在线算法，该算法在保证最坏情况性能限制的策略类内学习。在跟踪驱动的实验中，我们表明，在在线背包应用于云计算作业调度方面，我们的数据驱动算法优于其他基准算法。

AI.tldr: 研究包含物品离开的在线背包问题，考虑多背包和多维尺寸，设计算法并证明其最优性。
AI.motivation: 传统模型未考虑物品离开，实际应用如云计算需要处理动态变化，需更通用的算法。
AI.method: 设计阈值算法，结合数据驱动方法，在策略类中学习以保证最坏情况性能。
AI.result: 实验显示数据驱动算法在云调度应用中优于其他基准。
AI.conclusion: 提出适应动态场景的算法，兼顾最坏情况和平均性能，为在线资源分配提供新思路。

motivation: 传统模型未考虑物品离开，实际应用如云计算需要处理动态变化，需更通用的算法。
method: 设计阈值算法，结合数据驱动方法，在策略类中学习以保证最坏情况性能。
result: 实验显示数据驱动算法在云调度应用中优于其他基准。
conclusion: 提出适应动态场景的算法，兼顾最坏情况和平均性能，为在线资源分配提供新思路。
search_text: The Online Knapsack Problem with Departures 出发时的在线背包问题 The online knapsack problem is a classic online resource allocation problem in networking and operations research. Its basic version studies how to pack online arriving items of different sizes and values into a capacity-limited knapsack. In this paper, we study a general version that includes item departures, while also considering multiple knapsacks and multi-dimensional item sizes. We design a threshold-based online algorithm and prove that the algorithm can achieve order-optimal competitive ratios. Beyond worst-case performance guarantees, we also aim to achieve near-optimal average performance under typical instances. Towards this goal, we propose a data-driven online algorithm that learns within a policy-class that guarantees a worst-case performance bound. In trace-driven experiments, we show that our data-driven algorithm outperforms other benchmark algorithms in an application of online knapsack to job scheduling for cloud computing. 在线背包问题是网络和运筹学中经典的在线资源分配问题。其基础版本研究如何将在线到达的不同尺寸和价值的物品装入容量有限的背包中。在本文中，我们研究了一个包含物品出发的通用版本，同时还考虑了多个背包和多维物品大小。我们设计了一种基于阈值的在线算法，并证明该算法可以实现订单最优竞争比。除了最坏情况下的性能保证之外，我们还致力于在典型情况下实现接近最佳的平均性能。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种数据驱动的在线算法，该算法在保证最坏情况性能限制的策略类内学习。在跟踪驱动的实验中，我们表明，在在线背包应用于云计算作业调度方面，我们的数据驱动算法优于其他基准算法。 研究包含物品离开的在线背包问题，考虑多背包和多维尺寸，设计算法并证明其最优性。 Bo Sun,Lin Yang,Mohammad Hajiesmaili,Adam Wierman,John C. S. Lui,Don Towsley,Danny H. K. Tsang cs.DS

authors_text: Jiatai Wang,Zhiwei Xu,Xuewen Yang,Dongjin Guo,Limin Liu
title: Self-supervised Image Clustering from Multiple Incomplete Views via Constrastive Complementary Generation
title_zh: 通过对比互补生成从多个不完整视图进行自监督图像聚类
abstract: Incomplete Multi-View Clustering aims to enhance clustering performance by using data from multiple modalities. Despite the fact that several approaches for studying this issue have been proposed, the following drawbacks still persist: 1) It's difficult to learn latent representations that account for complementarity yet consistency without using label information; 2) and thus fails to take full advantage of the hidden information in incomplete data results in suboptimal clustering performance when complete data is scarce. In this paper, we propose Contrastive Incomplete Multi-View Image Clustering with Generative Adversarial Networks (CIMIC-GAN), which uses GAN to fill in incomplete data and uses double contrastive learning to learn consistency on complete and incomplete data. More specifically, considering diversity and complementary information among multiple modalities, we incorporate autoencoding representation of complete and incomplete data into double contrastive learning to achieve learning consistency. Integrating GANs into the autoencoding process can not only take full advantage of new features of incomplete data, but also better generalize the model in the presence of high data missing rates. Experiments conducted on \textcolor{black}{four} extensively-used datasets show that CIMIC-GAN outperforms state-of-the-art incomplete multi-View clustering methods.
summary: Incomplete Multi-View Clustering aims to enhance clustering performance by using data from multiple modalities. Despite the fact that several approaches for studying this issue have been proposed, the following drawbacks still persist: 1) It's difficult to learn latent representations that account for complementarity yet consistency without using label information; 2) and thus fails to take full advantage of the hidden information in incomplete data results in suboptimal clustering performance when complete data is scarce. In this paper, we propose Contrastive Incomplete Multi-View Image Clustering with Generative Adversarial Networks (CIMIC-GAN), which uses GAN to fill in incomplete data and uses double contrastive learning to learn consistency on complete and incomplete data. More specifically, considering diversity and complementary information among multiple modalities, we incorporate autoencoding representation of complete and incomplete data into double contrastive learning to achieve learning consistency. Integrating GANs into the autoencoding process can not only take full advantage of new features of incomplete data, but also better generalize the model in the presence of high data missing rates. Experiments conducted on \textcolor{black}{four} extensively-used datasets show that CIMIC-GAN outperforms state-of-the-art incomplete multi-View clustering methods.
abstract_zh: 不完全多视图聚类旨在通过使用来自多种模式的数据来增强聚类性能。尽管已经提出了几种研究这个问题的方法，但仍然存在以下缺点：1）在不使用标签信息的情况下很难学习解释互补性和一致性的潜在表示； 2）因此无法充分利用不完整数据中的隐藏信息，导致在完整数据稀缺时聚类性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了带有生成对抗网络的对比不完整多视图图像聚类（CIMIC-GAN），它使用 GAN 填充不完整数据，并使用双重对比学习来学习完整和不完整数据的一致性。更具体地说，考虑到多种模态之间的多样性和互补信息，我们将完整和不完整数据的自动编码表示纳入双重对比学习中，以实现学习一致性。将 GAN 集成到自动编码过程中不仅可以充分利用不完整数据的新特征，而且可以在存在高数据丢失率的情况下更好地泛化模型。在 \textcolor{black}{four} 广泛使用的数据集上进行的实验表明，CIMIC-GAN 的性能优于最先进的不完整多视图聚类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络和对比学习的不完整多视图图像聚类方法，以解决数据缺失下的聚类性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在无标签信息下学习互补且一致的潜在表示，导致无法充分利用不完整数据中的隐藏信息，从而在数据稀缺时聚类效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出CIMIC-GAN框架，结合生成对抗网络补全缺失数据，并通过双对比学习机制在完整与不完整数据上学习一致性，利用自编码表示捕捉多模态互补性。
AI.result: 在四个常用数据集上的实验表明，CIMIC-GAN优于现有最先进的不完整多视图聚类方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合GAN与对比学习，CIMIC-GAN能有效利用不完整数据特征，在无需标签的情况下提升聚类性能。

title: Local_INN: Implicit Map Representation and Localization with Invertible Neural Networks
title_zh: Local_INN：使用可逆神经网络进行隐式地图表示和定位
abstract: Robot localization is an inverse problem of finding a robot's pose using a map and sensor measurements. In recent years, Invertible Neural Networks (INNs) have successfully solved ambiguous inverse problems in various fields. This paper proposes a framework that solves the localization problem with INN. We design an INN that provides implicit map representation in the forward path and localization in the inverse path. By sampling the latent space in evaluation, Local\_INN outputs robot poses with covariance, which can be used to estimate the uncertainty. We show that the localization performance of Local\_INN is on par with current methods with much lower latency. We show detailed 2D and 3D map reconstruction from Local\_INN using poses exterior to the training set. We also provide a global localization algorithm using Local\_INN to tackle the kidnapping problem.
summary: Robot localization is an inverse problem of finding a robot's pose using a map and sensor measurements. In recent years, Invertible Neural Networks (INNs) have successfully solved ambiguous inverse problems in various fields. This paper proposes a framework that solves the localization problem with INN. We design an INN that provides implicit map representation in the forward path and localization in the inverse path. By sampling the latent space in evaluation, Local\_INN outputs robot poses with covariance, which can be used to estimate the uncertainty. We show that the localization performance of Local\_INN is on par with current methods with much lower latency. We show detailed 2D and 3D map reconstruction from Local\_INN using poses exterior to the training set. We also provide a global localization algorithm using Local\_INN to tackle the kidnapping problem.
abstract_zh: 机器人定位是使用地图和传感器测量来查找机器人姿势的逆问题。近年来，可逆神经网络（INN）成功解决了各个领域的模糊逆问题。本文提出了一个用 INN 解决定位问题的框架。我们设计了一个 INN，它在正向路径中提供隐式地图表示，在反向路径中提供本地化。通过对评估中的潜在空间进行采样，Local\_INN 输出带有协方差的机器人姿态，可用于估计不确定性。我们表明 Local\_INN 的定位性能与当前方法相当，且延迟要低得多。我们使用训练集外部的姿势展示了 Local\_INN 的详细 2D 和 3D 地图重建。我们还提供了使用 Local\_INN 的全局定位算法来解决绑架问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Local_INN框架，利用可逆神经网络实现隐式地图表示与机器人定位。
AI.motivation: 传统定位方法存在计算延迟高、不确定性估计不足的问题，而可逆神经网络在逆问题求解中表现出色。
AI.method: 设计可逆神经网络，在前向路径生成隐式地图表示，逆向路径实现定位，通过潜在空间采样输出带协方差的机器人位姿。
AI.result: 定位性能与现有方法相当但延迟更低，成功实现训练集外的2D/3D地图重建，并提出解决绑架问题的全局定位算法。
AI.conclusion: Local_INN有效结合了隐式地图表示与可逆网络优势，为低延迟定位与不确定性估计提供了新方法。

title: Concordance based Survival Cobra with regression type weak learners
title_zh: 基于一致性的生存眼镜蛇与回归型弱学习器
abstract: In this paper, we predict conditional survival functions through a combined regression strategy. We take weak learners as different random survival trees. We propose to maximize concordance in the right-censored set up to find the optimal parameters. We explore two approaches, a usual survival cobra and a novel weighted predictor based on the concordance index. Our proposed formulations use two different norms, say, Max-norm and Frobenius norm, to find a proximity set of predictions from query points in the test dataset. We illustrate our algorithms through three different real-life dataset implementations.
summary: In this paper, we predict conditional survival functions through a combined regression strategy. We take weak learners as different random survival trees. We propose to maximize concordance in the right-censored set up to find the optimal parameters. We explore two approaches, a usual survival cobra and a novel weighted predictor based on the concordance index. Our proposed formulations use two different norms, say, Max-norm and Frobenius norm, to find a proximity set of predictions from query points in the test dataset. We illustrate our algorithms through three different real-life dataset implementations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过组合回归策略预测条件生存函数。我们将弱学习者视为不同的随机生存树。我们建议最大化右删失设置的一致性以找到最佳参数。我们探索了两种方法，一种常见的生存眼镜蛇和一种基于一致性指数的新型加权预测器。我们提出的公式使用两种不同的范数，例如 Max-norm 和 Frobenius 范数，来从测试数据集中的查询点找到预测的邻近集。我们通过三个不同的现实数据集实现来说明我们的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合回归策略的生存预测方法，利用弱学习器和最大化一致性来优化参数，以预测条件生存函数。
AI.motivation: 传统生存分析方法在处理右删失数据时存在局限，需更有效的参数优化策略以提高预测准确性。
AI.method: 采用随机生存树作为弱学习器，通过最大化一致性指数优化参数，结合Max范数和Frobenius范数构建预测邻近集，提出两种预测方法。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验验证了算法的有效性，显示出优于传统方法的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为生存分析提供了新的优化框架，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合回归策略的生存预测方法，利用弱学习器和最大化一致性来优化参数，以预测条件生存函数。

search_text: Concordance based Survival Cobra with regression type weak learners 基于一致性的生存眼镜蛇与回归型弱学习器 In this paper, we predict conditional survival functions through a combined regression strategy. We take weak learners as different random survival trees. We propose to maximize concordance in the right-censored set up to find the optimal parameters. We explore two approaches, a usual survival cobra and a novel weighted predictor based on the concordance index. Our proposed formulations use two different norms, say, Max-norm and Frobenius norm, to find a proximity set of predictions from query points in the test dataset. We illustrate our algorithms through three different real-life dataset implementations. 在本文中，我们通过组合回归策略预测条件生存函数。我们将弱学习者视为不同的随机生存树。我们建议最大化右删失设置的一致性以找到最佳参数。我们探索了两种方法，一种常见的生存眼镜蛇和一种基于一致性指数的新型加权预测器。我们提出的公式使用两种不同的范数，例如 Max-norm 和 Frobenius 范数，来从测试数据集中的查询点找到预测的邻近集。我们通过三个不同的现实数据集实现来说明我们的算法。 本文提出了一种结合回归策略的生存预测方法，利用弱学习器和最大化一致性来优化参数，以预测条件生存函数。 Rahul Goswami,Arabin Kumar Dey stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.QM,stat.CO

authors_text: Kanchana Vaishnavi Gandikota,Jonas Geiping,Zorah Lähner,Adam Czapliński,Michael Moeller
title: A Simple Strategy to Provable Invariance via Orbit Mapping
title_zh: 通过轨道映射证明不变性的简单策略
comment: ACCV 2022, older version is titled "Training or Architecture? How to Incorporate Invariance in Neural Networks",(arXiv:2106.10044)
comments: ACCV 2022, older version is titled "Training or Architecture? How to Incorporate Invariance in Neural Networks",(arXiv:2106.10044)
abstract: Many applications require robustness, or ideally invariance, of neural networks to certain transformations of input data. Most commonly, this requirement is addressed by training data augmentation, using adversarial training, or defining network architectures that include the desired invariance by design. In this work, we propose a method to make network architectures provably invariant with respect to group actions by choosing one element from a (possibly continuous) orbit based on a fixed criterion. In a nutshell, we intend to 'undo' any possible transformation before feeding the data into the actual network. Further, we empirically analyze the properties of different approaches which incorporate invariance via training or architecture, and demonstrate the advantages of our method in terms of robustness and computational efficiency. In particular, we investigate the robustness with respect to rotations of images (which can hold up to discretization artifacts) as well as the provable orientation and scaling invariance of 3D point cloud classification.
summary: Many applications require robustness, or ideally invariance, of neural networks to certain transformations of input data. Most commonly, this requirement is addressed by training data augmentation, using adversarial training, or defining network architectures that include the desired invariance by design. In this work, we propose a method to make network architectures provably invariant with respect to group actions by choosing one element from a (possibly continuous) orbit based on a fixed criterion. In a nutshell, we intend to 'undo' any possible transformation before feeding the data into the actual network. Further, we empirically analyze the properties of different approaches which incorporate invariance via training or architecture, and demonstrate the advantages of our method in terms of robustness and computational efficiency. In particular, we investigate the robustness with respect to rotations of images (which can hold up to discretization artifacts) as well as the provable orientation and scaling invariance of 3D point cloud classification.
abstract_zh: 许多应用要求神经网络对输入数据的某些转换具有鲁棒性或理想的不变性。最常见的是，通过训练数据增强、使用对抗性训练或定义包含所需设计不变性的网络架构来解决此要求。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，通过基于固定标准从（可能连续的）轨道中选择一个元素，使网络架构在群体行为方面可证明不变。简而言之，我们打算在将数据输入实际网络之前“撤消”任何可能的转换。此外，我们凭经验分析了通过训练或架构结合不变性的不同方法的属性，并证明了我们的方法在鲁棒性和计算效率方面的优势。特别是，我们研究了图像旋转的鲁棒性（可以承受离散化伪影）以及 3D 点云分类的可证明的方向和缩放不变性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过轨道映射使神经网络架构对群作用具有可证明不变性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如数据增强或对抗训练无法保证网络对输入变换的不变性，需设计可证明的不变性方法。
AI.method: 通过从（可能连续的）轨道中根据固定准则选择一个元素，提前'撤销'可能的变换后再输入网络。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在图像旋转鲁棒性和3D点云分类的可证明方向/缩放不变性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实现神经网络的可证明不变性提供了高效且理论严谨的新思路。

title: A Focused Study on Sequence Length for Dialogue Summarization
title_zh: 对话摘要序列长度的重点研究
abstract: Output length is critical to dialogue summarization systems. The dialogue summary length is determined by multiple factors, including dialogue complexity, summary objective, and personal preferences. In this work, we approach dialogue summary length from three perspectives. First, we analyze the length differences between existing models' outputs and the corresponding human references and find that summarization models tend to produce more verbose summaries due to their pretraining objectives. Second, we identify salient features for summary length prediction by comparing different model settings. Third, we experiment with a length-aware summarizer and show notable improvement on existing models if summary length can be well incorporated. Analysis and experiments are conducted on popular DialogSum and SAMSum datasets to validate our findings.
summary: Output length is critical to dialogue summarization systems. The dialogue summary length is determined by multiple factors, including dialogue complexity, summary objective, and personal preferences. In this work, we approach dialogue summary length from three perspectives. First, we analyze the length differences between existing models' outputs and the corresponding human references and find that summarization models tend to produce more verbose summaries due to their pretraining objectives. Second, we identify salient features for summary length prediction by comparing different model settings. Third, we experiment with a length-aware summarizer and show notable improvement on existing models if summary length can be well incorporated. Analysis and experiments are conducted on popular DialogSum and SAMSum datasets to validate our findings.
abstract_zh: 输出长度对于对话摘要系统至关重要。对话摘要长度由多种因素决定，包括对话复杂性、摘要目标和个人喜好。在这项工作中，我们从三个角度来处理对话摘要的长度。首先，我们分析了现有模型的输出与相应的人类参考之间的长度差异，发现摘要模型由于其预训练目标往往会产生更详细的摘要。其次，我们通过比较不同的模型设置来确定摘要长度预测的显着特征。第三，我们尝试了长度感知摘要器，如果摘要长度能够很好地结合起来，就会对现有模型产生显着的改进。我们对流行的 DialogSum 和 SAMSum 数据集进行了分析和实验，以验证我们的发现。

AI.tldr: 研究对话摘要中序列长度的影响因素及优化方法
AI.motivation: 现有摘要模型输出冗长，需解决长度控制以满足不同需求
AI.method: 分析模型输出与参考长度差异，识别预测特征，并设计长度感知摘要器
AI.result: 长度感知模型在DialogSum和SAMSum数据集上表现优于现有模型
AI.conclusion: 有效控制摘要长度需多因素考量，长度感知方法有效

authors_text: Letian Chen,Sravan Jayanthi,Rohan Paleja,Daniel Martin,Viacheslav Zakharov,Matthew Gombolay
title: Fast Lifelong Adaptive Inverse Reinforcement Learning from Demonstrations
title_zh: 从演示中进行快速终身自适应逆强化学习
comment: ef:Proceedings of Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022
abstract: Learning from Demonstration (LfD) approaches empower end-users to teach robots novel tasks via demonstrations of the desired behaviors, democratizing access to robotics. However, current LfD frameworks are not capable of fast adaptation to heterogeneous human demonstrations nor the large-scale deployment in ubiquitous robotics applications. In this paper, we propose a novel LfD framework, Fast Lifelong Adaptive Inverse Reinforcement learning (FLAIR). Our approach (1) leverages learned strategies to construct policy mixtures for fast adaptation to new demonstrations, allowing for quick end-user personalization, (2) distills common knowledge across demonstrations, achieving accurate task inference; and (3) expands its model only when needed in lifelong deployments, maintaining a concise set of prototypical strategies that can approximate all behaviors via policy mixtures. We empirically validate that FLAIR achieves adaptability (i.e., the robot adapts to heterogeneous, user-specific task preferences), efficiency (i.e., the robot achieves sample-efficient adaptation), and scalability (i.e., the model grows sublinearly with the number of demonstrations while maintaining high performance). FLAIR surpasses benchmarks across three control tasks with an average 57% improvement in policy returns and an average 78% fewer episodes required for demonstration modeling using policy mixtures. Finally, we demonstrate the success of FLAIR in a table tennis task and find users rate FLAIR as having higher task (p<.05) and personalization (p<.05) performance.
summary: Learning from Demonstration (LfD) approaches empower end-users to teach robots novel tasks via demonstrations of the desired behaviors, democratizing access to robotics. However, current LfD frameworks are not capable of fast adaptation to heterogeneous human demonstrations nor the large-scale deployment in ubiquitous robotics applications. In this paper, we propose a novel LfD framework, Fast Lifelong Adaptive Inverse Reinforcement learning (FLAIR). Our approach (1) leverages learned strategies to construct policy mixtures for fast adaptation to new demonstrations, allowing for quick end-user personalization, (2) distills common knowledge across demonstrations, achieving accurate task inference; and (3) expands its model only when needed in lifelong deployments, maintaining a concise set of prototypical strategies that can approximate all behaviors via policy mixtures. We empirically validate that FLAIR achieves adaptability (i.e., the robot adapts to heterogeneous, user-specific task preferences), efficiency (i.e., the robot achieves sample-efficient adaptation), and scalability (i.e., the model grows sublinearly with the number of demonstrations while maintaining high performance). FLAIR surpasses benchmarks across three control tasks with an average 57% improvement in policy returns and an average 78% fewer episodes required for demonstration modeling using policy mixtures. Finally, we demonstrate the success of FLAIR in a table tennis task and find users rate FLAIR as having higher task (p<.05) and personalization (p<.05) performance.
abstract_zh: 从演示中学习 (LfD) 方法使最终用户能够通过演示所需行为来教机器人执行新任务，从而实现机器人技术的民主化。然而，当前的 LfD 框架无法快速适应异构人类演示，也无法在无处不在的机器人应用中大规模部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 LfD 框架，即快速终身自适应逆强化学习（FLAIR）。我们的方法（1）利用学习的策略构建策略组合，以快速适应新的演示，从而实现快速的最终用户个性化，（2）提炼演示中的常识，实现准确的任务推理； (3) 仅在终身部署中需要时扩展其模型，维护一组简明的原型策略，可以通过策略混合来近似所有行为。我们凭经验验证 FLAIR 实现了适应性（即机器人适应异构的、用户特定的任务偏好）、效率（即机器人实现了样本高效的适应）和可扩展性（即模型随着演示数量呈次线性增长，同时保持高性能）。 FLAIR 在三项控制任务中超越了基准，策略回报平均提高了 57%，并且使用策略混合进行演示建模所需的事件平均减少了 78%。最后，我们展示了 FLAIR 在乒乓球任务中的成功，并发现用户将 FLAIR 评价为具有更高的任务 (p<.05) 和个性化 (p<.05) 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型从演示中学习的框架FLAIR，解决现有方法在适应性、效率和可扩展性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有学习从演示方法无法快速适应异构用户演示，且难以支持大规模机器人应用部署。
AI.method: 通过策略混合实现快速适应、跨演示知识提炼、按需模型扩展三阶段方法。
AI.result: 在三个控制任务中平均提升57%策略回报，减少78%演示建模所需episode，用户评价显著优于基准。
AI.conclusion: FLAIR在适应性、效率和可扩展性方面均优于现有方法，成功应用于实际乒乓球任务。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种新型从演示中学习的框架FLAIR，解决现有方法在适应性、效率和可扩展性方面的不足。

ai_content.method: 通过策略混合实现快速适应、跨演示知识提炼、按需模型扩展三阶段方法。

search_text: Fast Lifelong Adaptive Inverse Reinforcement Learning from Demonstrations 从演示中进行快速终身自适应逆强化学习 Learning from Demonstration (LfD) approaches empower end-users to teach robots novel tasks via demonstrations of the desired behaviors, democratizing access to robotics. However, current LfD frameworks are not capable of fast adaptation to heterogeneous human demonstrations nor the large-scale deployment in ubiquitous robotics applications. In this paper, we propose a novel LfD framework, Fast Lifelong Adaptive Inverse Reinforcement learning (FLAIR). Our approach (1) leverages learned strategies to construct policy mixtures for fast adaptation to new demonstrations, allowing for quick end-user personalization, (2) distills common knowledge across demonstrations, achieving accurate task inference; and (3) expands its model only when needed in lifelong deployments, maintaining a concise set of prototypical strategies that can approximate all behaviors via policy mixtures. We empirically validate that FLAIR achieves adaptability (i.e., the robot adapts to heterogeneous, user-specific task preferences), efficiency (i.e., the robot achieves sample-efficient adaptation), and scalability (i.e., the model grows sublinearly with the number of demonstrations while maintaining high performance). FLAIR surpasses benchmarks across three control tasks with an average 57% improvement in policy returns and an average 78% fewer episodes required for demonstration modeling using policy mixtures. Finally, we demonstrate the success of FLAIR in a table tennis task and find users rate FLAIR as having higher task (p<.05) and personalization (p<.05) performance. 从演示中学习 (LfD) 方法使最终用户能够通过演示所需行为来教机器人执行新任务，从而实现机器人技术的民主化。然而，当前的 LfD 框架无法快速适应异构人类演示，也无法在无处不在的机器人应用中大规模部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 LfD 框架，即快速终身自适应逆强化学习（FLAIR）。我们的方法（1）利用学习的策略构建策略组合，以快速适应新的演示，从而实现快速的最终用户个性化，（2）提炼演示中的常识，实现准确的任务推理； (3) 仅在终身部署中需要时扩展其模型，维护一组简明的原型策略，可以通过策略混合来近似所有行为。我们凭经验验证 FLAIR 实现了适应性（即机器人适应异构的、用户特定的任务偏好）、效率（即机器人实现了样本高效的适应）和可扩展性（即模型随着演示数量呈次线性增长，同时保持高性能）。 FLAIR 在三项控制任务中超越了基准，策略回报平均提高了 57%，并且使用策略混合进行演示建模所需的事件平均减少了 78%。最后，我们展示了 FLAIR 在乒乓球任务中的成功，并发现用户将 FLAIR 评价为具有更高的任务 (p<.05) 和个性化 (p<.05) 性能。 本文提出一种新型从演示中学习的框架FLAIR，解决现有方法在适应性、效率和可扩展性方面的不足。 Letian Chen,Sravan Jayanthi,Rohan Paleja,Daniel Martin,Viacheslav Zakharov,Matthew Gombolay cs.LG,cs.RO

title: Joint Speech Activity and Overlap Detection with Multi-Exit Architecture
title_zh: 具有多出口架构的联合语音活动和重叠检测
abstract: Overlapped speech detection (OSD) is critical for speech applications in scenario of multi-party conversion. Despite numerous research efforts and progresses, comparing with speech activity detection (VAD), OSD remains an open challenge and its overall performance is far from satisfactory. The majority of prior research typically formulates the OSD problem as a standard classification problem, to identify speech with binary (OSD) or three-class label (joint VAD and OSD) at frame level. In contrast to the mainstream, this study investigates the joint VAD and OSD task from a new perspective. In particular, we propose to extend traditional classification network with multi-exit architecture. Such an architecture empowers our system with unique capability to identify class using either low-level features from early exits or high-level features from last exit. In addition, two training schemes, knowledge distillation and dense connection, are adopted to further boost our system performance. Experimental results on benchmark datasets (AMI and DIHARD-III) validated the effectiveness and generality of our proposed system. Our ablations further reveal the complementary contribution of proposed schemes. With $F_1$ score of 0.792 on AMI and 0.625 on DIHARD-III, our proposed system outperforms several top performing models on these datasets, but also surpasses the current state-of-the-art by large margins across both datasets. Besides the performance benefit, our proposed system offers another appealing potential for quality-complexity trade-offs, which is highly preferred for efficient OSD deployment.
summary: Overlapped speech detection (OSD) is critical for speech applications in scenario of multi-party conversion. Despite numerous research efforts and progresses, comparing with speech activity detection (VAD), OSD remains an open challenge and its overall performance is far from satisfactory. The majority of prior research typically formulates the OSD problem as a standard classification problem, to identify speech with binary (OSD) or three-class label (joint VAD and OSD) at frame level. In contrast to the mainstream, this study investigates the joint VAD and OSD task from a new perspective. In particular, we propose to extend traditional classification network with multi-exit architecture. Such an architecture empowers our system with unique capability to identify class using either low-level features from early exits or high-level features from last exit. In addition, two training schemes, knowledge distillation and dense connection, are adopted to further boost our system performance. Experimental results on benchmark datasets (AMI and DIHARD-III) validated the effectiveness and generality of our proposed system. Our ablations further reveal the complementary contribution of proposed schemes. With $F_1$ score of 0.792 on AMI and 0.625 on DIHARD-III, our proposed system outperforms several top performing models on these datasets, but also surpasses the current state-of-the-art by large margins across both datasets. Besides the performance benefit, our proposed system offers another appealing potential for quality-complexity trade-offs, which is highly preferred for efficient OSD deployment.
abstract_zh: 重叠语音检测（OSD）对于多方转换场景下的语音应用至关重要。尽管进行了大量的研究工作并取得了进展，但与语音活动检测（VAD）相比，OSD 仍然是一个开放的挑战，其整体性能还远远不能令人满意。大多数先前的研究通常将 OSD 问题制定为标准分类问题，以在帧级别识别具有二进制 (OSD) 或三类标签（联合 VAD 和 OSD）的语音。与主流相反，本研究从新的角度研究了 VAD 和 OSD 联合任务。特别是，我们建议用多出口架构扩展传统分类网络。这种架构使我们的系统具有独特的能力，可以使用早期退出的低级特征或上次退出的高级特征来识别类别。此外，还采用了知识蒸馏和密集连接两种训练方案来进一步提高我们的系统性能。基准数据集（AMI 和 DIHARD-III）的实验结果验证了我们提出的系统的有效性和通用性。我们的消融进一步揭示了拟议方案的补充贡献。 AMI 上的 $F_1$ 得分为 0.792，DIHARD-III 上的 $F_1$ 得分为 0.625，我们提出的系统在这些数据集上的性能优于几个表现最佳的模型，而且在两个数据集上也大大超过了当前最先进的技术。除了性能优势之外，我们提出的系统还为质量复杂性权衡提供了另一个有吸引力的潜力，这对于高效的 OSD 部署来说是高度首选的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多出口架构，用于联合语音活动检测（VAD）和重叠语音检测（OSD），以提升多说话人场景下的语音应用性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量研究，但OSD的性能仍不理想。传统方法将OSD建模为分类问题，难以兼顾复杂场景下的检测精度与效率，亟需新方法突破现有瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计多出口神经网络架构，通过早期出口提取低级特征、末级出口提取高级特征，并结合知识蒸馏与密集连接训练策略优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在AMI和DIHARD-III数据集上分别达到0.792和0.625的F1分数，显著优于现有最优模型，同时支持质量-复杂度权衡。
AI.conclusion: 多出口架构有效提升了联合VAD/OSD性能，验证了方法的通用性与先进性，为高效OSD部署提供了新思路。

title: Speech Enhancement with Perceptually-motivated Optimization and Dual Transformations
title_zh: 通过感知驱动优化和双重转换增强语音
abstract: To address the monaural speech enhancement problem, numerous research studies have been conducted to enhance speech via operations either in time-domain on the inner-domain learned from the speech mixture or in time--frequency domain on the fixed full-band short time Fourier transform (STFT) spectrograms. Very recently, a few studies on sub-band based speech enhancement have been proposed. By enhancing speech via operations on sub-band spectrograms, those studies demonstrated competitive performances on the benchmark dataset of DNS2020. Despite attractive, this new research direction has not been fully explored and there is still room for improvement. As such, in this study, we delve into the latest research direction and propose a sub-band based speech enhancement system with perceptually-motivated optimization and dual transformations, called PT-FSE. Specially, our proposed PT-FSE model improves its backbone, a full-band and sub-band fusion model, by three efforts. First, we design a frequency transformation module that aims to strengthen the global frequency correlation. Then a temporal transformation is introduced to capture long range temporal contexts. Lastly, a novel loss, with leverage of properties of human auditory perception, is proposed to facilitate the model to focus on low frequency enhancement. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed model, extensive experiments are conducted on the DNS2020 dataset. Experimental results show that our PT-FSE system achieves substantial improvements over its backbone, but also outperforms the current state-of-the-art while being 27\% smaller than the SOTA. With average NB-PESQ of 3.57 on the benchmark dataset, our system offers the best speech enhancement results reported till date.
summary: To address the monaural speech enhancement problem, numerous research studies have been conducted to enhance speech via operations either in time-domain on the inner-domain learned from the speech mixture or in time--frequency domain on the fixed full-band short time Fourier transform (STFT) spectrograms. Very recently, a few studies on sub-band based speech enhancement have been proposed. By enhancing speech via operations on sub-band spectrograms, those studies demonstrated competitive performances on the benchmark dataset of DNS2020. Despite attractive, this new research direction has not been fully explored and there is still room for improvement. As such, in this study, we delve into the latest research direction and propose a sub-band based speech enhancement system with perceptually-motivated optimization and dual transformations, called PT-FSE. Specially, our proposed PT-FSE model improves its backbone, a full-band and sub-band fusion model, by three efforts. First, we design a frequency transformation module that aims to strengthen the global frequency correlation. Then a temporal transformation is introduced to capture long range temporal contexts. Lastly, a novel loss, with leverage of properties of human auditory perception, is proposed to facilitate the model to focus on low frequency enhancement. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed model, extensive experiments are conducted on the DNS2020 dataset. Experimental results show that our PT-FSE system achieves substantial improvements over its backbone, but also outperforms the current state-of-the-art while being 27\% smaller than the SOTA. With average NB-PESQ of 3.57 on the benchmark dataset, our system offers the best speech enhancement results reported till date.
abstract_zh: 为了解决单声道语音增强问题，人们进行了大量的研究，通过对从语音混合中学习到的内域进行时域操作或对固定全带短时傅立叶变换（STFT）频谱图进行时频域操作来增强语音。最近，提出了一些关于基于子带的语音增强的研究。通过对子带频谱图进行操作来增强语音，这些研究在 DNS2020 基准数据集上展示了具有竞争力的性能。尽管很有吸引力，但这一新的研究方向尚未得到充分探索，仍有改进的空间。因此，在本研究中，我们深入研究了最新的研究方向，并提出了一种基于子带的具有感知激励优化和对偶变换的语音增强系统，称为 PT-FSE。特别是，我们提出的 PT-FSE 模型通过三项努力改进了其主干，即全带和子带融合模型。首先，我们设计了一个频率变换模块，旨在加强全局频率相关性。然后引入时间变换来捕获长范围时间上下文。最后，提出了一种利用人类听觉感知特性的新颖损失，以促进模型专注于低频增强。为了验证我们提出的模型的有效性，在 DNS2020 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的 PT-FSE 系统在其主干上实现了实质性改进，而且优于当前最先进的技术，同时比 SOTA 小 27%。基准数据集上的平均 NB-PESQ 为 3.57，我们的系统提供了迄今为止报告的最佳语音增强结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于子带的语音增强系统PT-FSE，通过感知优化和双重变换提升语音增强效果。
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强方法在时域、时频域或子带领域存在局限性，子带方法虽表现优异但尚未充分探索，需进一步改进。
AI.method: 设计频率变换模块强化全局频率相关性，引入时序变换捕捉长期时序上下文，并提出基于人类听觉特性的损失函数，融合全带与子带模型。
AI.result: 在DNS2020数据集上，PT-FSE相较基线模型提升显著，超越当前最优模型且模型体积减少27%，平均NB-PESQ达3.57。
AI.conclusion: PT-FSE通过感知驱动优化和双重变换有效提升了子带语音增强性能，实现了当前最优结果。

search_text: Speech Enhancement with Perceptually-motivated Optimization and Dual Transformations 通过感知驱动优化和双重转换增强语音 To address the monaural speech enhancement problem, numerous research studies have been conducted to enhance speech via operations either in time-domain on the inner-domain learned from the speech mixture or in time--frequency domain on the fixed full-band short time Fourier transform (STFT) spectrograms. Very recently, a few studies on sub-band based speech enhancement have been proposed. By enhancing speech via operations on sub-band spectrograms, those studies demonstrated competitive performances on the benchmark dataset of DNS2020. Despite attractive, this new research direction has not been fully explored and there is still room for improvement. As such, in this study, we delve into the latest research direction and propose a sub-band based speech enhancement system with perceptually-motivated optimization and dual transformations, called PT-FSE. Specially, our proposed PT-FSE model improves its backbone, a full-band and sub-band fusion model, by three efforts. First, we design a frequency transformation module that aims to strengthen the global frequency correlation. Then a temporal transformation is introduced to capture long range temporal contexts. Lastly, a novel loss, with leverage of properties of human auditory perception, is proposed to facilitate the model to focus on low frequency enhancement. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed model, extensive experiments are conducted on the DNS2020 dataset. Experimental results show that our PT-FSE system achieves substantial improvements over its backbone, but also outperforms the current state-of-the-art while being 27\% smaller than the SOTA. With average NB-PESQ of 3.57 on the benchmark dataset, our system offers the best speech enhancement results reported till date. 为了解决单声道语音增强问题，人们进行了大量的研究，通过对从语音混合中学习到的内域进行时域操作或对固定全带短时傅立叶变换（STFT）频谱图进行时频域操作来增强语音。最近，提出了一些关于基于子带的语音增强的研究。通过对子带频谱图进行操作来增强语音，这些研究在 DNS2020 基准数据集上展示了具有竞争力的性能。尽管很有吸引力，但这一新的研究方向尚未得到充分探索，仍有改进的空间。因此，在本研究中，我们深入研究了最新的研究方向，并提出了一种基于子带的具有感知激励优化和对偶变换的语音增强系统，称为 PT-FSE。特别是，我们提出的 PT-FSE 模型通过三项努力改进了其主干，即全带和子带融合模型。首先，我们设计了一个频率变换模块，旨在加强全局频率相关性。然后引入时间变换来捕获长范围时间上下文。最后，提出了一种利用人类听觉感知特性的新颖损失，以促进模型专注于低频增强。为了验证我们提出的模型的有效性，在 DNS2020 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的 PT-FSE 系统在其主干上实现了实质性改进，而且优于当前最先进的技术，同时比 SOTA 小 27%。基准数据集上的平均 NB-PESQ 为 3.57，我们的系统提供了迄今为止报告的最佳语音增强结果。 本文提出了一种基于子带的语音增强系统PT-FSE，通过感知优化和双重变换提升语音增强效果。 Xucheng Wan,Kai Liu,Ziqing Du,Huan Zhou cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Ran Ran,Nuo Xu,Wei Wang,Gang Quan,Jieming Yin,Wujie Wen
title: CryptoGCN: Fast and Scalable Homomorphically Encrypted Graph Convolutional Network Inference
title_zh: CryptoGCN：快速且可扩展的同态加密图卷积网络推理
comment: Accepted in Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: Accepted in Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Recently cloud-based graph convolutional network (GCN) has demonstrated great success and potential in many privacy-sensitive applications such as personal healthcare and financial systems. Despite its high inference accuracy and performance on cloud, maintaining data privacy in GCN inference, which is of paramount importance to these practical applications, remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we take an initial attempt towards this and develop $\textit{CryptoGCN}$--a homomorphic encryption (HE) based GCN inference framework. A key to the success of our approach is to reduce the tremendous computational overhead for HE operations, which can be orders of magnitude higher than its counterparts in the plaintext space. To this end, we develop an approach that can effectively take advantage of the sparsity of matrix operations in GCN inference to significantly reduce the computational overhead. Specifically, we propose a novel AMA data formatting method and associated spatial convolution methods, which can exploit the complex graph structure and perform efficient matrix-matrix multiplication in HE computation and thus greatly reduce the HE operations. We also develop a co-optimization framework that can explore the trade offs among the accuracy, security level, and computational overhead by judicious pruning and polynomial approximation of activation module in GCNs. Based on the NTU-XVIEW skeleton joint dataset, i.e., the largest dataset evaluated homomorphically by far as we are aware of, our experimental results demonstrate that $\textit{CryptoGCN}$ outperforms state-of-the-art solutions in terms of the latency and number of homomorphic operations, i.e., achieving as much as a 3.10$\times$ speedup on latency and reduces the total Homomorphic Operation Count by 77.4\% with a small accuracy loss of 1-1.5$\%$.
summary: Recently cloud-based graph convolutional network (GCN) has demonstrated great success and potential in many privacy-sensitive applications such as personal healthcare and financial systems. Despite its high inference accuracy and performance on cloud, maintaining data privacy in GCN inference, which is of paramount importance to these practical applications, remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we take an initial attempt towards this and develop $\textit{CryptoGCN}$--a homomorphic encryption (HE) based GCN inference framework. A key to the success of our approach is to reduce the tremendous computational overhead for HE operations, which can be orders of magnitude higher than its counterparts in the plaintext space. To this end, we develop an approach that can effectively take advantage of the sparsity of matrix operations in GCN inference to significantly reduce the computational overhead. Specifically, we propose a novel AMA data formatting method and associated spatial convolution methods, which can exploit the complex graph structure and perform efficient matrix-matrix multiplication in HE computation and thus greatly reduce the HE operations. We also develop a co-optimization framework that can explore the trade offs among the accuracy, security level, and computational overhead by judicious pruning and polynomial approximation of activation module in GCNs. Based on the NTU-XVIEW skeleton joint dataset, i.e., the largest dataset evaluated homomorphically by far as we are aware of, our experimental results demonstrate that $\textit{CryptoGCN}$ outperforms state-of-the-art solutions in terms of the latency and number of homomorphic operations, i.e., achieving as much as a 3.10$\times$ speedup on latency and reduces the total Homomorphic Operation Count by 77.4\% with a small accuracy loss of 1-1.5$\%$.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于云的图卷积网络（GCN）在个人医疗保健和金融系统等许多隐私敏感应用中展现了巨大的成功和潜力。尽管其在云上的推理精度和性能很高，但在 GCN 推理中维护数据隐私（这对于这些实际应用至关重要）仍然很大程度上未被探索。在本文中，我们对此进行了初步尝试，并开发了$\textit{CryptoGCN}$——一个基于同态加密（HE）的GCN推理框架。我们的方法成功的关键是减少 HE 操作的巨大计算开销，这可能比明文空间中的对应操作高出几个数量级。为此，我们开发了一种方法，可以有效地利用 GCN 推理中矩阵运算的稀疏性来显着减少计算开销。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的 AMA 数据格式化方法和相关的空间卷积方法，它可以利用复杂的图结构并在 HE 计算中执行有效的矩阵-矩阵乘法，从而大大减少 HE 操作。我们还开发了一个协同优化框架，可以通过 GCN 中激活模块的明智剪枝和多项式逼近来探索准确性、安全级别和计算开销之间的权衡。基于 NTU-XVIEW 骨架联合数据集，即迄今为止同态评估的最大数据集，我们的实验结果表明，$\textit{CryptoGCN}$ 在延迟和同态操作数量方面优于最先进的解决方案，即延迟速度提高了 3.10$\times$，并减少了总同态操作计数77.4\%，精度损失较小，为 1-1.5$\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CryptoGCN，一种基于同态加密的快速可扩展图卷积网络推理框架，旨在解决云环境中GCN推理的数据隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 云GCN在医疗和金融等隐私敏感场景中应用广泛，但现有方法未充分保障推理过程的数据隐私，需通过同态加密实现隐私保护。
AI.method: 通过利用GCN推理中矩阵运算的稀疏性，提出AMA数据格式化方法和空间卷积技术，结合激活模块的剪枝与多项式逼近，优化同态加密计算效率。
AI.result: 在NTU-XVIEW数据集上，CryptoGCN相比现有方案延迟降低3.1倍，同态操作次数减少77.4%，仅损失1-1.5%的精度。
AI.conclusion: CryptoGCN通过结构优化与算法改进，在保证隐私性的同时显著提升同态加密GCN推理的效率，为隐私敏感场景提供可行方案。

title: Learning Chess With Language Models and Transformers
title_zh: 使用语言模型和 Transformer 学习国际象棋
abstract: Representing a board game and its positions by text-based notation enables the possibility of NLP applications. Language models, can help gain insight into a variety of interesting problems such as unsupervised learning rules of a game, detecting player behavior patterns, player attribution, and ultimately learning the game to beat state of the art. In this study, we applied BERT models, first to the simple Nim game to analyze its performance in the presence of noise in a setup of a few-shot learning architecture. We analyzed the model performance via three virtual players, namely Nim Guru, Random player, and Q-learner. In the second part, we applied the game learning language model to the chess game, and a large set of grandmaster games with exhaustive encyclopedia openings. Finally, we have shown that model practically learns the rules of the chess game and can survive games against Stockfish at a category-A rating level.
summary: Representing a board game and its positions by text-based notation enables the possibility of NLP applications. Language models, can help gain insight into a variety of interesting problems such as unsupervised learning rules of a game, detecting player behavior patterns, player attribution, and ultimately learning the game to beat state of the art. In this study, we applied BERT models, first to the simple Nim game to analyze its performance in the presence of noise in a setup of a few-shot learning architecture. We analyzed the model performance via three virtual players, namely Nim Guru, Random player, and Q-learner. In the second part, we applied the game learning language model to the chess game, and a large set of grandmaster games with exhaustive encyclopedia openings. Finally, we have shown that model practically learns the rules of the chess game and can survive games against Stockfish at a category-A rating level.
abstract_zh: 用基于文本的符号表示棋盘游戏及其位置使 NLP 应用成为可能。语言模型可以帮助深入了解各种有趣的问题，例如无监督学习游戏规则、检测玩家行为模式、玩家归因，并最终学习游戏以击败最先进的技术。在这项研究中，我们首先将 BERT 模型应用于简单的 Nim 游戏，以分析其在少量学习架构设置中存在噪声的情况下的性能。我们通过三个虚拟玩家（即 Nim Guru、随机玩家和 Q-learner）分析了模型性能。在第二部分中，我们将游戏学习语言模型应用到国际象棋游戏以及大量具有详尽百科全书开局的特级大师游戏中。最后，我们证明该模型实际上可以学习国际象棋游戏的规则，并且可以在与 Stockfish 的比赛中以 A 类评级水平生存。

AI.tldr: 本研究探索了使用语言模型和Transformer架构学习国际象棋规则并提升游戏水平的方法。
AI.motivation: 通过文本符号表示棋盘游戏，利用NLP技术解决游戏规则学习、玩家行为分析等挑战，验证语言模型在复杂策略游戏中的潜力。
AI.method: 基于BERT模型，在Nim游戏中测试少量样本学习能力，随后应用至国际象棋，训练模型分析海量大师级棋谱及开局理论。
AI.result: 模型成功学习国际象棋规则，并在与Stockfish的对弈中达到A类棋手水平。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型能有效解析游戏规则并实现策略学习，为AI游戏研究提供新方向。

tldr: 本研究探索了使用语言模型和Transformer架构学习国际象棋规则并提升游戏水平的方法。
motivation: 通过文本符号表示棋盘游戏，利用NLP技术解决游戏规则学习、玩家行为分析等挑战，验证语言模型在复杂策略游戏中的潜力。
method: 基于BERT模型，在Nim游戏中测试少量样本学习能力，随后应用至国际象棋，训练模型分析海量大师级棋谱及开局理论。
result: 模型成功学习国际象棋规则，并在与Stockfish的对弈中达到A类棋手水平。
conclusion: 语言模型能有效解析游戏规则并实现策略学习，为AI游戏研究提供新方向。
search_text: Learning Chess With Language Models and Transformers 使用语言模型和 Transformer 学习国际象棋 Representing a board game and its positions by text-based notation enables the possibility of NLP applications. Language models, can help gain insight into a variety of interesting problems such as unsupervised learning rules of a game, detecting player behavior patterns, player attribution, and ultimately learning the game to beat state of the art. In this study, we applied BERT models, first to the simple Nim game to analyze its performance in the presence of noise in a setup of a few-shot learning architecture. We analyzed the model performance via three virtual players, namely Nim Guru, Random player, and Q-learner. In the second part, we applied the game learning language model to the chess game, and a large set of grandmaster games with exhaustive encyclopedia openings. Finally, we have shown that model practically learns the rules of the chess game and can survive games against Stockfish at a category-A rating level. 用基于文本的符号表示棋盘游戏及其位置使 NLP 应用成为可能。语言模型可以帮助深入了解各种有趣的问题，例如无监督学习游戏规则、检测玩家行为模式、玩家归因，并最终学习游戏以击败最先进的技术。在这项研究中，我们首先将 BERT 模型应用于简单的 Nim 游戏，以分析其在少量学习架构设置中存在噪声的情况下的性能。我们通过三个虚拟玩家（即 Nim Guru、随机玩家和 Q-learner）分析了模型性能。在第二部分中，我们将游戏学习语言模型应用到国际象棋游戏以及大量具有详尽百科全书开局的特级大师游戏中。最后，我们证明该模型实际上可以学习国际象棋游戏的规则，并且可以在与 Stockfish 的比赛中以 A 类评级水平生存。 本研究探索了使用语言模型和Transformer架构学习国际象棋规则并提升游戏水平的方法。 Michael DeLeo,Erhan Guven cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.GT,cs.LG

title: Unsupervised active speaker detection in media content using cross-modal information
title_zh: 使用跨模态信息在媒体内容中进行无监督主动说话人检测
comment: Under review at IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
comments: Under review at IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
abstract: We present a cross-modal unsupervised framework for active speaker detection in media content such as TV shows and movies. Machine learning advances have enabled impressive performance in identifying individuals from speech and facial images. We leverage speaker identity information from speech and faces, and formulate active speaker detection as a speech-face assignment task such that the active speaker's face and the underlying speech identify the same person (character). We express the speech segments in terms of their associated speaker identity distances, from all other speech segments, to capture a relative identity structure for the video. Then we assign an active speaker's face to each speech segment from the concurrently appearing faces such that the obtained set of active speaker faces displays a similar relative identity structure. Furthermore, we propose a simple and effective approach to address speech segments where speakers are present off-screen. We evaluate the proposed system on three benchmark datasets -- Visual Person Clustering dataset, AVA-active speaker dataset, and Columbia dataset -- consisting of videos from entertainment and broadcast media, and show competitive performance to state-of-the-art fully supervised methods.
summary: We present a cross-modal unsupervised framework for active speaker detection in media content such as TV shows and movies. Machine learning advances have enabled impressive performance in identifying individuals from speech and facial images. We leverage speaker identity information from speech and faces, and formulate active speaker detection as a speech-face assignment task such that the active speaker's face and the underlying speech identify the same person (character). We express the speech segments in terms of their associated speaker identity distances, from all other speech segments, to capture a relative identity structure for the video. Then we assign an active speaker's face to each speech segment from the concurrently appearing faces such that the obtained set of active speaker faces displays a similar relative identity structure. Furthermore, we propose a simple and effective approach to address speech segments where speakers are present off-screen. We evaluate the proposed system on three benchmark datasets -- Visual Person Clustering dataset, AVA-active speaker dataset, and Columbia dataset -- consisting of videos from entertainment and broadcast media, and show competitive performance to state-of-the-art fully supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种跨模式无监督框架，用于电视节目和电影等媒体内容中的主动说话者检测。机器学习的进步在根据语音和面部图像识别个人方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能。我们利用来自语音和面部的说话者身份信息，并将主动说话者检测制定为语音面部分配任务，以便主动说话者的面部和底层语音识别同一个人（角色）。我们根据与所有其他语音片段相关的说话者身份距离来表达语音片段，以捕获视频的相对身份结构。然后，我们将同时出现的面孔中的每个语音片段分配一个活动说话者的面孔，使得所获得的活动说话者面孔的集合显示出相似的相对身份结构。此外，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来处理说话者出现在屏幕外的语音片段。我们在三个基准数据集（视觉人物聚类数据集、AVA-主动说话者数据集和哥伦比亚数据集）上评估了所提出的系统，这些数据集由来自娱乐和广播媒体的视频组成，并展示了与最先进的完全监督方法相比的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态无监督框架，在媒体内容中通过语音与面部信息的匹配实现主动说话人检测。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人检测依赖大量标注数据，而媒体内容中常存在未标注场景，需减少对监督数据的依赖。
AI.method: 构建语音-面部分配任务，利用说话人身份距离计算相对结构，通过跨模态匹配分配活跃面部，并处理屏幕外说话人情况。
AI.result: 在三个媒体数据集上验证，性能与全监督方法相当，证明无监督框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态无监督方法可有效检测媒体中的活跃说话人，无需标注数据即可实现高精度匹配。

authors_text: Jonathan J. Y. Kim,Martin Urschler,Patricia J. Riddle,Jörg S. Wicker
title: Closing the Loop: Graph Networks to Unify Semantic Objects and Visual Features for Multi-object Scenes
title_zh: 闭环：图网络统一多对象场景的语义对象和视觉特征
comment: 8 pages. Accepted at 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: 8 pages. Accepted at 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: In Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), Loop Closure Detection (LCD) is essential to minimize drift when recognizing previously visited places. Visual Bag-of-Words (vBoW) has been an LCD algorithm of choice for many state-of-the-art SLAM systems. It uses a set of visual features to provide robust place recognition but fails to perceive the semantics or spatial relationship between feature points. Previous work has mainly focused on addressing these issues by combining vBoW with semantic and spatial information from objects in the scene. However, they are unable to exploit spatial information of local visual features and lack a structure that unifies semantic objects and visual features, therefore limiting the symbiosis between the two components. This paper proposes SymbioLCD2, which creates a unified graph structure to integrate semantic objects and visual features symbiotically. Our novel graph-based LCD system utilizes the unified graph structure by applying a Weisfeiler-Lehman graph kernel with temporal constraints to robustly predict loop closure candidates. Evaluation of the proposed system shows that having a unified graph structure incorporating semantic objects and visual features improves LCD prediction accuracy, illustrating that the proposed graph structure provides a strong symbiosis between these two complementary components. It also outperforms other Machine Learning algorithms - such as SVM, Decision Tree, Random Forest, Neural Network and GNN based Graph Matching Networks. Furthermore, it has shown good performance in detecting loop closure candidates earlier than state-of-the-art SLAM systems, demonstrating that extended semantic and spatial awareness from the unified graph structure significantly impacts LCD performance.
summary: In Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), Loop Closure Detection (LCD) is essential to minimize drift when recognizing previously visited places. Visual Bag-of-Words (vBoW) has been an LCD algorithm of choice for many state-of-the-art SLAM systems. It uses a set of visual features to provide robust place recognition but fails to perceive the semantics or spatial relationship between feature points. Previous work has mainly focused on addressing these issues by combining vBoW with semantic and spatial information from objects in the scene. However, they are unable to exploit spatial information of local visual features and lack a structure that unifies semantic objects and visual features, therefore limiting the symbiosis between the two components. This paper proposes SymbioLCD2, which creates a unified graph structure to integrate semantic objects and visual features symbiotically. Our novel graph-based LCD system utilizes the unified graph structure by applying a Weisfeiler-Lehman graph kernel with temporal constraints to robustly predict loop closure candidates. Evaluation of the proposed system shows that having a unified graph structure incorporating semantic objects and visual features improves LCD prediction accuracy, illustrating that the proposed graph structure provides a strong symbiosis between these two complementary components. It also outperforms other Machine Learning algorithms - such as SVM, Decision Tree, Random Forest, Neural Network and GNN based Graph Matching Networks. Furthermore, it has shown good performance in detecting loop closure candidates earlier than state-of-the-art SLAM systems, demonstrating that extended semantic and spatial awareness from the unified graph structure significantly impacts LCD performance.
abstract_zh: 在同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 中，环路闭合检测 (LCD) 对于在识别先前访问过的地点时最大限度地减少漂移至关重要。视觉词袋 (vBoW) 一直是许多最先进的 SLAM 系统首选的 LCD 算法。它使用一组视觉特征来提供强大的位置识别，但无法感知特征点之间的语义或空间关系。之前的工作主要集中在通过将 vBoW 与场景中对象的语义和空间信息相结合来解决这些问题。然而，它们无法利用局部视觉特征的空间信息，并且缺乏统一语义对象和视觉特征的结构，因此限制了两个组件之间的共生。本文提出了SymbioLCD2，它创建了一个统一的图结构来共生地整合语义对象和视觉特征。我们新颖的基于图形的 LCD 系统利用统一的图形结构，通过应用具有时间约束的 Weisfeiler-Lehman 图内核来稳健地预测闭环候选。对所提出的系统的评估表明，具有结合语义对象和视觉特征的统一图结构提高了 LCD 预测精度，说明所提出的图结构在这两个互补组件之间提供了强大的共生关系。它还优于其他机器学习算法 - 例如 SVM、决策树、随机森林、神经网络和基于 GNN 的图匹配网络。此外，它在比最先进的 SLAM 系统更早检测回环候选方面表现出良好的性能，表明统一图结构的扩展语义和空间感知显着影响 LCD 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SymbioLCD2系统，通过统一图结构整合语义对象与视觉特征，提升SLAM中的回环检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉词袋（vBoW）方法在回环检测中无法感知语义和空间关系，现有工作未能有效融合局部视觉特征与语义信息，限制了两者的协同效应。
AI.method: 构建统一图结构，结合语义对象与视觉特征，应用带时间约束的Weisfeiler-Lehman图核进行回环候选预测。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法在回环检测准确率上优于SVM、随机森林等机器学习算法及基于GNN的图匹配网络，并能更早检测回环候选。
AI.conclusion: 统一图结构有效融合语义与视觉信息，显著提升回环检测性能，验证了多模态特征协同的优越性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出SymbioLCD2系统，通过统一图结构整合语义对象与视觉特征，提升SLAM中的回环检测性能。

It also outperforms other Machine Learning algorithms - such as SVM, Decision Tree, Random Forest, Neural Network and GNN based Graph Matching Networks. Furthermore, it has shown good performance in detecting loop closure candidates earlier than state-of-the-art SLAM systems, demonstrating that extended semantic and spatial awareness from the unified graph structure significantly impacts LCD performance. 在同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 中，环路闭合检测 (LCD) 对于在识别先前访问过的地点时最大限度地减少漂移至关重要。视觉词袋 (vBoW) 一直是许多最先进的 SLAM 系统首选的 LCD 算法。它使用一组视觉特征来提供强大的位置识别，但无法感知特征点之间的语义或空间关系。之前的工作主要集中在通过将 vBoW 与场景中对象的语义和空间信息相结合来解决这些问题。然而，它们无法利用局部视觉特征的空间信息，并且缺乏统一语义对象和视觉特征的结构，因此限制了两个组件之间的共生。本文提出了SymbioLCD2，它创建了一个统一的图结构来共生地整合语义对象和视觉特征。我们新颖的基于图形的 LCD 系统利用统一的图形结构，通过应用具有时间约束的 Weisfeiler-Lehman 图内核来稳健地预测闭环候选。对所提出的系统的评估表明，具有结合语义对象和视觉特征的统一图结构提高了 LCD 预测精度，说明所提出的图结构在这两个互补组件之间提供了强大的共生关系。它还优于其他机器学习算法 - 例如 SVM、决策树、随机森林、神经网络和基于 GNN 的图匹配网络。此外，它在比最先进的 SLAM 系统更早检测回环候选方面表现出良好的性能，表明统一图结构的扩展语义和空间感知显着影响 LCD 性能。 本文提出SymbioLCD2系统，通过统一图结构整合语义对象与视觉特征，提升SLAM中的回环检测性能。 Jonathan J. Y. Kim,Martin Urschler,Patricia J. Riddle,Jörg S. Wicker cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Neuromorphic Integrated Sensing and Communications
title_zh: 神经形态集成传感与通信
comment: Published on IEEE Wireless Communications Letters
comments: Published on IEEE Wireless Communications Letters
abstract: Neuromorphic computing is an emerging technology that support event-driven data processing for applications requiring efficient online inference and/or control. Recent work has introduced the concept of neuromorphic communications, whereby neuromorphic computing is integrated with impulse radio (IR) transmission to implement low-energy and low-latency remote inference in wireless Internet-of-Things (IoT) networks. In this paper, we introduce neuromorphic integrated sensing and communications (N-ISAC), a novel solution that enables efficient online data decoding and radar sensing. N-ISAC leverages a common IR waveform for the dual purpose of conveying digital information and of detecting the presence or absence of a radar target. A spiking neural network (SNN) is deployed at the receiver to decode digital data and to detect the radar target using directly the received signal. The SNN operation is optimized by balancing performance metrics for data communications and radar sensing, highlighting synergies and trade-offs between the two applications.
summary: Neuromorphic computing is an emerging technology that support event-driven data processing for applications requiring efficient online inference and/or control. Recent work has introduced the concept of neuromorphic communications, whereby neuromorphic computing is integrated with impulse radio (IR) transmission to implement low-energy and low-latency remote inference in wireless Internet-of-Things (IoT) networks. In this paper, we introduce neuromorphic integrated sensing and communications (N-ISAC), a novel solution that enables efficient online data decoding and radar sensing. N-ISAC leverages a common IR waveform for the dual purpose of conveying digital information and of detecting the presence or absence of a radar target. A spiking neural network (SNN) is deployed at the receiver to decode digital data and to detect the radar target using directly the received signal. The SNN operation is optimized by balancing performance metrics for data communications and radar sensing, highlighting synergies and trade-offs between the two applications.
abstract_zh: 神经形态计算是一种新兴技术，支持事件驱动的数据处理，适用于需要高效在线推理和/或控制的应用程序。最近的工作引入了神经形态通信的概念，即神经形态计算与脉冲无线电（IR）传输相集成，以在无线物联网（IoT）网络中实现低能耗和低延迟的远程推理。在本文中，我们介绍了神经形态集成传感和通信（N-ISAC），这是一种能够实现高效在线数据解码和雷达传感的新颖解决方案。 N-ISAC 利用通用红外波形来实现传输数字信息和检测雷达目标是否存在的双重目的。接收器上部署了尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，用于解码数字数据并直接使用接收到的信号检测雷达目标。 SNN 操作通过平衡数据通信和雷达传感的性能指标进行优化，突出两个应用程序之间的协同和权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经形态集成感知与通信（N-ISAC）方案，通过共享脉冲无线电波形实现高效的数据解码与雷达感知。
AI.motivation: 现有无线物联网通信与雷达感知系统存在能效低、延迟高及硬件复杂度高的问题，需探索协同优化方案。
AI.method: 设计基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的接收端架构，利用同一脉冲无线电波形同时完成数字通信与雷达目标检测，并通过性能指标平衡优化SNN操作。
AI.result: 实现了低功耗、低时延的联合通信与感知，验证了通信与雷达功能间的协同效应及性能权衡机制。
AI.conclusion: N-ISAC为无线物联网提供了新型一体化解决方案，未来可进一步拓展至多模态感知与复杂环境适应性研究。

title: DomainATM: Domain Adaptation Toolbox for Medical Data Analysis
title_zh: DomainATM：用于医疗数据分析的域适应工具箱
abstract: Domain adaptation (DA) is an important technique for modern machine learning-based medical data analysis, which aims at reducing distribution differences between different medical datasets. A proper domain adaptation method can significantly enhance the statistical power by pooling data acquired from multiple sites/centers. To this end, we have developed the Domain Adaptation Toolbox for Medical data analysis (DomainATM) - an open-source software package designed for fast facilitation and easy customization of domain adaptation methods for medical data analysis. The DomainATM is implemented in MATLAB with a user-friendly graphical interface, and it consists of a collection of popular data adaptation algorithms that have been extensively applied to medical image analysis and computer vision. With DomainATM, researchers are able to facilitate fast feature-level and image-level adaptation, visualization and performance evaluation of different adaptation methods for medical data analysis. More importantly, the DomainATM enables the users to develop and test their own adaptation methods through scripting, greatly enhancing its utility and extensibility. An overview characteristic and usage of DomainATM is presented and illustrated with three example experiments, demonstrating its effectiveness, simplicity, and flexibility. The software, source code, and manual are available online.
summary: Domain adaptation (DA) is an important technique for modern machine learning-based medical data analysis, which aims at reducing distribution differences between different medical datasets. A proper domain adaptation method can significantly enhance the statistical power by pooling data acquired from multiple sites/centers. To this end, we have developed the Domain Adaptation Toolbox for Medical data analysis (DomainATM) - an open-source software package designed for fast facilitation and easy customization of domain adaptation methods for medical data analysis. The DomainATM is implemented in MATLAB with a user-friendly graphical interface, and it consists of a collection of popular data adaptation algorithms that have been extensively applied to medical image analysis and computer vision. With DomainATM, researchers are able to facilitate fast feature-level and image-level adaptation, visualization and performance evaluation of different adaptation methods for medical data analysis. More importantly, the DomainATM enables the users to develop and test their own adaptation methods through scripting, greatly enhancing its utility and extensibility. An overview characteristic and usage of DomainATM is presented and illustrated with three example experiments, demonstrating its effectiveness, simplicity, and flexibility. The software, source code, and manual are available online.
abstract_zh: 领域适应（DA）是现代基于机器学习的医疗数据分析的重要技术，旨在减少不同医疗数据集之间的分布差异。适当的域适应方法可以通过汇集从多个站点/中心获取的数据来显着增强统计能力。为此，我们开发了用于医疗数据分析的域适应工具箱（DomainATM） - 一个开源软件包，旨在快速促进和轻松定制用于医疗数据分析的域适应方法。 DomainATM 在 MATLAB 中实现，具有用户友好的图形界面，它由一系列流行的数据适应算法组成，这些算法已广泛应用于医学图像分析和计算机视觉。借助DomainATM，研究人员能够促进医学数据分析的不同适应方法的快速特征级和图像级适应、可视化和性能评估。更重要的是，DomainATM允许用户通过脚本开发和测试自己的适配方法，大大增强了其实用性和可扩展性。介绍了 DomainATM 的概述特征和用法，并通过三个示例实验进行了说明，证明了其有效性、简单性和灵活性。该软件、源代码和手册可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了DomainATM，一个用于医学数据分析的领域自适应工具箱，旨在通过减少不同医学数据集之间的分布差异来提升统计效能。
AI.motivation: 医学数据集因来源不同常存在分布差异，传统方法难以有效整合多中心数据。开发一个开源工具箱以支持快速实现和定制领域自适应方法，是解决这一问题的关键。
AI.method: 基于MATLAB开发DomainATM工具箱，包含图形界面和多种主流领域自适应算法，支持特征级和图像级自适应、可视化及性能评估，并允许用户通过脚本开发自定义方法。
AI.result: 通过三个实验示例验证了DomainATM的有效性、简洁性和灵活性，证明其在医学数据分析中的实用价值。
AI.conclusion: DomainATM为医学数据领域自适应研究提供了高效、易用且可扩展的工具，显著提升了跨中心数据整合的可行性。

title: JPEG Artifact Correction using Denoising Diffusion Restoration Models
title_zh: 使用去噪扩散恢复模型进行 JPEG 伪影校正
comment: Presented at NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Score-Based Methods. Code: https://github.com/bahjat-kawar/ddrm-jpeg
comments: Presented at NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Score-Based Methods. Code: https://github.com/bahjat-kawar/ddrm-jpeg
abstract: Diffusion models can be used as learned priors for solving various inverse problems. However, most existing approaches are restricted to linear inverse problems, limiting their applicability to more general cases. In this paper, we build upon Denoising Diffusion Restoration Models (DDRM) and propose a method for solving some non-linear inverse problems. We leverage the pseudo-inverse operator used in DDRM and generalize this concept for other measurement operators, which allows us to use pre-trained unconditional diffusion models for applications such as JPEG artifact correction. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach across various quality factors, attaining performance levels that are on par with state-of-the-art methods trained specifically for the JPEG restoration task.
summary: Diffusion models can be used as learned priors for solving various inverse problems. However, most existing approaches are restricted to linear inverse problems, limiting their applicability to more general cases. In this paper, we build upon Denoising Diffusion Restoration Models (DDRM) and propose a method for solving some non-linear inverse problems. We leverage the pseudo-inverse operator used in DDRM and generalize this concept for other measurement operators, which allows us to use pre-trained unconditional diffusion models for applications such as JPEG artifact correction. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach across various quality factors, attaining performance levels that are on par with state-of-the-art methods trained specifically for the JPEG restoration task.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型可以用作解决各种逆问题的学习先验。然而，大多数现有方法仅限于线性反问题，限制了它们对更一般情况的适用性。在本文中，我们基于去噪扩散恢复模型（DDRM）并提出了一种解决一些非线性逆问题的方法。我们利用 DDRM 中使用的伪逆算子，并将这一概念推广到其他测量算子，这使我们能够将预先训练的无条件扩散模型用于 JPEG 伪影校正等应用。我们凭经验证明了我们的方法在各种质量因素上的有效性，达到了与专门针对 JPEG 恢复任务训练的最先进方法相当的性能水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用去噪扩散修复模型（DDRM）解决JPEG伪影校正问题，通过泛化伪逆算子以处理非线性逆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型方法多局限于线性逆问题，难以应对更通用的非线性场景如JPEG伪影校正，需探索更普适的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于DDRM的伪逆算子概念，将其推广至其他测量算子，利用预训练无条件扩散模型实现JPEG伪影校正。
AI.result: 在多种质量因子下实验验证，方法性能达到与专门训练的JPEG修复最先进方法相当的水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过泛化伪逆算子，本文证明了扩散模型在非线性逆问题中的有效性，为JPEG伪影校正提供了新思路。

search_text: JPEG Artifact Correction using Denoising Diffusion Restoration Models 使用去噪扩散恢复模型进行 JPEG 伪影校正 Diffusion models can be used as learned priors for solving various inverse problems. However, most existing approaches are restricted to linear inverse problems, limiting their applicability to more general cases. In this paper, we build upon Denoising Diffusion Restoration Models (DDRM) and propose a method for solving some non-linear inverse problems. We leverage the pseudo-inverse operator used in DDRM and generalize this concept for other measurement operators, which allows us to use pre-trained unconditional diffusion models for applications such as JPEG artifact correction. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach across various quality factors, attaining performance levels that are on par with state-of-the-art methods trained specifically for the JPEG restoration task. 扩散模型可以用作解决各种逆问题的学习先验。然而，大多数现有方法仅限于线性反问题，限制了它们对更一般情况的适用性。在本文中，我们基于去噪扩散恢复模型（DDRM）并提出了一种解决一些非线性逆问题的方法。我们利用 DDRM 中使用的伪逆算子，并将这一概念推广到其他测量算子，这使我们能够将预先训练的无条件扩散模型用于 JPEG 伪影校正等应用。我们凭经验证明了我们的方法在各种质量因素上的有效性，达到了与专门针对 JPEG 恢复任务训练的最先进方法相当的性能水平。 本文提出使用去噪扩散修复模型（DDRM）解决JPEG伪影校正问题，通过泛化伪逆算子以处理非线性逆问题。 Bahjat Kawar,Jiaming Song,Stefano Ermon,Michael Elad eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Whodunit? Learning to Contrast for Authorship Attribution
title_zh: 是谁？学习对比作者归属
abstract: Authorship attribution is the task of identifying the author of a given text. The key is finding representations that can differentiate between authors. Existing approaches typically use manually designed features that capture a dataset's content and style, but these approaches are dataset-dependent and yield inconsistent performance across corpora. In this work, we propose \textit{learning} author-specific representations by fine-tuning pre-trained generic language representations with a contrastive objective (Contra-X). We show that Contra-X learns representations that form highly separable clusters for different authors. It advances the state-of-the-art on multiple human and machine authorship attribution benchmarks, enabling improvements of up to 6.8% over cross-entropy fine-tuning. However, we find that Contra-X improves overall accuracy at the cost of sacrificing performance for some authors. Resolving this tension will be an important direction for future work. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to integrate contrastive learning with pre-trained language model fine-tuning for authorship attribution.
summary: Authorship attribution is the task of identifying the author of a given text. The key is finding representations that can differentiate between authors. Existing approaches typically use manually designed features that capture a dataset's content and style, but these approaches are dataset-dependent and yield inconsistent performance across corpora. In this work, we propose \textit{learning} author-specific representations by fine-tuning pre-trained generic language representations with a contrastive objective (Contra-X). We show that Contra-X learns representations that form highly separable clusters for different authors. It advances the state-of-the-art on multiple human and machine authorship attribution benchmarks, enabling improvements of up to 6.8% over cross-entropy fine-tuning. However, we find that Contra-X improves overall accuracy at the cost of sacrificing performance for some authors. Resolving this tension will be an important direction for future work. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to integrate contrastive learning with pre-trained language model fine-tuning for authorship attribution.
abstract_zh: 作者归属是识别给定文本的作者的任务。关键是找到可以区分作者的表征。现有方法通常使用手动设计的特征来捕获数据集的内容和风格，但这些方法依赖于数据集，并且在整个语料库中产生不一致的性能。在这项工作中，我们通过使用对比目标（Contra-X）微调预先训练的通用语言表示来提出 \textit{learning} 作者特定的表示。我们表明，Contra-X 学习了为不同作者形成高度可分离聚类的表示。它推进了多个人类和机器作者归属基准的最先进水平，与交叉熵微调相比提高了高达 6.8%。然而，我们发现 Contra-X 提高了整体准确性，但对一些作者来说却牺牲了性能。解决这一紧张局势将是未来工作的重要方向。据我们所知，我们是第一个将对比学习与预先训练的语言模型微调相结合的作者归因。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的作者归属方法Contra-X，通过微调预训练语言模型来学习作者特定的表示，以提升作者归属任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统作者归属方法依赖人工设计的特征，存在数据集依赖性和跨语料库性能不一致的问题，需探索更通用且高效的表示学习方法。
AI.method: 提出Contra-X方法，通过对比学习目标微调预训练语言模型，使不同作者的表示形成高度可分离的聚类，从而提升作者区分能力。
AI.result: Contra-X在多个基准数据集上优于交叉熵微调方法，最高提升6.8%，但发现整体准确率提升以部分作者性能下降为代价。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习与预训练模型结合在作者归属任务中有效，但需进一步解决准确率提升与特定作者性能下降之间的矛盾。

authors_text: Weizhuo Wang,Michael Raitor,Steve Collins,C. Karen Liu,Monroe Kennedy III
title: Trajectory and Sway Prediction Towards Fall Prevention
title_zh: 预防跌倒的轨迹和摇摆预测
comment: 6 pages + 1 page reference, 11 figures. Accepted by ICRA 2023
comments: 6 pages + 1 page reference, 11 figures. Accepted by ICRA 2023
abstract: Falls are the leading cause of fatal and non-fatal injuries, particularly for older persons. Imbalance can result from the body's internal causes (illness), or external causes (active or passive perturbation). Active perturbation results from applying an external force to a person, while passive perturbation results from human motion interacting with a static obstacle. This work proposes a metric that allows for the monitoring of the person's torso and its correlation to active and passive perturbations. We show that large changes in the torso sway can be strongly correlated to active perturbations. We also show that we can reasonably predict the future path and expected change in torso sway by conditioning the expected path and torso sway on the past trajectory, torso motion, and the surrounding scene. This could have direct future applications to fall prevention. Results demonstrate that the torso sway is strongly correlated with perturbations. And our model is able to make use of the visual cues presented in the panorama and condition the prediction accordingly.
summary: Falls are the leading cause of fatal and non-fatal injuries, particularly for older persons. Imbalance can result from the body's internal causes (illness), or external causes (active or passive perturbation). Active perturbation results from applying an external force to a person, while passive perturbation results from human motion interacting with a static obstacle. This work proposes a metric that allows for the monitoring of the person's torso and its correlation to active and passive perturbations. We show that large changes in the torso sway can be strongly correlated to active perturbations. We also show that we can reasonably predict the future path and expected change in torso sway by conditioning the expected path and torso sway on the past trajectory, torso motion, and the surrounding scene. This could have direct future applications to fall prevention. Results demonstrate that the torso sway is strongly correlated with perturbations. And our model is able to make use of the visual cues presented in the panorama and condition the prediction accordingly.
abstract_zh: 跌倒是致命和非致命伤害的主要原因，特别是对于老年人而言。不平衡可能是由于身体的内部原因（疾病）或外部原因（主动或被动扰动）造成的。主动扰动是由于向人施加外力而产生的，而被动扰动是由于人体运动与静态障碍物相互作用而产生的。这项工作提出了一种指标，可以监控人的躯干及其与主动和被动扰动的相关性。我们表明，躯干摇摆的巨大变化可能与主动扰动密切相关。我们还表明，通过根据过去的轨迹、躯干运动和周围场景调节预期路径和躯干摇摆，我们可以合理地预测未来路径和躯干摇摆的预期变化。这可能会在未来直接应用于预防跌倒。结果表明，躯干摇摆与扰动密切相关。我们的模型能够利用全景图中呈现的视觉线索并相应地调整预测。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过预测人体轨迹和躯干摆动来预防跌倒的方法。
AI.motivation: 跌倒导致严重伤害，尤其对老年人，现有方法难以有效预防，需更准确的预测方法。
AI.method: 提出躯干摆动度量指标，结合历史轨迹、运动数据和环境信息预测未来路径及摆动。
AI.result: 躯干摆动与干扰强相关，模型能有效预测未来轨迹和摆动，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有望应用于跌倒预防系统，提高老年人活动安全性。
