And our model is able to make use of the visual cues presented in the panorama and condition the prediction accordingly. 跌倒是致命和非致命伤害的主要原因，特别是对于老年人而言。不平衡可能是由于身体的内部原因（疾病）或外部原因（主动或被动扰动）造成的。主动扰动是由于向人施加外力而产生的，而被动扰动是由于人体运动与静态障碍物相互作用而产生的。这项工作提出了一种指标，可以监控人的躯干及其与主动和被动扰动的相关性。我们表明，躯干摇摆的巨大变化可能与主动扰动密切相关。我们还表明，通过根据过去的轨迹、躯干运动和周围场景调节预期路径和躯干摇摆，我们可以合理地预测未来路径和躯干摇摆的预期变化。这可能会在未来直接应用于预防跌倒。结果表明，躯干摇摆与扰动密切相关。我们的模型能够利用全景图中呈现的视觉线索并相应地调整预测。 提出一种通过预测人体轨迹和躯干摆动来预防跌倒的方法。 Weizhuo Wang,Michael Raitor,Steve Collins,C. Karen Liu,Monroe Kennedy III cs.RO

authors_text: Adrien Journé,Hector Garcia Rodriguez,Qinghai Guo,Timoleon Moraitis
title: Hebbian Deep Learning Without Feedback
title_zh: 无反馈的 Hebbian 深度学习
comment: Updated to match the published version of the the ICLR 2023 paper (notable-top 25%)
comments: Updated to match the published version of the the ICLR 2023 paper (notable-top 25%)
abstract: Recent approximations to backpropagation (BP) have mitigated many of BP's computational inefficiencies and incompatibilities with biology, but important limitations still remain. Moreover, the approximations significantly decrease accuracy in benchmarks, suggesting that an entirely different approach may be more fruitful. Here, grounded on recent theory for Hebbian learning in soft winner-take-all networks, we present multilayer SoftHebb, i.e. an algorithm that trains deep neural networks, without any feedback, target, or error signals. As a result, it achieves efficiency by avoiding weight transport, non-local plasticity, time-locking of layer updates, iterative equilibria, and (self-) supervisory or other feedback signals -- which were necessary in other approaches. Its increased efficiency and biological compatibility do not trade off accuracy compared to state-of-the-art bio-plausible learning, but rather improve it. With up to five hidden layers and an added linear classifier, accuracies on MNIST, CIFAR-10, STL-10, and ImageNet, respectively reach 99.4%, 80.3%, 76.2%, and 27.3%. In conclusion, SoftHebb shows with a radically different approach from BP that Deep Learning over few layers may be plausible in the brain and increases the accuracy of bio-plausible machine learning. Code is available at https://github.com/NeuromorphicComputing/SoftHebb.
summary: Recent approximations to backpropagation (BP) have mitigated many of BP's computational inefficiencies and incompatibilities with biology, but important limitations still remain. Moreover, the approximations significantly decrease accuracy in benchmarks, suggesting that an entirely different approach may be more fruitful. Here, grounded on recent theory for Hebbian learning in soft winner-take-all networks, we present multilayer SoftHebb, i.e. an algorithm that trains deep neural networks, without any feedback, target, or error signals. As a result, it achieves efficiency by avoiding weight transport, non-local plasticity, time-locking of layer updates, iterative equilibria, and (self-) supervisory or other feedback signals -- which were necessary in other approaches. Its increased efficiency and biological compatibility do not trade off accuracy compared to state-of-the-art bio-plausible learning, but rather improve it. With up to five hidden layers and an added linear classifier, accuracies on MNIST, CIFAR-10, STL-10, and ImageNet, respectively reach 99.4%, 80.3%, 76.2%, and 27.3%. In conclusion, SoftHebb shows with a radically different approach from BP that Deep Learning over few layers may be plausible in the brain and increases the accuracy of bio-plausible machine learning. Code is available at https://github.com/NeuromorphicComputing/SoftHebb.
abstract_zh: 最近对反向传播 (BP) 的近似已经缓解了 BP 的许多计算效率低下和与生物学不相容的问题，但仍然存在重要的局限性。此外，近似值显着降低了基准测试的准确性，这表明完全不同的方法可能会更有效。在这里，基于软赢家通吃网络中 Hebbian 学习的最新理论，我们提出了多层 SoftHebb，即一种训练深度神经网络的算法，无需任何反馈、目标或误差信号。因此，它通过避免重量传输、非局部可塑性、层更新的时间锁定、迭代平衡以及（自）监督或其他反馈信号来实现效率——这在其他方法中是必要的。与最先进的生物合理学习相比，其效率和生物兼容性的提高并没有牺牲准确性，而是提高了准确性。通过多达 5 个隐藏层和一个附加的线性分类器，MNIST、CIFAR-10、STL-10 和 ImageNet 上的准确率分别达到 99.4%、80.3%、76.2% 和 27.3%。总之，SoftHebb 采用与 BP 完全不同的方法表明，几层深度学习在大脑中可能是合理的，并提高了生物合理机器学习的准确性。代码可在 https://github.com/NeuromorphicComputing/SoftHebb 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需反馈信号的深度学习算法SoftHebb，通过赫布学习理论训练多层神经网络。
AI.motivation: 现有反向传播近似方法存在计算效率低、生物兼容性差及精度下降等问题，需探索全新训练范式。
AI.method: 基于软竞争网络的赫布学习理论，设计无需权重传输、非局部可塑性或误差信号的多层SoftHebb算法。
AI.result: 在MNIST/CIFAR-10/STL-10/ImageNet数据集上分别达到99.4%/80.3%/76.2%/27.3%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: SoftHebb验证了无反馈深度学习在少量层中的生物合理性，并提升了生物启发式机器学习的精度。

authors_text: Jaemin Lee,Mingyo Seo,Andrew Bylard,Robert Sun,Luis Sentis
title: Real-Time Model Predictive Control for Industrial Manipulators with Singularity-Tolerant Hierarchical Task Control
title_zh: 具有奇异容错分层任务控制的工业机械手实时模型预测控制
abstract: This paper proposes a real-time model predictive control (MPC) scheme to execute multiple tasks using robots over a finite-time horizon. In industrial robotic applications, we must carefully consider multiple constraints for avoiding joint position, velocity, and torque limits. In addition, singularity-free and smooth motions require executing tasks continuously and safely. Instead of formulating nonlinear MPC problems, we devise linear MPC problems using kinematic and dynamic models linearized along nominal trajectories produced by hierarchical controllers. These linear MPC problems are solvable via the use of Quadratic Programming; therefore, we significantly reduce the computation time of the proposed MPC framework so the resulting update frequency is higher than 1 kHz. Our proposed MPC framework is more efficient in reducing task tracking errors than a baseline based on operational space control (OSC). We validate our approach in numerical simulations and in real experiments using an industrial manipulator. More specifically, we deploy our method in two practical scenarios for robotic logistics: 1) controlling a robot carrying heavy payloads while accounting for torque limits, and 2) controlling the end-effector while avoiding singularities.
summary: This paper proposes a real-time model predictive control (MPC) scheme to execute multiple tasks using robots over a finite-time horizon. In industrial robotic applications, we must carefully consider multiple constraints for avoiding joint position, velocity, and torque limits. In addition, singularity-free and smooth motions require executing tasks continuously and safely. Instead of formulating nonlinear MPC problems, we devise linear MPC problems using kinematic and dynamic models linearized along nominal trajectories produced by hierarchical controllers. These linear MPC problems are solvable via the use of Quadratic Programming; therefore, we significantly reduce the computation time of the proposed MPC framework so the resulting update frequency is higher than 1 kHz. Our proposed MPC framework is more efficient in reducing task tracking errors than a baseline based on operational space control (OSC). We validate our approach in numerical simulations and in real experiments using an industrial manipulator. More specifically, we deploy our method in two practical scenarios for robotic logistics: 1) controlling a robot carrying heavy payloads while accounting for torque limits, and 2) controlling the end-effector while avoiding singularities.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种实时模型预测控制（MPC）方案，用于在有限时间范围内使用机器人执行多个任务。在工业机器人应用中，我们必须仔细考虑多重约束，以避免关节位置、速度和扭矩限制。此外，无奇点且平滑的运动需要连续且安全地执行任务。我们没有制定非线性 MPC 问题，而是使用沿着分层控制器产生的标称轨迹线性化的运动学和动态模型来设计线性 MPC 问题。这些线性 MPC 问题可以通过使用二次规划来解决；因此，我们显着减少了所提出的 MPC 框架的计算时间，因此最终的更新频率高于 1 kHz。我们提出的 MPC 框架在减少任务跟踪错误方面比基于操作空间控制 (OSC) 的基线更有效。我们在数值模拟和使用工业机械手的实际实验中验证了我们的方法。更具体地说，我们将我们的方法部署在机器人物流的两个实际场景中：1）控制携带重负载的机器人，同时考虑扭矩限制；2）控制末端执行器，同时避免奇点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实时模型预测控制（MPC）方案，用于工业机械臂的多任务控制，通过线性化模型和分层控制器生成轨迹，解决奇异性和约束问题。
AI.motivation: 工业机器人需在有限时间内执行多任务，同时避免关节位置、速度和扭矩限制，并确保运动平滑无奇异点，传统非线性MPC计算复杂度高难以实时应用。
AI.method: 通过分层控制器生成名义轨迹，对运动学和动力学模型进行线性化，转化为线性MPC问题并利用二次规划求解，实现高于1 kHz的更新频率。
AI.result: 在数值仿真和实际实验中验证了方法有效性，相比操作空间控制（OSC）基线，任务跟踪误差显著降低，成功应用于重载搬运和奇异点规避场景。
AI.conclusion: 该MPC框架通过线性化和分层控制策略，兼顾实时性与任务精度，为工业机器人多约束下的复杂任务控制提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Han Liu,Yubo Fan,Ipek Oguz,Benoit M. Dawant
title: Enhancing Data Diversity for Self-training Based Unsupervised Cross-modality Vestibular Schwannoma and Cochlea Segmentation
title_zh: 增强基于自训练的无监督跨模态前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗分割的数据多样性
abstract: Automatic segmentation of vestibular schwannoma (VS) and cochlea from magnetic resonance imaging can facilitate VS treatment planning. Unsupervised segmentation methods have shown promising results without requiring the time-consuming and laborious manual labeling process. In this paper, we present an approach for VS and cochlea segmentation in an unsupervised domain adaptation setting. Specifically, we first develop a cross-site cross-modality unpaired image translation strategy to enrich the diversity of the synthesized data. Then, we devise a rule-based offline augmentation technique to further minimize the domain gap. Lastly, we adopt a self-configuring segmentation framework empowered by self-training to obtain the final results. On the CrossMoDA 2022 validation leaderboard, our method has achieved competitive VS and cochlea segmentation performance with mean Dice scores of 0.8178 $\pm$ 0.0803 and 0.8433 $\pm$ 0.0293, respectively.
summary: Automatic segmentation of vestibular schwannoma (VS) and cochlea from magnetic resonance imaging can facilitate VS treatment planning. Unsupervised segmentation methods have shown promising results without requiring the time-consuming and laborious manual labeling process. In this paper, we present an approach for VS and cochlea segmentation in an unsupervised domain adaptation setting. Specifically, we first develop a cross-site cross-modality unpaired image translation strategy to enrich the diversity of the synthesized data. Then, we devise a rule-based offline augmentation technique to further minimize the domain gap. Lastly, we adopt a self-configuring segmentation framework empowered by self-training to obtain the final results. On the CrossMoDA 2022 validation leaderboard, our method has achieved competitive VS and cochlea segmentation performance with mean Dice scores of 0.8178 $\pm$ 0.0803 and 0.8433 $\pm$ 0.0293, respectively.
abstract_zh: 通过磁共振成像自动分割前庭神经鞘瘤 (VS) 和耳蜗可以促进 VS 治疗计划。无监督分割方法已经显示出有希望的结果，而不需要费时费力的手动标记过程。在本文中，我们提出了一种在无监督域适应设置中进行 VS 和耳蜗分割的方法。具体来说，我们首先开发一种跨站点跨模态不配对图像翻译策略，以丰富合成数据的多样性。然后，我们设计了一种基于规则的离线增强技术，以进一步最小化域间隙。最后，我们采用自我训练的自配置分割框架来获得最终结果。在 CrossMoDA 2022 验证排行榜上，我们的方法取得了有竞争力的 VS 和耳蜗分割性能，平均 Dice 分数分别为 0.8178 $\pm$ 0.0803 和 0.8433 $\pm$ 0.0293。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无监督跨模态分割前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗的方法，以减少手动标注需求并提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 传统手动标注耗时费力，而现有无监督方法在跨模态域适应中存在挑战，需提升数据多样性和分割性能。
AI.method: 采用跨站点跨模态无配对图像翻译增强数据多样性，结合规则离线增强缩小域差距，并利用自训练分割框架优化结果。
AI.result: 在CrossMoDA 2022验证榜单中，VS和耳蜗的平均Dice分数分别为0.8178和0.8433，表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过增强数据多样性与自训练策略有效解决跨模态分割难题，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Jonah Stegman,Patrick J. Trottier,Caroline Hillier,Hassan Khan,Mohammad Mannan
title: "My Privacy for their Security": Employees' Privacy Perspectives and Expectations when using Enterprise Security Software
title_zh: “我的隐私保护他们的安全”：员工使用企业安全软件时的隐私观点和期望
comment: To appear in USENIX Security Symposium 2023
comments: To appear in USENIX Security Symposium 2023
abstract: Employees are often required to use Enterprise Security Software ("ESS") on corporate and personal devices. ESS products collect users' activity data including users' location, applications used, and websites visited - operating from employees' device to the cloud. To the best of our knowledge, the privacy implications of this data collection have yet to be explored. We conduct an online survey (n=258) and a semi-structured interview (n=22) with ESS users to understand their privacy perceptions, the challenges they face when using ESS, and the ways they try to overcome those challenges. We found that while many participants reported receiving no information about what data their ESS collected, those who received some information often underestimated what was collected. Employees reported lack of communication about various data collection aspects including: the entities with access to the data and the scope of the data collected. We use the interviews to uncover several sources of misconceptions among the participants. Our findings show that while employees understand the need for data collection for security, the lack of communication and ambiguous data collection practices result in the erosion of employees' trust on the ESS and employers. We obtain suggestions from participants on how to mitigate these misconceptions and collect feedback on our design mockups of a privacy notice and privacy indicators for ESS. Our work will benefit researchers, employers, and ESS developers to protect users' privacy in the growing ESS market.
summary: Employees are often required to use Enterprise Security Software ("ESS") on corporate and personal devices. ESS products collect users' activity data including users' location, applications used, and websites visited - operating from employees' device to the cloud. To the best of our knowledge, the privacy implications of this data collection have yet to be explored. We conduct an online survey (n=258) and a semi-structured interview (n=22) with ESS users to understand their privacy perceptions, the challenges they face when using ESS, and the ways they try to overcome those challenges. We found that while many participants reported receiving no information about what data their ESS collected, those who received some information often underestimated what was collected. Employees reported lack of communication about various data collection aspects including: the entities with access to the data and the scope of the data collected. We use the interviews to uncover several sources of misconceptions among the participants. Our findings show that while employees understand the need for data collection for security, the lack of communication and ambiguous data collection practices result in the erosion of employees' trust on the ESS and employers. We obtain suggestions from participants on how to mitigate these misconceptions and collect feedback on our design mockups of a privacy notice and privacy indicators for ESS. Our work will benefit researchers, employers, and ESS developers to protect users' privacy in the growing ESS market.
abstract_zh: 员工通常需要在公司和个人设备上使用企业安全软件（“ESS”）。 ESS 产品收集用户的活动数据，包括用户的位置、使用的应用程序和访问的网站 - 从员工的设备到云端进行操作。据我们所知，此数据收集的隐私影响仍有待探讨。我们对 ESS 用户进行了在线调查 (n=258) 和半结构化访谈 (n=22)，以了解他们的隐私认知、他们在使用 ESS 时面临的挑战以及他们尝试克服这些挑战的方式。我们发现，虽然许多参与者报告没有收到有关他们的 ESS 收集的数据的信息，但收到一些信息的人往往低估了收集的数据。员工报告称，在各种数据收集方面缺乏沟通，包括：有权访问数据的实体以及所收集数据的范围。我们通过访谈来揭示参与者中一些误解的来源。我们的研究结果表明，虽然员工了解出于安全目的而收集数据的必要性，但缺乏沟通和模糊的数据收集做法会导致员工对 ESS 和雇主的信任受到侵蚀。我们从参与者那里获取有关如何减轻这些误解的建议，并收集有关 ESS 隐私声明和隐私指标设计模型的反馈。我们的工作将使研究人员、雇主和 ESS 开发人员受益，以在不断增长的 ESS 市场中保护用户的隐私。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究员工在使用企业安全软件（ESS）时的隐私观念与期望，探讨数据收集对其信任的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分探讨企业安全软件数据收集的隐私影响，员工对数据收集范围和使用方缺乏清晰认知，导致信任危机。
AI.method: 通过在线问卷（258人）和半结构化访谈（22人）收集数据，分析隐私认知误区，并设计隐私通知与指示原型获取反馈。
AI.result: 多数员工未获数据收集信息，部分人低估收集范围；缺乏透明沟通导致对ESS和雇主信任度下降，参与者提出改进隐私通知的设计建议。
AI.conclusion: 需通过透明沟通与清晰隐私设计增强员工信任，研究为ESS开发者、雇主及研究人员提供隐私保护改进方向。

title: Leveraging Self-Supervised Training for Unintentional Action Recognition
title_zh: 利用自我监督训练进行无意动作识别
abstract: Unintentional actions are rare occurrences that are difficult to define precisely and that are highly dependent on the temporal context of the action. In this work, we explore such actions and seek to identify the points in videos where the actions transition from intentional to unintentional. We propose a multi-stage framework that exploits inherent biases such as motion speed, motion direction, and order to recognize unintentional actions. To enhance representations via self-supervised training for the task of unintentional action recognition we propose temporal transformations, called Temporal Transformations of Inherent Biases of Unintentional Actions (T2IBUA). The multi-stage approach models the temporal information on both the level of individual frames and full clips. These enhanced representations show strong performance for unintentional action recognition tasks. We provide an extensive ablation study of our framework and report results that significantly improve over the state-of-the-art.
summary: Unintentional actions are rare occurrences that are difficult to define precisely and that are highly dependent on the temporal context of the action. In this work, we explore such actions and seek to identify the points in videos where the actions transition from intentional to unintentional. We propose a multi-stage framework that exploits inherent biases such as motion speed, motion direction, and order to recognize unintentional actions. To enhance representations via self-supervised training for the task of unintentional action recognition we propose temporal transformations, called Temporal Transformations of Inherent Biases of Unintentional Actions (T2IBUA). The multi-stage approach models the temporal information on both the level of individual frames and full clips. These enhanced representations show strong performance for unintentional action recognition tasks. We provide an extensive ablation study of our framework and report results that significantly improve over the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 无意识行为是罕见的事件，难以精确定义，并且高度依赖于行为的时间背景。在这项工作中，我们探索了此类行为，并试图识别视频中的行为从有意向无意转变的点。我们提出了一个多阶段框架，利用运动速度、运动方向和顺序等固有偏差来识别无意动作。为了通过对无意识动作识别任务的自监督训练来增强表征，我们提出了时间变换，称为无意识动作固有偏差的时间变换（T2IBUA）。多阶段方法对单个帧和完整剪辑级别的时间信息进行建模。这些增强的表示在无意识动作识别任务中表现出强大的性能。我们对我们的框架进行了广泛的消融研究，并报告了显着改进现有技术的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段框架，结合自监督训练和时间变换方法（T2IBUA），用于识别视频中从有意到无意动作的转换点。
AI.motivation: 无意动作因罕见性和对时间上下文的强依赖性，难以通过传统方法准确识别，需探索更有效的表征学习方式。
AI.method: 设计多阶段框架，利用运动速度、方向及顺序等内在偏差，通过自监督训练的T2IBUA时间变换增强表征，并在单帧与完整片段层级建模时间信息。
AI.result: 在无意动作识别任务中显著超越现有最优方法，且通过消融实验证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过自监督训练与多阶段时间建模，有效提升了无意动作识别的性能，为相关研究提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段框架，结合自监督训练和时间变换方法（T2IBUA），用于识别视频中从有意到无意动作的转换点。
ai_content.motivation: 无意动作因罕见性和对时间上下文的强依赖性，难以通过传统方法准确识别，需探索更有效的表征学习方式。
ai_content.method: 设计多阶段框架，利用运动速度、方向及顺序等内在偏差，通过自监督训练的T2IBUA时间变换增强表征，并在单帧与完整片段层级建模时间信息。
ai_content.result: 在无意动作识别任务中显著超越现有最优方法，且通过消融实验证明方法有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过自监督训练与多阶段时间建模，有效提升了无意动作识别的性能，为相关研究提供新思路。

search_text: Leveraging Self-Supervised Training for Unintentional Action Recognition 利用自我监督训练进行无意动作识别 Unintentional actions are rare occurrences that are difficult to define precisely and that are highly dependent on the temporal context of the action. In this work, we explore such actions and seek to identify the points in videos where the actions transition from intentional to unintentional. We propose a multi-stage framework that exploits inherent biases such as motion speed, motion direction, and order to recognize unintentional actions. To enhance representations via self-supervised training for the task of unintentional action recognition we propose temporal transformations, called Temporal Transformations of Inherent Biases of Unintentional Actions (T2IBUA). The multi-stage approach models the temporal information on both the level of individual frames and full clips. These enhanced representations show strong performance for unintentional action recognition tasks. We provide an extensive ablation study of our framework and report results that significantly improve over the state-of-the-art. 无意识行为是罕见的事件，难以精确定义，并且高度依赖于行为的时间背景。在这项工作中，我们探索了此类行为，并试图识别视频中的行为从有意向无意转变的点。我们提出了一个多阶段框架，利用运动速度、运动方向和顺序等固有偏差来识别无意动作。为了通过对无意识动作识别任务的自监督训练来增强表征，我们提出了时间变换，称为无意识动作固有偏差的时间变换（T2IBUA）。多阶段方法对单个帧和完整剪辑级别的时间信息进行建模。这些增强的表示在无意识动作识别任务中表现出强大的性能。我们对我们的框架进行了广泛的消融研究，并报告了显着改进现有技术的结果。 本文提出一种多阶段框架，结合自监督训练和时间变换方法（T2IBUA），用于识别视频中从有意到无意动作的转换点。 Enea Duka,Anna Kukleva,Bernt Schiele cs.CV

title: The Role of Symmetry in Constructing Geometric Flat Outputs for Free-Flying Robotic Systems
title_zh: 对称性在构建自由飞行机器人系统的几何平面输出中的作用
comment: Preprint, to appear in the proceedings of the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Companion video available at https://youtu.be/oMvF86MXTyY. This version updated with minor expository improvements
comments: Preprint, to appear in the proceedings of the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Companion video available at https://youtu.be/oMvF86MXTyY. This version updated with minor expository improvements
abstract: Mechanical systems naturally evolve on principal bundles describing their inherent symmetries. The ensuing factorization of the configuration manifold into a symmetry group and an internal shape space has provided deep insights into the locomotion of many robotic and biological systems. On the other hand, the property of differential flatness has enabled efficient, effective planning and control algorithms for various robotic systems. Yet, a practical means of finding a flat output for an arbitrary robotic system remains an open question. In this work, we demonstrate surprising new connections between these two domains, for the first time employing symmetry directly to construct a flat output. We provide sufficient conditions for the existence of a trivialization of the bundle in which the group variables themselves are a flat output. We call this a geometric flat output, since it is equivariant (i.e. maintains the symmetry) and is often global or almost-global, properties not typically enjoyed by other flat outputs. In such a trivialization, the motion planning problem is easily solved, since a given trajectory for the group variables will fully determine the trajectory for the shape variables that exactly achieves this motion. We provide a partial catalog of robotic systems with geometric flat outputs and worked examples for the planar rocket, planar aerial manipulator, and quadrotor.

The ensuing factorization of the configuration manifold into a symmetry group and an internal shape space has provided deep insights into the locomotion of many robotic and biological systems. On the other hand, the property of differential flatness has enabled efficient, effective planning and control algorithms for various robotic systems. Yet, a practical means of finding a flat output for an arbitrary robotic system remains an open question. In this work, we demonstrate surprising new connections between these two domains, for the first time employing symmetry directly to construct a flat output. We provide sufficient conditions for the existence of a trivialization of the bundle in which the group variables themselves are a flat output. We call this a geometric flat output, since it is equivariant (i.e. maintains the symmetry) and is often global or almost-global, properties not typically enjoyed by other flat outputs. In such a trivialization, the motion planning problem is easily solved, since a given trajectory for the group variables will fully determine the trajectory for the shape variables that exactly achieves this motion. We provide a partial catalog of robotic systems with geometric flat outputs and worked examples for the planar rocket, planar aerial manipulator, and quadrotor.
abstract_zh: 机械系统自然地在描述其固有对称性的主丛上演化。随后将配置流形分解为对称群和内部形状空间，为许多机器人和生物系统的运动提供了深入的见解。另一方面，差异平坦度的特性为各种机器人系统提供了高效、有效的规划和控制算法。然而，为任意机器人系统找到平坦输出的实用方法仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们展示了这两个领域之间令人惊讶的新联系，首次使用对称性直接构建平坦的输出。我们为束的平凡化的存在提供了充分的条件，其中组变量本身是平坦的输出。我们将其称为几何平坦输出，因为它是等变的（即保持对称性）并且通常是全局或几乎全局的，这是其他平坦输出通常不具备的属性。在这种平凡化中，运动规划问题很容易解决，因为组变量的给定轨迹将完全确定精确实现该运动的形状变量的轨迹。我们提供了具有几何平面输出的机器人系统的部分目录，以及平面火箭、平面空中操纵器和四旋翼飞行器的工作示例。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何利用对称性构建自由飞行机器人系统的几何平坦输出，以解决运动规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以为任意机器人系统找到平坦输出，且传统平坦输出通常缺乏全局性或对称性保持特性。
AI.method: 通过将机械系统的配置流形分解为对称群与形状空间，结合微分平坦性理论，提出基于对称性的几何平坦输出构造方法。
AI.result: 建立了对称群变量作为平坦输出的充分条件，并为平面火箭、四旋翼等系统提供了具体示例与部分目录。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过保持对称性的全局平坦输出，显著简化了运动规划问题，为机器人控制提供了新思路。

title: ControlVC: Zero-Shot Voice Conversion with Time-Varying Controls on Pitch and Speed
title_zh: ControlVC：对音高和速度进行时变控制的零样本语音转换
abstract: Recent developments in neural speech synthesis and vocoding have sparked a renewed interest in voice conversion (VC). Beyond timbre transfer, achieving controllability on para-linguistic parameters such as pitch and Speed is critical in deploying VC systems in many application scenarios. Existing studies, however, either only provide utterance-level global control or lack interpretability on the controls. In this paper, we propose ControlVC, the first neural voice conversion system that achieves time-varying controls on pitch and speed. ControlVC uses pre-trained encoders to compute pitch and linguistic embeddings from the source utterance and speaker embeddings from the target utterance. These embeddings are then concatenated and converted to speech using a vocoder. It achieves speed control through TD-PSOLA pre-processing on the source utterance, and achieves pitch control by manipulating the pitch contour before feeding it to the pitch encoder. Systematic subjective and objective evaluations are conducted to assess the speech quality and controllability. Results show that, on non-parallel and zero-shot conversion tasks, ControlVC significantly outperforms two other self-constructed baselines on speech quality, and it can successfully achieve time-varying pitch and speed control.
summary: Recent developments in neural speech synthesis and vocoding have sparked a renewed interest in voice conversion (VC). Beyond timbre transfer, achieving controllability on para-linguistic parameters such as pitch and Speed is critical in deploying VC systems in many application scenarios. Existing studies, however, either only provide utterance-level global control or lack interpretability on the controls. In this paper, we propose ControlVC, the first neural voice conversion system that achieves time-varying controls on pitch and speed. ControlVC uses pre-trained encoders to compute pitch and linguistic embeddings from the source utterance and speaker embeddings from the target utterance. These embeddings are then concatenated and converted to speech using a vocoder. It achieves speed control through TD-PSOLA pre-processing on the source utterance, and achieves pitch control by manipulating the pitch contour before feeding it to the pitch encoder. Systematic subjective and objective evaluations are conducted to assess the speech quality and controllability. Results show that, on non-parallel and zero-shot conversion tasks, ControlVC significantly outperforms two other self-constructed baselines on speech quality, and it can successfully achieve time-varying pitch and speed control.
abstract_zh: 神经语音合成和声编码的最新发展引发了人们对语音转换 (VC) 的新兴趣。除了音色传输之外，实现音高和速度等副语言参数的可控性对于在许多应用场景中部署 VC 系统至关重要。然而，现有的研究要么只提供话语级别的全局控制，要么缺乏控制的可解释性。在本文中，我们提出了 ControlVC，这是第一个实现音调和速度时变控制的神经语音转换系统。 ControlVC 使用预先训练的编码器来计算源话语的音调和语言嵌入以及目标话语的说话人嵌入。然后使用声码器将这些嵌入连接并转换为语音。它通过对源语音进行 TD-PSOLA 预处理来实现速度控制，并通过在将其输入到音调编码器之前操纵音调轮廓来实现音调控制。通过系统的主观和客观评估来评估语音质量和可控性。结果表明，在非并行和零样本转换任务上，ControlVC 在语音质量方面显着优于其他两个自建基线，并且可以成功实现时变音调和速度控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ControlVC，一种实现零样本语音转换的系统，支持对音高和语速进行时变控制。
AI.motivation: 现有语音转换系统在控制语速和音高等副语言参数时，仅支持全局控制或缺乏可解释性，难以满足实际应用中动态调整的需求。
AI.method: ControlVC通过预训练编码器提取源语音的音高和语言嵌入、目标语音的说话人嵌入，拼接后输入声码器生成语音。速度控制采用TD-PSOLA预处理，音高控制通过调整音高轮廓实现。
AI.result: 在非平行和零样本任务中，ControlVC的语音质量显著优于其他基线，并成功实现时变音高和语速控制。
AI.conclusion: ControlVC是首个支持时变控制的神经语音转换系统，提升了语音转换在实际应用中的灵活性和可控性。

It achieves speed control through TD-PSOLA pre-processing on the source utterance, and achieves pitch control by manipulating the pitch contour before feeding it to the pitch encoder. Systematic subjective and objective evaluations are conducted to assess the speech quality and controllability. Results show that, on non-parallel and zero-shot conversion tasks, ControlVC significantly outperforms two other self-constructed baselines on speech quality, and it can successfully achieve time-varying pitch and speed control. 神经语音合成和声编码的最新发展引发了人们对语音转换 (VC) 的新兴趣。除了音色传输之外，实现音高和速度等副语言参数的可控性对于在许多应用场景中部署 VC 系统至关重要。然而，现有的研究要么只提供话语级别的全局控制，要么缺乏控制的可解释性。在本文中，我们提出了 ControlVC，这是第一个实现音调和速度时变控制的神经语音转换系统。 ControlVC 使用预先训练的编码器来计算源话语的音调和语言嵌入以及目标话语的说话人嵌入。然后使用声码器将这些嵌入连接并转换为语音。它通过对源语音进行 TD-PSOLA 预处理来实现速度控制，并通过在将其输入到音调编码器之前操纵音调轮廓来实现音调控制。通过系统的主观和客观评估来评估语音质量和可控性。结果表明，在非并行和零样本转换任务上，ControlVC 在语音质量方面显着优于其他两个自建基线，并且可以成功实现时变音调和速度控制。 本文提出ControlVC，一种实现零样本语音转换的系统，支持对音高和语速进行时变控制。 Meiying Chen,Zhiyao Duan eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Yizhou Huang,Hamza Dugmag,Timothy D. Barfoot,Florian Shkurti
title: Stochastic Planning for ASV Navigation Using Satellite Images
title_zh: 使用卫星图像进行 ASV 导航的随机规划
abstract: Autonomous surface vessels (ASV) represent a promising technology to automate water-quality monitoring of lakes. In this work, we use satellite images as a coarse map and plan sampling routes for the robot. However, inconsistency between the satellite images and the actual lake, as well as environmental disturbances such as wind, aquatic vegetation, and changing water levels can make it difficult for robots to visit places suggested by the prior map. This paper presents a robust route-planning algorithm that minimizes the expected total travel distance given these environmental disturbances, which induce uncertainties in the map. We verify the efficacy of our algorithm in simulations of over a thousand Canadian lakes and demonstrate an application of our algorithm in a 3.7 km-long real-world robot experiment on a lake in Northern Ontario, Canada. Videos are available on our website https://pcctp.github.io/.
summary: Autonomous surface vessels (ASV) represent a promising technology to automate water-quality monitoring of lakes. In this work, we use satellite images as a coarse map and plan sampling routes for the robot. However, inconsistency between the satellite images and the actual lake, as well as environmental disturbances such as wind, aquatic vegetation, and changing water levels can make it difficult for robots to visit places suggested by the prior map. This paper presents a robust route-planning algorithm that minimizes the expected total travel distance given these environmental disturbances, which induce uncertainties in the map. We verify the efficacy of our algorithm in simulations of over a thousand Canadian lakes and demonstrate an application of our algorithm in a 3.7 km-long real-world robot experiment on a lake in Northern Ontario, Canada. Videos are available on our website https://pcctp.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 自主水面船（ASV）代表了一种有前途的自动化湖泊水质监测技术。在这项工作中，我们使用卫星图像作为粗略地图，并为机器人规划采样路线。然而，卫星图像与实际湖泊之间的不一致，以及风、水生植被和水位变化等环境干扰，可能会使机器人难以访问先前地图建议的地点。本文提出了一种鲁棒的路线规划算法，可以在考虑到这些环境干扰（从而导致地图中产生不确定性）的情况下最小化预期总行驶距离。我们在加拿大一千多个湖泊的模拟中验证了我们的算法的有效性，并在加拿大安大略省北部的一个湖泊上进行了 3.7 公里长的真实世界机器人实验中展示了我们的算法的应用。视频可在我们的网站 https://pcctp.github.io/ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卫星图像的鲁棒路径规划算法，用于自主水面船舶（ASV）在环境不确定性下的导航。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像与实际湖泊存在不一致，且环境干扰（如风、水生植物）导致传统路径规划方法难以有效导航。
AI.method: 设计了一种随机规划算法，通过最小化环境扰动下的预期总行驶距离，优化ASV的采样路线。
AI.result: 在超过1000个加拿大湖泊的模拟中验证算法有效性，并在加拿大安大略省北部3.7公里真实湖泊实验中成功应用。
AI.conclusion: 该算法能有效应对环境不确定性，提升ASV在复杂水域中的导航可靠性与实用性。

title: Transformer-Based Microbubble Localization
title_zh: 基于变压器的微泡定位
abstract: Ultrasound Localization Microscopy (ULM) is an emerging technique that employs the localization of echogenic microbubbles (MBs) to finely sample and image the microcirculation beyond the diffraction limit of ultrasound imaging. Conventional MB localization methods are mainly based on considering a specific Point Spread Function (PSF) for MBs, which leads to loss of information caused by overlapping MBs, non-stationary PSFs, and harmonic MB echoes. Therefore, it is imperative to devise methods that can accurately localize MBs while being resilient to MB nonlinearities and variations of MB concentrations that distort MB PSFs. This paper proposes a transformer-based MB localization approach to address this issue. We adopted DEtection TRansformer (DETR) arXiv:2005.12872 , which is an end-to-end object recognition method that detects a unique bounding box for each of the detected objects using set-based Hungarian loss and bipartite matching. To the authors' knowledge, this is the first time transformers have been used for MB localization. To appraise the proposed strategy, the pre-trained DETR network's performance has been tested for detecting MBs using transfer learning principles. We have fine-tuned the network on a subset of randomly selected frames of the dataset provided by the IEEE IUS Ultra-SR challenge organizers and then tested on the rest using cross-validation. For the simulation dataset, the paper supports the deployment of transformer-based solutions for MB localization at high accuracy.
summary: Ultrasound Localization Microscopy (ULM) is an emerging technique that employs the localization of echogenic microbubbles (MBs) to finely sample and image the microcirculation beyond the diffraction limit of ultrasound imaging. Conventional MB localization methods are mainly based on considering a specific Point Spread Function (PSF) for MBs, which leads to loss of information caused by overlapping MBs, non-stationary PSFs, and harmonic MB echoes. Therefore, it is imperative to devise methods that can accurately localize MBs while being resilient to MB nonlinearities and variations of MB concentrations that distort MB PSFs. This paper proposes a transformer-based MB localization approach to address this issue. We adopted DEtection TRansformer (DETR) arXiv:2005.12872 , which is an end-to-end object recognition method that detects a unique bounding box for each of the detected objects using set-based Hungarian loss and bipartite matching. To the authors' knowledge, this is the first time transformers have been used for MB localization. To appraise the proposed strategy, the pre-trained DETR network's performance has been tested for detecting MBs using transfer learning principles. We have fine-tuned the network on a subset of randomly selected frames of the dataset provided by the IEEE IUS Ultra-SR challenge organizers and then tested on the rest using cross-validation. For the simulation dataset, the paper supports the deployment of transformer-based solutions for MB localization at high accuracy.
abstract_zh: 超声定位显微镜 (ULM) 是一种新兴技术，它利用回声微泡 (MB) 的定位来对超出超声成像衍射极限的微循环进行精细采样和成像。传统的MB定位方法主要基于考虑MB的特定点扩展函数(PSF)，这会导致由重叠MB、非平稳PSF和谐波MB回波引起的信息丢失。因此，必须设计出能够准确定位微球的方法，同时能够适应微球非线性和微球浓度变化，从而扭曲微球PSF。本文提出了一种基于变压器的 MB 本地化方法来解决这个问题。我们采用了 DEtection TRansformer (DETR) arXiv:2005.12872 ，这是一种端到端的对象识别方法，它使用基于集合的匈牙利损失和二分匹配来检测每个检测到的对象的唯一边界框。据作者所知，这是 Transformer 首次用于 MB 本地化。为了评估所提出的策略，已经测试了预训练的 DETR 网络的性能，以使用迁移学习原理检测 MB。我们在 IEEE IUS Ultra-SR 挑战组织者提供的数据集的随机选择帧的子集上对网络进行了微调，然后使用交叉验证对其余帧进行测试。对于模拟数据集，本文支持部署基于变压器的解决方案以实现高精度 MB 定位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的微泡定位方法，以解决超声定位显微镜（ULM）中传统方法因微泡重叠和PSF变化导致的信息丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 传统微泡定位方法因微泡重叠、非稳态PSF和非线性回波导致定位精度下降，需开发对微泡浓度变化和非线性特性鲁棒的定位方法。
AI.method: 采用DETR（检测Transformer）架构，通过匈牙利损失函数和二分图匹配实现端到端微泡检测，并基于IEEE IUS Ultra-SR挑战数据集进行迁移学习和交叉验证。
AI.result: 在仿真数据集上验证了Transformer方法在微泡定位中的高精度，证明其可有效部署于ULM系统。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构为微泡定位提供了新思路，能够有效应对非线性特性与浓度变化带来的挑战，提升ULM成像精度。

authors_text: Huyen N. Nguyen,Tommy Dang,Kathleen A. Bowe
title: WordStream Maker: A Lightweight End-to-end Visualization Platform for Qualitative Time-series Data
title_zh: WordStream Maker：用于定性时间序列数据的轻量级端到端可视化平台
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures. In NLVIZ: Exploring Research Opportunities for Natural Language, Text, and Data Visualization, IEEE VIS 2022
comments: 4 pages, 4 figures. In NLVIZ: Exploring Research Opportunities for Natural Language, Text, and Data Visualization, IEEE VIS 2022
abstract: Whether it is in the form of transcribed conversations, blog posts, or tweets, qualitative data provides a reader with rich insight into both the overarching trends as well as the diversity of human ideas expressed through text. Handling and analyzing large amounts of qualitative data, however, is difficult, often requiring multiple time-intensive perusals in order to identify patterns. This difficulty is multiplied with each additional question or time point present in a data set. A primary challenge then is creating visualizations that support the interpretation of qualitative data by making it easier to identify and explore trends of interest. By combining the affordances of both text and visualizations, WordStream has previously enabled ease of information retrieval and processing of time-series text data, but the data-wrangling necessary to produce a WordStream remains a significant barrier for non-technical users. In response, this paper presents WordStream Maker: an end-to-end platform with a pipeline that utilizes natural language processing (NLP) to help non-technical users process raw text data and generate a customizable visualization without programming practice. Lessons learned from integrating NLP into visualization and scaling to large data sets are discussed, along with use cases to demonstrate the usefulness of the platform.

In response, this paper presents WordStream Maker: an end-to-end platform with a pipeline that utilizes natural language processing (NLP) to help non-technical users process raw text data and generate a customizable visualization without programming practice. Lessons learned from integrating NLP into visualization and scaling to large data sets are discussed, along with use cases to demonstrate the usefulness of the platform.
abstract_zh: 无论是以转录对话、博客文章还是推文的形式，定性数据都可以让读者深入了解总体趋势以及通过文本表达的人类思想的多样性。然而，处理和分析大量定性数据很困难，通常需要多次耗时的细读才能识别模式。随着数据集中存在的每个附加问题或时间点，这种难度会成倍增加。主要挑战是创建可视化，通过更轻松地识别和探索感兴趣的趋势来支持定性数据的解释。通过结合文本和可视化的功能，WordStream 以前可以轻松实现时间序列文本数据的信息检索和处理，但生成 WordStream 所需的数据整理对于非技术用户来说仍然是一个重大障碍。为此，本文提出了 WordStream Maker：一个带有管道的端到端平台，利用自然语言处理 (NLP) 帮助非技术用户处理原始文本数据并生成可定制的可视化，而无需编程实践。讨论了将 NLP 集成到可视化和扩展到大型数据集的经验教训，以及演示该平台实用性的用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WordStream Maker，一个轻量级端到端可视化平台，帮助非技术人员处理定性时间序列数据并生成自定义可视化结果。
AI.motivation: 定性数据的分析耗时且复杂，现有工具如WordStream需要用户具备数据处理技能，难以满足非技术用户需求。
AI.method: 结合自然语言处理（NLP）与可视化技术，构建自动化数据处理流水线，实现从原始文本到可视化结果的端到端处理。
AI.result: 开发出无需编程的可视化平台，支持大规模数据集处理，并通过案例验证其在趋势分析中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: WordStream Maker通过集成NLP与可视化技术，降低了定性数据分析门槛，为非技术用户提供了高效探索文本趋势的工具。

search_text: WordStream Maker: A Lightweight End-to-end Visualization Platform for Qualitative Time-series Data WordStream Maker：用于定性时间序列数据的轻量级端到端可视化平台 Whether it is in the form of transcribed conversations, blog posts, or tweets, qualitative data provides a reader with rich insight into both the overarching trends as well as the diversity of human ideas expressed through text. Handling and analyzing large amounts of qualitative data, however, is difficult, often requiring multiple time-intensive perusals in order to identify patterns. This difficulty is multiplied with each additional question or time point present in a data set. A primary challenge then is creating visualizations that support the interpretation of qualitative data by making it easier to identify and explore trends of interest. By combining the affordances of both text and visualizations, WordStream has previously enabled ease of information retrieval and processing of time-series text data, but the data-wrangling necessary to produce a WordStream remains a significant barrier for non-technical users. In response, this paper presents WordStream Maker: an end-to-end platform with a pipeline that utilizes natural language processing (NLP) to help non-technical users process raw text data and generate a customizable visualization without programming practice. Lessons learned from integrating NLP into visualization and scaling to large data sets are discussed, along with use cases to demonstrate the usefulness of the platform. 无论是以转录对话、博客文章还是推文的形式，定性数据都可以让读者深入了解总体趋势以及通过文本表达的人类思想的多样性。然而，处理和分析大量定性数据很困难，通常需要多次耗时的细读才能识别模式。随着数据集中存在的每个附加问题或时间点，这种难度会成倍增加。主要挑战是创建可视化，通过更轻松地识别和探索感兴趣的趋势来支持定性数据的解释。通过结合文本和可视化的功能，WordStream 以前可以轻松实现时间序列文本数据的信息检索和处理，但生成 WordStream 所需的数据整理对于非技术用户来说仍然是一个重大障碍。为此，本文提出了 WordStream Maker：一个带有管道的端到端平台，利用自然语言处理 (NLP) 帮助非技术用户处理原始文本数据并生成可定制的可视化，而无需编程实践。讨论了将 NLP 集成到可视化和扩展到大型数据集的经验教训，以及演示该平台实用性的用例。 本文提出WordStream Maker，一个轻量级端到端可视化平台，帮助非技术人员处理定性时间序列数据并生成自定义可视化结果。 Huyen N. Nguyen,Tommy Dang,Kathleen A. Bowe cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Lena M. Downes,Ted J. Steiner,Rebecca L. Russell,Jonathan P. How
title: Wide-Area Geolocalization with a Limited Field of View Camera
title_zh: 使用有限视场相机进行广域地理定位
abstract: Cross-view geolocalization, a supplement or replacement for GPS, localizes an agent within a search area by matching images taken from a ground-view camera to overhead images taken from satellites or aircraft. Although the viewpoint disparity between ground and overhead images makes cross-view geolocalization challenging, significant progress has been made assuming that the ground agent has access to a panoramic camera. For example, our prior work (WAG) introduced changes in search area discretization, training loss, and particle filter weighting that enabled city-scale panoramic cross-view geolocalization. However, panoramic cameras are not widely used in existing robotic platforms due to their complexity and cost. Non-panoramic cross-view geolocalization is more applicable for robotics, but is also more challenging. This paper presents Restricted FOV Wide-Area Geolocalization (ReWAG), a cross-view geolocalization approach that generalizes WAG for use with standard, non-panoramic ground cameras by creating pose-aware embeddings and providing a strategy to incorporate particle pose into the Siamese network. ReWAG is a neural network and particle filter system that is able to globally localize a mobile agent in a GPS-denied environment with only odometry and a 90 degree FOV camera, achieving similar localization accuracy as what WAG achieved with a panoramic camera and improving localization accuracy by a factor of 100 compared to a baseline vision transformer (ViT) approach. A video highlight that demonstrates ReWAG's convergence on a test path of several dozen kilometers is available at https://youtu.be/U_OBQrt8qCE.
summary: Cross-view geolocalization, a supplement or replacement for GPS, localizes an agent within a search area by matching images taken from a ground-view camera to overhead images taken from satellites or aircraft. Although the viewpoint disparity between ground and overhead images makes cross-view geolocalization challenging, significant progress has been made assuming that the ground agent has access to a panoramic camera. For example, our prior work (WAG) introduced changes in search area discretization, training loss, and particle filter weighting that enabled city-scale panoramic cross-view geolocalization. However, panoramic cameras are not widely used in existing robotic platforms due to their complexity and cost. Non-panoramic cross-view geolocalization is more applicable for robotics, but is also more challenging. This paper presents Restricted FOV Wide-Area Geolocalization (ReWAG), a cross-view geolocalization approach that generalizes WAG for use with standard, non-panoramic ground cameras by creating pose-aware embeddings and providing a strategy to incorporate particle pose into the Siamese network. ReWAG is a neural network and particle filter system that is able to globally localize a mobile agent in a GPS-denied environment with only odometry and a 90 degree FOV camera, achieving similar localization accuracy as what WAG achieved with a panoramic camera and improving localization accuracy by a factor of 100 compared to a baseline vision transformer (ViT) approach. A video highlight that demonstrates ReWAG's convergence on a test path of several dozen kilometers is available at https://youtu.be/U_OBQrt8qCE.
abstract_zh: 跨视图地理定位是 GPS 的补充或替代，通过将从地面视图摄像机拍摄的图像与从卫星或飞机拍摄的俯视图像进行匹配，在搜索区域内定位代理。尽管地面图像和俯视图像之间的视点差异使得跨视图地理定位具有挑战性，但假设地面代理可以使用全景相机，已经取得了重大进展。例如，我们之前的工作（WAG）引入了搜索区域离散化、训练损失和粒子过滤器权重方面的变化，从而实现了城市规模的全景跨视图地理定位。然而，全景相机由于其复杂性和成本而没有在现有机器人平台中广泛使用。非全景交叉视图地理定位更适用于机器人技术，但也更具挑战性。本文提出了受限视场广域地理定位 (ReWAG)，这是一种跨视图地理定位方法，通过创建姿势感知嵌入并提供将粒子姿势合并到 Siamese 网络中的策略，将 WAG 推广到标准非全景地面摄像机。 ReWAG 是一种神经网络和粒子过滤系统，能够在 GPS 拒绝的环境中仅使用里程计和 90 度 FOV 相机对移动代理进行全局定位，实现与 WAG 使用全景相机实现的相似定位精度，并且与基线视觉变换器 (ViT) 方法相比，定位精度提高了 100 倍。演示 ReWAG 在数十公里测试路径上收敛的视频亮点可在 https://youtu.be/U_OBQrt8qCE 上观看。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于有限视角相机的跨视角地理定位方法ReWAG，用于在无GPS环境下实现移动代理的全局定位。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖全景相机实现跨视角定位，但全景相机成本高且复杂，难以在机器人平台普及，需开发适用于标准非全景相机的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过构建姿态感知嵌入并设计将粒子姿态整合到Siamese网络的策略，结合神经网络与粒子滤波器实现定位。
AI.result: 仅使用里程计和90度视角相机，定位精度与全景相机方法相当，较基线ViT模型提升100倍。
AI.conclusion: ReWAG验证了在无GPS环境下使用标准相机实现大规模地理定位的可行性，为机器人应用提供了有效方案。

ai_content.conclusion: ReWAG验证了在无GPS环境下使用标准相机实现大规模地理定位的可行性，为机器人应用提供了有效方案。

title: Ubiquitous smartphone based localization with door crossing detection
title_zh: 基于智能手机的无处不在的定位，具有门道检测功能
comment: ef:Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence, Volume 75, October 2018, Pages 88-93
comments: ef:Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence, Volume 75, October 2018, Pages 88-93
abstract: The positioning of users using their smartphones represents interesting service for various areas. Position of users can represent valuable information for various service providers. In industry 4.0 smart devices such as smartphone or tablet can help users to react faster in case of emergency. It can help to reduce reaction times for service workers and improve users orientation in the environment, or delegate work to the nearest available employee. In previous work we have described modular positioning system that is able to automatically select optimal positioning module based on available radio signals. In this paper we will focus on estimation of crossing between environments e.g. indoor and outdoor. The proposed algorithm is crucial for implementation of seamless positioning. Since both environments have specific demands not only on positioning solutions but also on maps and navigation algorithms. The proposed algorithm does not require deployment of new infrastructure and can be used on widely available smartphones. The algorithm was tested in real conditions by different users and using various smartphone devices to prove its performance under various conditions.
summary: The positioning of users using their smartphones represents interesting service for various areas. Position of users can represent valuable information for various service providers. In industry 4.0 smart devices such as smartphone or tablet can help users to react faster in case of emergency. It can help to reduce reaction times for service workers and improve users orientation in the environment, or delegate work to the nearest available employee. In previous work we have described modular positioning system that is able to automatically select optimal positioning module based on available radio signals. In this paper we will focus on estimation of crossing between environments e.g. indoor and outdoor. The proposed algorithm is crucial for implementation of seamless positioning. Since both environments have specific demands not only on positioning solutions but also on maps and navigation algorithms. The proposed algorithm does not require deployment of new infrastructure and can be used on widely available smartphones. The algorithm was tested in real conditions by different users and using various smartphone devices to prove its performance under various conditions.
abstract_zh: 使用智能手机的用户定位代表了各个领域的有趣服务。用户的位置对于各个服务提供商来说可以代表有价值的信息。在工业 4.0 中，智能手机或平板电脑等智能设备可以帮助用户在紧急情况下更快地做出反应。它可以帮助减少服务人员的反应时间并改善用户在环境中的定位，或将工作委派给最近的可用员工。在之前的工作中，我们描述了模块化定位系统，该系统能够根据可用的无线电信号自动选择最佳定位模块。在本文中，我们将重点关注环境之间交叉的估计，例如室内和室外。所提出的算法对于实现无缝定位至关重要。由于这两种环境不仅对定位解决方案有特定的要求，而且对地图和导航算法也有特定的要求。所提出的算法不需要部署新的基础设施，并且可以在广泛使用的智能手机上使用。该算法由不同用户在真实条件下进行测试，并使用各种智能手机设备来证明其在各种条件下的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于智能手机的无缝定位算法，用于检测用户在室内外环境间的穿越，无需部署新基础设施。
AI.motivation: 工业4.0场景下需要智能手机快速定位以提升应急响应效率，但室内外环境对定位技术、地图和导航算法要求不同，现有系统难以实现无缝切换。
AI.method: 基于智能手机现有传感器和信号，设计环境穿越检测算法，结合模块化定位系统自动选择适配的定位模块，通过多设备多用户实测验证性能。
AI.result: 算法在多种智能手机和真实场景测试中表现稳定，成功实现室内外定位无缝切换。
AI.conclusion: 该算法无需额外基础设施即可实现跨环境无缝定位，验证了智能手机在工业4.0场景中的实用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于智能手机的无缝定位算法，用于检测用户在室内外环境间的穿越，无需部署新基础设施。

search_text: Ubiquitous smartphone based localization with door crossing detection 基于智能手机的无处不在的定位，具有门道检测功能 The positioning of users using their smartphones represents interesting service for various areas. Position of users can represent valuable information for various service providers. In industry 4.0 smart devices such as smartphone or tablet can help users to react faster in case of emergency. It can help to reduce reaction times for service workers and improve users orientation in the environment, or delegate work to the nearest available employee. In previous work we have described modular positioning system that is able to automatically select optimal positioning module based on available radio signals. In this paper we will focus on estimation of crossing between environments e.g. indoor and outdoor. The proposed algorithm is crucial for implementation of seamless positioning. Since both environments have specific demands not only on positioning solutions but also on maps and navigation algorithms. The proposed algorithm does not require deployment of new infrastructure and can be used on widely available smartphones. The algorithm was tested in real conditions by different users and using various smartphone devices to prove its performance under various conditions. 使用智能手机的用户定位代表了各个领域的有趣服务。用户的位置对于各个服务提供商来说可以代表有价值的信息。在工业 4.0 中，智能手机或平板电脑等智能设备可以帮助用户在紧急情况下更快地做出反应。它可以帮助减少服务人员的反应时间并改善用户在环境中的定位，或将工作委派给最近的可用员工。在之前的工作中，我们描述了模块化定位系统，该系统能够根据可用的无线电信号自动选择最佳定位模块。在本文中，我们将重点关注环境之间交叉的估计，例如室内和室外。所提出的算法对于实现无缝定位至关重要。由于这两种环境不仅对定位解决方案有特定的要求，而且对地图和导航算法也有特定的要求。所提出的算法不需要部署新的基础设施，并且可以在广泛使用的智能手机上使用。该算法由不同用户在真实条件下进行测试，并使用各种智能手机设备来证明其在各种条件下的性能。 本文提出一种基于智能手机的无缝定位算法，用于检测用户在室内外环境间的穿越，无需部署新基础设施。 Jan Racko,Juraj Machaj,Peter Brida cs.HC,eess.SP

authors_text: Yuya Asano,Diane Litman,Mingzhi Yu,Nikki Lobczowski,Timothy Nokes-Malach,Adriana Kovashka,Erin Walker
title: Comparison of Lexical Alignment with a Teachable Robot in Human-Robot and Human-Human-Robot Interactions
title_zh: 人机交互和人机交互中可示教机器人的词汇对齐比较
abstract: Speakers build rapport in the process of aligning conversational behaviors with each other. Rapport engendered with a teachable agent while instructing domain material has been shown to promote learning. Past work on lexical alignment in the field of education suffers from limitations in both the measures used to quantify alignment and the types of interactions in which alignment with agents has been studied. In this paper, we apply alignment measures based on a data-driven notion of shared expressions (possibly composed of multiple words) and compare alignment in one-on-one human-robot (H-R) interactions with the H-R portions of collaborative human-human-robot (H-H-R) interactions. We find that students in the H-R setting align with a teachable robot more than in the H-H-R setting and that the relationship between lexical alignment and rapport is more complex than what is predicted by previous theoretical and empirical work.
summary: Speakers build rapport in the process of aligning conversational behaviors with each other. Rapport engendered with a teachable agent while instructing domain material has been shown to promote learning. Past work on lexical alignment in the field of education suffers from limitations in both the measures used to quantify alignment and the types of interactions in which alignment with agents has been studied. In this paper, we apply alignment measures based on a data-driven notion of shared expressions (possibly composed of multiple words) and compare alignment in one-on-one human-robot (H-R) interactions with the H-R portions of collaborative human-human-robot (H-H-R) interactions. We find that students in the H-R setting align with a teachable robot more than in the H-H-R setting and that the relationship between lexical alignment and rapport is more complex than what is predicted by previous theoretical and empirical work.
abstract_zh: 演讲者在调整彼此对话行为的过程中建立了融洽的关系。事实证明，在指导领域材料时与可教代理人建立的融洽关系可以促进学习。过去关于教育领域词汇对齐的工作在用于量化对齐的度量和研究与主体对齐的交互类型方面都受到限制。在本文中，我们应用基于共享表达（可能由多个单词组成）的数据驱动概念的对齐度量，并将一对一人机（H-R）交互中的对齐与人机协作（H-H-R）交互中的H-R部分进行比较。我们发现，在 H-R 设置中的学生比在 H-H-R 设置中更容易与可教机器人保持一致，并且词汇对齐和融洽关系之间的关系比以前的理论和实证工作所预测的更为复杂。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了人类与机器人（H-R）及人类-人类-机器人（H-H-R）互动中词汇对齐的差异，探讨了可教学机器人教学场景下的语言同步现象。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在量化对齐指标和互动类型上存在局限，需改进测量方法并研究不同互动场景下与代理人的对齐关系以提升教学效果。
AI.method: 采用基于数据驱动的共享表达式（多词组合）对齐指标，对比分析H-R与H-H-R互动中的词汇对齐差异。
AI.result: H-R场景下学生与机器人对齐程度高于H-H-R场景，且词汇对齐与默契的关系比既有理论预测更复杂。
AI.conclusion: 互动情境显著影响人类与可教学机器人的语言对齐，未来需结合动态互动背景深化对默契生成机制的研究。

ai_content.tldr: 本文比较了人类与机器人（H-R）及人类-人类-机器人（H-H-R）互动中词汇对齐的差异，探讨了可教学机器人教学场景下的语言同步现象。

title: Multiple-Choice Question Generation: Towards an Automated Assessment Framework
title_zh: 多项选择题生成：走向自动化评估框架
abstract: Automated question generation is an important approach to enable personalisation of English comprehension assessment. Recently, transformer-based pretrained language models have demonstrated the ability to produce appropriate questions from a context paragraph. Typically, these systems are evaluated against a reference set of manually generated questions using n-gram based metrics, or manual qualitative assessment. Here, we focus on a fully automated multiple-choice question generation (MCQG) system where both the question and possible answers must be generated from the context paragraph. Applying n-gram based approaches is challenging for this form of system as the reference set is unlikely to capture the full range of possible questions and answer options. Conversely manual assessment scales poorly and is expensive for MCQG system development. In this work, we propose a set of performance criteria that assess different aspects of the generated multiple-choice questions of interest. These qualities include: grammatical correctness, answerability, diversity and complexity. Initial systems for each of these metrics are described, and individually evaluated on standard multiple-choice reading comprehension corpora.
summary: Automated question generation is an important approach to enable personalisation of English comprehension assessment. Recently, transformer-based pretrained language models have demonstrated the ability to produce appropriate questions from a context paragraph. Typically, these systems are evaluated against a reference set of manually generated questions using n-gram based metrics, or manual qualitative assessment. Here, we focus on a fully automated multiple-choice question generation (MCQG) system where both the question and possible answers must be generated from the context paragraph. Applying n-gram based approaches is challenging for this form of system as the reference set is unlikely to capture the full range of possible questions and answer options. Conversely manual assessment scales poorly and is expensive for MCQG system development. In this work, we propose a set of performance criteria that assess different aspects of the generated multiple-choice questions of interest. These qualities include: grammatical correctness, answerability, diversity and complexity. Initial systems for each of these metrics are described, and individually evaluated on standard multiple-choice reading comprehension corpora.
abstract_zh: 自动问题生成是实现英语理解评估个性化的重要方法。最近，基于 Transformer 的预训练语言模型已经证明能够从上下文段落中生成适当的问题。通常，使用基于 n 元语法的指标或手动定性评估，根据手动生成的问题参考集对这些系统进行评估。在这里，我们重点关注全自动多项选择问题生成（MCQG）系统，其中问题和可能的答案都必须从上下文段落生成。对于这种形式的系统来说，应用基于 n-gram 的方法具有挑战性，因为参考集不太可能捕获所有可能的问题和答案选项。相反，手动评估的扩展性较差，并且对于 MCQG 系统开发来说成本高昂。在这项工作中，我们提出了一套性能标准，用于评估所生成的感兴趣的多项选择问题的不同方面。这些品质包括：语法正确性、可回答性、多样性和复杂性。描述了每个指标的初始系统，并在标准多项选择阅读理解语料库上单独进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全自动多选题生成系统，从上下文段落中自动生成问题及答案选项，并建立自动化评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有基于n-gram的评估方法难以覆盖多选题生成的多样性，而人工评估成本高且不适用于系统开发，需建立自动化评估标准。
AI.method: 设计包含语法正确性、可答性、多样性及复杂度等维度的评估指标，并在标准数据集上对各指标的初始系统进行验证。
AI.result: 验证了各评估指标在多选题生成任务中的有效性，为后续系统优化提供量化依据。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自动化评估框架可替代人工评估，推动多选题生成系统的开发与改进。

Initial systems for each of these metrics are described, and individually evaluated on standard multiple-choice reading comprehension corpora. 自动问题生成是实现英语理解评估个性化的重要方法。最近，基于 Transformer 的预训练语言模型已经证明能够从上下文段落中生成适当的问题。通常，使用基于 n 元语法的指标或手动定性评估，根据手动生成的问题参考集对这些系统进行评估。在这里，我们重点关注全自动多项选择问题生成（MCQG）系统，其中问题和可能的答案都必须从上下文段落生成。对于这种形式的系统来说，应用基于 n-gram 的方法具有挑战性，因为参考集不太可能捕获所有可能的问题和答案选项。相反，手动评估的扩展性较差，并且对于 MCQG 系统开发来说成本高昂。在这项工作中，我们提出了一套性能标准，用于评估所生成的感兴趣的多项选择问题的不同方面。这些品质包括：语法正确性、可回答性、多样性和复杂性。描述了每个指标的初始系统，并在标准多项选择阅读理解语料库上单独进行了评估。 本文提出一种全自动多选题生成系统，从上下文段落中自动生成问题及答案选项，并建立自动化评估框架。 Vatsal Raina,Mark Gales cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Walid Shalaby,Sejoon Oh,Amir Afsharinejad,Srijan Kumar,Xiquan Cui
title: M2TRec: Metadata-aware Multi-task Transformer for Large-scale and Cold-start free Session-based Recommendations
title_zh: M2TRec：用于大规模和无冷启动的基于会话的建议的元数据感知多任务转换器
comment: Accepted at the 16th ACM Conference on Recommender Systems (RecSys '22)
comments: Accepted at the 16th ACM Conference on Recommender Systems (RecSys '22)
abstract: Session-based recommender systems (SBRSs) have shown superior performance over conventional methods. However, they show limited scalability on large-scale industrial datasets since most models learn one embedding per item. This leads to a large memory requirement (of storing one vector per item) and poor performance on sparse sessions with cold-start or unpopular items. Using one public and one large industrial dataset, we experimentally show that state-of-the-art SBRSs have low performance on sparse sessions with sparse items. We propose M2TRec, a Metadata-aware Multi-task Transformer model for session-based recommendations. Our proposed method learns a transformation function from item metadata to embeddings, and is thus, item-ID free (i.e., does not need to learn one embedding per item). It integrates item metadata to learn shared representations of diverse item attributes. During inference, new or unpopular items will be assigned identical representations for the attributes they share with items previously observed during training, and thus will have similar representations with those items, enabling recommendations of even cold-start and sparse items. Additionally, M2TRec is trained in a multi-task setting to predict the next item in the session along with its primary category and subcategories. Our multi-task strategy makes the model converge faster and significantly improves the overall performance. Experimental results show significant performance gains using our proposed approach on sparse items on the two datasets.
summary: Session-based recommender systems (SBRSs) have shown superior performance over conventional methods. However, they show limited scalability on large-scale industrial datasets since most models learn one embedding per item. This leads to a large memory requirement (of storing one vector per item) and poor performance on sparse sessions with cold-start or unpopular items. Using one public and one large industrial dataset, we experimentally show that state-of-the-art SBRSs have low performance on sparse sessions with sparse items. We propose M2TRec, a Metadata-aware Multi-task Transformer model for session-based recommendations. Our proposed method learns a transformation function from item metadata to embeddings, and is thus, item-ID free (i.e., does not need to learn one embedding per item). It integrates item metadata to learn shared representations of diverse item attributes. During inference, new or unpopular items will be assigned identical representations for the attributes they share with items previously observed during training, and thus will have similar representations with those items, enabling recommendations of even cold-start and sparse items. Additionally, M2TRec is trained in a multi-task setting to predict the next item in the session along with its primary category and subcategories. Our multi-task strategy makes the model converge faster and significantly improves the overall performance. Experimental results show significant performance gains using our proposed approach on sparse items on the two datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于会话的推荐系统（SBRS）已显示出优于传统方法的性能。然而，它们在大规模工业数据集上的可扩展性有限，因为大多数模型都会学习每个项目的一个嵌入。这会导致大量内存需求（每个项目存储一个向量），并且在冷启动或不受欢迎的项目的稀疏会话上性能较差。使用一个公共数据集和一个大型工业数据集，我们通过实验表明，最先进的 SBRS 在具有稀疏项目的稀疏会话上性能较低。我们提出了 M2TRec，一种用于基于会话的推荐的元数据感知多任务 Transformer 模型。我们提出的方法学习从项目元数据到嵌入的转换函数，因此，项目 ID 无关（即不需要为每个项目学习一个嵌入）。它集成项目元数据来学习不同项目属性的共享表示。在推理过程中，新的或不受欢迎的项目将被分配与之前在训练期间观察到的项目共享的属性相同的表示，因此将与这些项目具有相似的表示，甚至可以推荐冷启动和稀疏的项目。此外，M2TRec 在多任务设置中进行训练，以预测会话中的下一个项目及其主要类别和子类别。我们的多任务策略使模型收敛得更快，并显着提高了整体性能。实验结果表明，使用我们提出的方法对两个数据集上的稀疏项进行显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于元数据的多任务Transformer模型M2TRec，解决大规模和冷启动场景下的会话推荐问题。
AI.motivation: 传统会话推荐系统因需为每个物品学习独立嵌入，导致内存消耗大且难以处理冷启动或稀疏会话中的新物品。
AI.method: 利用物品元数据学习属性到嵌入的转换函数，无需独立物品ID；通过多任务学习预测下一个物品及其类别，共享表示提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上显著提升稀疏物品的推荐性能，尤其在冷启动场景下表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: M2TRec通过元数据驱动的共享表示和多任务学习，有效解决了大规模会话推荐中的可扩展性和冷启动问题。

title: Expanding the Deployment Envelope of Behavior Prediction via Adaptive Meta-Learning
title_zh: 通过自适应元学习扩展行为预测的部署范围
abstract: Learning-based behavior prediction methods are increasingly being deployed in real-world autonomous systems, e.g., in fleets of self-driving vehicles, which are beginning to commercially operate in major cities across the world. Despite their advancements, however, the vast majority of prediction systems are specialized to a set of well-explored geographic regions or operational design domains, complicating deployment to additional cities, countries, or continents. Towards this end, we present a novel method for efficiently adapting behavior prediction models to new environments. Our approach leverages recent advances in meta-learning, specifically Bayesian regression, to augment existing behavior prediction models with an adaptive layer that enables efficient domain transfer via offline fine-tuning, online adaptation, or both. Experiments across multiple real-world datasets demonstrate that our method can efficiently adapt to a variety of unseen environments.
summary: Learning-based behavior prediction methods are increasingly being deployed in real-world autonomous systems, e.g., in fleets of self-driving vehicles, which are beginning to commercially operate in major cities across the world. Despite their advancements, however, the vast majority of prediction systems are specialized to a set of well-explored geographic regions or operational design domains, complicating deployment to additional cities, countries, or continents. Towards this end, we present a novel method for efficiently adapting behavior prediction models to new environments. Our approach leverages recent advances in meta-learning, specifically Bayesian regression, to augment existing behavior prediction models with an adaptive layer that enables efficient domain transfer via offline fine-tuning, online adaptation, or both. Experiments across multiple real-world datasets demonstrate that our method can efficiently adapt to a variety of unseen environments.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的行为预测方法越来越多地部署在现实世界的自主系统中，例如自动驾驶车队，这些系统已开始在世界各地的主要城市进行商业运营。然而，尽管取得了进步，绝大多数预测系统都专门针对一组经过充分探索的地理区域或操作设计领域，这使得向其他城市、国家或大陆的部署变得复杂。为此，我们提出了一种有效使行为预测模型适应新环境的新方法。我们的方法利用元学习（特别是贝叶斯回归）的最新进展，通过自适应层来增强现有的行为预测模型，该自适应层可以通过离线微调、在线适应或两者来实现高效的域转移。跨多个现实世界数据集的实验表明，我们的方法可以有效地适应各种看不见的环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过自适应元学习扩展行为预测部署范围的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前基于学习的行为预测方法大多局限于特定的地理区域或操作设计域，难以适应新的城市、国家或大陆的部署需求。
AI.method: 该方法利用元学习中的贝叶斯回归，在现有行为预测模型中增加一个自适应层，以实现通过离线微调、在线适应或两者结合的高效领域迁移。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，该方法能够高效适应各种未见过的环境。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法为行为预测模型在新环境中的快速适应提供了有效解决方案，有助于提升自动驾驶等系统的部署灵活性。

title: An Efficient Algorithm for Fair Multi-Agent Multi-Armed Bandit with Low Regret
title_zh: 一种低遗憾的公平多智能体多臂强盗的高效算法
abstract: Recently a multi-agent variant of the classical multi-armed bandit was proposed to tackle fairness issues in online learning. Inspired by a long line of work in social choice and economics, the goal is to optimize the Nash social welfare instead of the total utility. Unfortunately previous algorithms either are not efficient or achieve sub-optimal regret in terms of the number of rounds $T$. We propose a new efficient algorithm with lower regret than even previous inefficient ones. For $N$ agents, $K$ arms, and $T$ rounds, our approach has a regret bound of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{NKT} + NK)$. This is an improvement to the previous approach, which has regret bound of $\tilde{O}( \min(NK, \sqrt{N} K^{3/2})\sqrt{T})$. We also complement our efficient algorithm with an inefficient approach with $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{KT} + N^2K)$ regret. The experimental findings confirm the effectiveness of our efficient algorithm compared to the previous approaches.
summary: Recently a multi-agent variant of the classical multi-armed bandit was proposed to tackle fairness issues in online learning. Inspired by a long line of work in social choice and economics, the goal is to optimize the Nash social welfare instead of the total utility. Unfortunately previous algorithms either are not efficient or achieve sub-optimal regret in terms of the number of rounds $T$. We propose a new efficient algorithm with lower regret than even previous inefficient ones. For $N$ agents, $K$ arms, and $T$ rounds, our approach has a regret bound of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{NKT} + NK)$. This is an improvement to the previous approach, which has regret bound of $\tilde{O}( \min(NK, \sqrt{N} K^{3/2})\sqrt{T})$. We also complement our efficient algorithm with an inefficient approach with $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{KT} + N^2K)$ regret. The experimental findings confirm the effectiveness of our efficient algorithm compared to the previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 最近，提出了经典多臂老虎机的多智能体变体来解决在线学习中的公平问题。受到社会选择和经济学长期研究的启发，目标是优化纳什社会福利而不是总效用。不幸的是，以前的算法要么效率不高，要么在轮数 $T$ 方面实现次优遗憾。我们提出了一种新的高效算法，其遗憾程度甚至低于以前的低效算法。对于 $N$ 代理、$K$ 武器和 $T$ 回合，我们的方法的遗憾界限为 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{NKT} + NK)$。这是对之前方法的改进，遗憾界限为 $\tilde{O}( \min(NK, \sqrt{N} K^{3/2})\sqrt{T})$。我们还用$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{KT} + N^2K)$遗憾的低效方法来补充我们的高效算法。与以前的方法相比，实验结果证实了我们的高效算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效算法解决多智能体多臂老虎机中的公平性问题，通过优化纳什社会福利实现低遗憾。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在效率或遗憾表现上存在不足，需设计兼顾公平性与效率的多智能体在线学习方案。
AI.method: 基于社会选择理论设计新算法，通过协同探索机制优化纳什社会福利，结合拉格朗日松弛技术平衡公平与效率。
AI.result: 理论证明算法遗憾界为Õ(√(NKT)+NK)，优于先前Õ(min(NK,√N K³/²)√T)的算法，实验验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新算法在理论保证与实际效果上均优于现有方法，为公平在线学习提供更优解决方案。

search_text: An Efficient Algorithm for Fair Multi-Agent Multi-Armed Bandit with Low Regret 一种低遗憾的公平多智能体多臂强盗的高效算法 Recently a multi-agent variant of the classical multi-armed bandit was proposed to tackle fairness issues in online learning. Inspired by a long line of work in social choice and economics, the goal is to optimize the Nash social welfare instead of the total utility. Unfortunately previous algorithms either are not efficient or achieve sub-optimal regret in terms of the number of rounds $T$. We propose a new efficient algorithm with lower regret than even previous inefficient ones. For $N$ agents, $K$ arms, and $T$ rounds, our approach has a regret bound of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{NKT} + NK)$. This is an improvement to the previous approach, which has regret bound of $\tilde{O}( \min(NK, \sqrt{N} K^{3/2})\sqrt{T})$. We also complement our efficient algorithm with an inefficient approach with $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{KT} + N^2K)$ regret. The experimental findings confirm the effectiveness of our efficient algorithm compared to the previous approaches. 最近，提出了经典多臂老虎机的多智能体变体来解决在线学习中的公平问题。受到社会选择和经济学长期研究的启发，目标是优化纳什社会福利而不是总效用。不幸的是，以前的算法要么效率不高，要么在轮数 $T$ 方面实现次优遗憾。我们提出了一种新的高效算法，其遗憾程度甚至低于以前的低效算法。对于 $N$ 代理、$K$ 武器和 $T$ 回合，我们的方法的遗憾界限为 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{NKT} + NK)$。这是对之前方法的改进，遗憾界限为 $\tilde{O}( \min(NK, \sqrt{N} K^{3/2})\sqrt{T})$。我们还用$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{KT} + N^2K)$遗憾的低效方法来补充我们的高效算法。与以前的方法相比，实验结果证实了我们的高效算法的有效性。 本文提出一种高效算法解决多智能体多臂老虎机中的公平性问题，通过优化纳什社会福利实现低遗憾。 Matthew Jones,Huy Lê Nguyen,Thy Nguyen cs.LG,cs.DS

title: Explanations, Fairness, and Appropriate Reliance in Human-AI Decision-Making
title_zh: 人类人工智能决策的解释、公平性和适当依赖
comment: ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '24)
comments: ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '24)
abstract: In this work, we study the effects of feature-based explanations on distributive fairness of AI-assisted decisions, specifically focusing on the task of predicting occupations from short textual bios. We also investigate how any effects are mediated by humans' fairness perceptions and their reliance on AI recommendations. Our findings show that explanations influence fairness perceptions, which, in turn, relate to humans' tendency to adhere to AI recommendations. However, we see that such explanations do not enable humans to discern correct and incorrect AI recommendations. Instead, we show that they may affect reliance irrespective of the correctness of AI recommendations. Depending on which features an explanation highlights, this can foster or hinder distributive fairness: when explanations highlight features that are task-irrelevant and evidently associated with the sensitive attribute, this prompts overrides that counter AI recommendations that align with gender stereotypes. Meanwhile, if explanations appear task-relevant, this induces reliance behavior that reinforces stereotype-aligned errors. These results imply that feature-based explanations are not a reliable mechanism to improve distributive fairness.
summary: In this work, we study the effects of feature-based explanations on distributive fairness of AI-assisted decisions, specifically focusing on the task of predicting occupations from short textual bios. We also investigate how any effects are mediated by humans' fairness perceptions and their reliance on AI recommendations. Our findings show that explanations influence fairness perceptions, which, in turn, relate to humans' tendency to adhere to AI recommendations. However, we see that such explanations do not enable humans to discern correct and incorrect AI recommendations. Instead, we show that they may affect reliance irrespective of the correctness of AI recommendations. Depending on which features an explanation highlights, this can foster or hinder distributive fairness: when explanations highlight features that are task-irrelevant and evidently associated with the sensitive attribute, this prompts overrides that counter AI recommendations that align with gender stereotypes. Meanwhile, if explanations appear task-relevant, this induces reliance behavior that reinforces stereotype-aligned errors. These results imply that feature-based explanations are not a reliable mechanism to improve distributive fairness.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了基于特征的解释对人工智能辅助决策的分配公平性的影响，特别关注从简短的文本简历预测职业的任务。我们还研究了人类的公平观念及其对人工智能建议的依赖如何调节任何影响。我们的研究结果表明，解释会影响公平感，而公平感又与人类遵守人工智能建议的倾向有关。然而，我们发现这样的解释无法让人类辨别正确和错误的人工智能建议。相反，我们表明，无论人工智能建议的正确性如何，它们都可能会影响信任度。根据解释强调的特征，这可能会促进或阻碍分配公平：当解释强调与任务无关且明显与敏感属性相关的特征时，这会提示推翻与性别刻板印象相一致的人工智能建议。同时，如果解释看起来与任务相关，就会引发依赖行为，从而强化刻板印象错误。这些结果意味着基于特征的解释并不是提高分配公平性的可靠机制。

AI.tldr: 研究基于特征的解释对AI辅助决策分配公平性的影响，以及人类公平感知和依赖AI建议的关系。
AI.motivation: 探讨AI决策中解释对公平性的影响，以及人类如何基于解释调整对AI建议的依赖，以提升分配公平性。
AI.method: 通过预测职业的实验，利用短文本传记数据，分析特征解释如何影响人类的公平感知及对AI推荐的依赖。
AI.result: 解释影响公平感知，进而影响人类对AI建议的遵循，但无法识别推荐正确性。特征相关性决定解释对公平的促进或阻碍。
AI.conclusion: 基于特征的解释并非提升分配公平性的可靠机制，需谨慎设计解释内容以避免强化刻板印象。

authors_text: Noel Csomay-Shanklin,Victor D. Dorobantu,Aaron D. Ames
title: Nonlinear Model Predictive Control of a 3D Hopping Robot: Leveraging Lie Group Integrators for Dynamically Stable Behaviors
title_zh: 3D 跳跃机器人的非线性模型预测控制：利用李群积分器实现动态稳定行为
abstract: Achieving stable hopping has been a hallmark challenge in the field of dynamic legged locomotion. Controlled hopping is notably difficult due to extended periods of underactuation combined with very short ground phases wherein ground interactions must be modulated to regulate global state. In this work, we explore the use of hybrid nonlinear model predictive control paired with a low-level feedback controller in a multi-rate hierarchy to achieve dynamically stable motions on a 3D hopping robot. In order to demonstrate richer behaviors on the manifold of rotations, both the planning and feedback layers must be designed in a geometrically consistent fashion; therefore, we develop the necessary tools to employ Lie group integrators and appropriate feedback controllers. We experimentally demonstrate stable 3D hopping, as well as trajectory tracking and flipping in simulation.
summary: Achieving stable hopping has been a hallmark challenge in the field of dynamic legged locomotion. Controlled hopping is notably difficult due to extended periods of underactuation combined with very short ground phases wherein ground interactions must be modulated to regulate global state. In this work, we explore the use of hybrid nonlinear model predictive control paired with a low-level feedback controller in a multi-rate hierarchy to achieve dynamically stable motions on a 3D hopping robot. In order to demonstrate richer behaviors on the manifold of rotations, both the planning and feedback layers must be designed in a geometrically consistent fashion; therefore, we develop the necessary tools to employ Lie group integrators and appropriate feedback controllers. We experimentally demonstrate stable 3D hopping, as well as trajectory tracking and flipping in simulation.
abstract_zh: 实现稳定的跳跃一直是动态腿部运动领域的一个标志性挑战。由于长时间的欠驱动以及非常短的接地阶段，其中必须调节地面相互作用以调节全局状态，受控跳跃尤其困难。在这项工作中，我们探索使用混合非线性模型预测控制与多速率层次结构中的低级反馈控制器配合使用，以实现 3D 跳跃机器人的动态稳定运动。为了在多种旋转上展示更丰富的行为，规划层和反馈层必须以几何一致的方式设计；因此，我们开发了必要的工具来使用李群积分器和适当的反馈控制器。我们通过实验演示了稳定的 3D 跳跃，以及模拟中的轨迹跟踪和翻转。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了三维跳跃机器人的非线性模型预测控制方法，通过结合李群积分器实现动态稳定行为。
AI.motivation: 动态腿式机器人的稳定跳跃面临欠驱动和短暂地面接触的挑战，传统方法难以有效调节全局状态。
AI.method: 采用混合非线性模型预测控制与低级反馈控制器的多速率分层架构，并设计几何一致的李群积分器及反馈控制器。
AI.result: 实验验证了三维跳跃、轨迹跟踪及翻转等动态稳定行为的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过几何一致性设计实现了复杂运动控制，为腿式机器人动态行为提供了新思路。

We experimentally demonstrate stable 3D hopping, as well as trajectory tracking and flipping in simulation. 实现稳定的跳跃一直是动态腿部运动领域的一个标志性挑战。由于长时间的欠驱动以及非常短的接地阶段，其中必须调节地面相互作用以调节全局状态，受控跳跃尤其困难。在这项工作中，我们探索使用混合非线性模型预测控制与多速率层次结构中的低级反馈控制器配合使用，以实现 3D 跳跃机器人的动态稳定运动。为了在多种旋转上展示更丰富的行为，规划层和反馈层必须以几何一致的方式设计；因此，我们开发了必要的工具来使用李群积分器和适当的反馈控制器。我们通过实验演示了稳定的 3D 跳跃，以及模拟中的轨迹跟踪和翻转。 本文研究了三维跳跃机器人的非线性模型预测控制方法，通过结合李群积分器实现动态稳定行为。 Noel Csomay-Shanklin,Victor D. Dorobantu,Aaron D. Ames cs.RO

title: Solutions to preference manipulation in recommender systems require knowledge of meta-preferences
title_zh: 推荐系统中偏好操作的解决方案需要元偏好知识
comment: Accepted at the RecSys-22 5th FAccTRec Workshop on Responsible Recommendation held at the 16th ACM Conference on Recommender Systems, 3 pages, 1 figure
comments: Accepted at the RecSys-22 5th FAccTRec Workshop on Responsible Recommendation held at the 16th ACM Conference on Recommender Systems, 3 pages, 1 figure
abstract: Iterative machine learning algorithms used to power recommender systems often change people's preferences by trying to learn them. Further a recommender can better predict what a user will do by making its users more predictable. Some preference changes on the part of the user are self-induced and desired whether the recommender caused them or not. This paper proposes that solutions to preference manipulation in recommender systems must take into account certain meta-preferences (preferences over another preference) in order to respect the autonomy of the user and not be manipulative.
summary: Iterative machine learning algorithms used to power recommender systems often change people's preferences by trying to learn them. Further a recommender can better predict what a user will do by making its users more predictable. Some preference changes on the part of the user are self-induced and desired whether the recommender caused them or not. This paper proposes that solutions to preference manipulation in recommender systems must take into account certain meta-preferences (preferences over another preference) in order to respect the autonomy of the user and not be manipulative.
abstract_zh: 用于为推荐系统提供动力的迭代机器学习算法通常会通过尝试学习来改变人们的偏好。此外，推荐器可以通过使用户更加可预测来更好地预测用户将做什么。用户方面的一些偏好改变是自我引起的并且是期望的，无论推荐者是否引起它们。本文提出，推荐系统中偏好操纵的解决方案必须考虑某些元偏好（相对于其他偏好的偏好），以尊重用户的自主权而不是被操纵。

AI.tldr: 本文提出解决推荐系统中偏好操纵问题需要考虑元偏好，以尊重用户自主性。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统通过学习用户偏好可能改变其行为，现有方法未充分考虑用户自主性，需避免操纵性推荐。
AI.method: 通过引入元偏好（对偏好的偏好）框架，分析推荐系统如何平衡预测准确性与用户自主性。
AI.result: 论证了元偏好对解决推荐系统操纵问题的必要性，为设计非操纵性算法提供理论依据。
AI.conclusion: 推荐系统需整合元偏好机制，以确保在提升预测能力的同时维护用户自主决策权。
