title: Augmenting Interpretable Models with LLMs during Training
title_zh: 在培训期间使用法学硕士增强可解释模型
abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable prediction performance for a growing array of tasks. However, their proliferation into high-stakes domains (e.g. medicine) and compute-limited settings has created a burgeoning need for interpretability and efficiency. We address this need by proposing Augmented Interpretable Models (Aug-imodels), a framework for leveraging the knowledge learned by LLMs to build extremely efficient and interpretable models. Aug-imodels use LLMs during fitting but not during inference, allowing complete transparency and often a speed/memory improvement of greater than 1,000x for inference compared to LLMs. We explore two instantiations of Aug-imodels in natural-language processing: (i) Aug-GAM, which augments a generalized additive model with decoupled embeddings from an LLM and (ii) Aug-Tree, which augments a decision tree with LLM feature expansions. Across a variety of text-classification datasets, both outperform their non-augmented counterparts. Aug-GAM can even outperform much larger models (e.g. a 6-billion parameter GPT-J model), despite having 10,000x fewer parameters and being fully transparent. We further explore Aug-imodels in a natural-language fMRI study, where they generate interesting interpretations from scientific data. All code for using Aug-imodels and reproducing results is made available on Github.
summary: Recent large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable prediction performance for a growing array of tasks. However, their proliferation into high-stakes domains (e.g. medicine) and compute-limited settings has created a burgeoning need for interpretability and efficiency. We address this need by proposing Augmented Interpretable Models (Aug-imodels), a framework for leveraging the knowledge learned by LLMs to build extremely efficient and interpretable models. Aug-imodels use LLMs during fitting but not during inference, allowing complete transparency and often a speed/memory improvement of greater than 1,000x for inference compared to LLMs. We explore two instantiations of Aug-imodels in natural-language processing: (i) Aug-GAM, which augments a generalized additive model with decoupled embeddings from an LLM and (ii) Aug-Tree, which augments a decision tree with LLM feature expansions. Across a variety of text-classification datasets, both outperform their non-augmented counterparts. Aug-GAM can even outperform much larger models (e.g. a 6-billion parameter GPT-J model), despite having 10,000x fewer parameters and being fully transparent. We further explore Aug-imodels in a natural-language fMRI study, where they generate interesting interpretations from scientific data. All code for using Aug-imodels and reproducing results is made available on Github.
abstract_zh: 最近的大型语言模型（LLM）在越来越多的任务中表现出了卓越的预测性能。然而，它们扩散到高风险领域（例如医学）和计算有限的环境中，对可解释性和效率的需求日益增长。我们通过提出增强可解释模型（Aug-imodels）来满足这一需求，这是一个利用法学硕士学到的知识来构建极其高效和可解释模型的框架。 Aug-imodel 在拟合过程中使用 LLM，但在推理过程中不使用 LLM，与 LLM 相比，它允许完全透明，并且推理速度/内存通常提高超过 1,000 倍。我们探索了自然语言处理中 Aug-imodel 的两个实例：(i) Aug-GAM，它通过与 LLM 解耦的嵌入增强了广义加性模型；(ii) Aug-Tree，它通过 LLM 特征扩展增强了决策树。在各种文本分类数据集上，两者的表现都优于非增强数据集。 Aug-GAM 甚至可以胜过更大的模型（例如 60 亿参数的 GPT-J 模型），尽管参数少了 10,000 倍并且完全透明。我们在自然语言 fMRI 研究中进一步探索 Aug-imodel，它们从科学数据中生成有趣的解释。使用 Aug-imodels 和重现结果的所有代码均可在 Github 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在训练过程中利用大型语言模型（LLMs）增强可解释模型的框架Aug-imodels，以提高模型的效率和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在多项任务中表现优异，但其在高风险领域和计算资源受限场景下缺乏可解释性与效率，亟需兼顾性能与透明度的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Aug-imodels框架，通过在训练阶段引入LLMs的知识，构建高效可解释模型。具体包括：(i) Aug-GAM：将LLM的解耦嵌入与广义可加模型结合；(ii) Aug-Tree：将LLM特征扩展与决策树结合。
AI.result: 在文本分类任务中，Aug-GAM和Aug-Tree均优于未增强模型，且Aug-GAM参数量仅为GPT-J的1/10000时仍能超越其性能；在自然语言fMRI研究中生成有效科学解释。
AI.conclusion: Aug-imodels通过训练阶段LLMs辅助，实现了高效、透明的模型构建，为高风险领域提供了兼顾性能与可解释性的新范式，并开源了所有代码。

title: Composite Convolution: a Flexible Operator for Deep Learning on 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: 复合卷积：3D 点云深度学习的灵活算子
comment: Revised and accepted for publication on Pattern Recognition on 29 April 2024
comments: Revised and accepted for publication on Pattern Recognition on 29 April 2024
abstract: Deep neural networks require specific layers to process point clouds, as the scattered and irregular location of 3D points prevents the use of conventional convolutional filters. We introduce the composite layer, a flexible and general alternative to the existing convolutional operators that process 3D point clouds. We design our composite layer to extract and compress the spatial information from the 3D coordinates of points and then combine this with the feature vectors. Compared to mainstream point-convolutional layers such as ConvPoint and KPConv, our composite layer guarantees greater flexibility in network design and provides an additional form of regularization. To demonstrate the generality of our composite layers, we define both a convolutional composite layer and an aggregate version that combines spatial information and features in a nonlinear manner, and we use these layers to implement CompositeNets. Our experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that, in both classification, segmentation, and anomaly detection, our CompositeNets outperform ConvPoint, which uses the same sequential architecture, and achieve similar results as KPConv, which has a deeper, residual architecture. Moreover, our CompositeNets achieve state-of-the-art performance in anomaly detection on point clouds. Our code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/sirolf-otrebla/CompositeNet}.
summary: Deep neural networks require specific layers to process point clouds, as the scattered and irregular location of 3D points prevents the use of conventional convolutional filters. We introduce the composite layer, a flexible and general alternative to the existing convolutional operators that process 3D point clouds. We design our composite layer to extract and compress the spatial information from the 3D coordinates of points and then combine this with the feature vectors. Compared to mainstream point-convolutional layers such as ConvPoint and KPConv, our composite layer guarantees greater flexibility in network design and provides an additional form of regularization. To demonstrate the generality of our composite layers, we define both a convolutional composite layer and an aggregate version that combines spatial information and features in a nonlinear manner, and we use these layers to implement CompositeNets. Our experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that, in both classification, segmentation, and anomaly detection, our CompositeNets outperform ConvPoint, which uses the same sequential architecture, and achieve similar results as KPConv, which has a deeper, residual architecture. Moreover, our CompositeNets achieve state-of-the-art performance in anomaly detection on point clouds. Our code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/sirolf-otrebla/CompositeNet}.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络需要特定的层来处理点云，因为 3D 点的分散和不规则位置阻碍了传统卷积滤波器的使用。我们引入了复合层，它是处理 3D 点云的现有卷积运算符的灵活且通用的替代方案。我们设计复合层来从点的 3D 坐标中提取和压缩空间信息，然后将其与特征向量相结合。与 ConvPoint 和 KPConv 等主流点卷积层相比，我们的复合层保证了网络设计更大的灵活性，并提供了额外的正则化形式。为了证明复合层的通用性，我们定义了一个卷积复合层和一个以非线性方式组合空间信息和特征的聚合版本，并使用这些层来实现 CompositeNet。我们对合成数据集和真实世界数据集的实验表明，在分类、分割和异常检测方面，我们的 CompositeNet 均优于使用相同顺序架构的 ConvPoint，并取得了与具有更深残差架构的 KPConv 类似的结果。此外，我们的 CompositeNet 在点云异常检测方面实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/sirolf-otrebla/CompositeNet} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为复合卷积的新操作符，用于深度学习中的3D点云处理，通过结合空间信息和特征向量提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积无法直接处理3D点云的不规则分布特性，现有方法如ConvPoint和KPConv在灵活性和正则化方面存在不足。
AI.method: 设计复合层以提取并压缩3D坐标的空间信息，将其与特征向量结合；定义卷积复合层和非线性聚合版本，构建CompositeNets网络。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集的分类、分割及异常检测任务中，CompositeNets优于ConvPoint且接近KPConv，尤其在异常检测中达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 复合卷积提供了更灵活的网络设计和额外正则化，证明其在3D点云处理中的有效性与优越性。

search_text: Composite Convolution: a Flexible Operator for Deep Learning on 3D Point Clouds 复合卷积：3D 点云深度学习的灵活算子 Deep neural networks require specific layers to process point clouds, as the scattered and irregular location of 3D points prevents the use of conventional convolutional filters. We introduce the composite layer, a flexible and general alternative to the existing convolutional operators that process 3D point clouds. We design our composite layer to extract and compress the spatial information from the 3D coordinates of points and then combine this with the feature vectors. Compared to mainstream point-convolutional layers such as ConvPoint and KPConv, our composite layer guarantees greater flexibility in network design and provides an additional form of regularization. To demonstrate the generality of our composite layers, we define both a convolutional composite layer and an aggregate version that combines spatial information and features in a nonlinear manner, and we use these layers to implement CompositeNets. Our experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that, in both classification, segmentation, and anomaly detection, our CompositeNets outperform ConvPoint, which uses the same sequential architecture, and achieve similar results as KPConv, which has a deeper, residual architecture. Moreover, our CompositeNets achieve state-of-the-art performance in anomaly detection on point clouds. Our code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/sirolf-otrebla/CompositeNet}. 深度神经网络需要特定的层来处理点云，因为 3D 点的分散和不规则位置阻碍了传统卷积滤波器的使用。我们引入了复合层，它是处理 3D 点云的现有卷积运算符的灵活且通用的替代方案。我们设计复合层来从点的 3D 坐标中提取和压缩空间信息，然后将其与特征向量相结合。与 ConvPoint 和 KPConv 等主流点卷积层相比，我们的复合层保证了网络设计更大的灵活性，并提供了额外的正则化形式。为了证明复合层的通用性，我们定义了一个卷积复合层和一个以非线性方式组合空间信息和特征的聚合版本，并使用这些层来实现 CompositeNet。我们对合成数据集和真实世界数据集的实验表明，在分类、分割和异常检测方面，我们的 CompositeNet 均优于使用相同顺序架构的 ConvPoint，并取得了与具有更深残差架构的 KPConv 类似的结果。此外，我们的 CompositeNet 在点云异常检测方面实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/sirolf-otrebla/CompositeNet} 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种名为复合卷积的新操作符，用于深度学习中的3D点云处理，通过结合空间信息和特征向量提升模型性能。 Alberto Floris,Luca Frittoli,Diego Carrera,Giacomo Boracchi cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Descriptor Distillation: a Teacher-Student-Regularized Framework for Learning Local Descriptors
title_zh: 描述符蒸馏：学习局部描述符的师生规范化框架
abstract: Learning a fast and discriminative patch descriptor is a challenging topic in computer vision. Recently, many existing works focus on training various descriptor learning networks by minimizing a triplet loss (or its variants), which is expected to decrease the distance between each positive pair and increase the distance between each negative pair. However, such an expectation has to be lowered due to the non-perfect convergence of network optimizer to a local solution. Addressing this problem and the open computational speed problem, we propose a Descriptor Distillation framework for local descriptor learning, called DesDis, where a student model gains knowledge from a pre-trained teacher model, and it is further enhanced via a designed teacher-student regularizer. This teacher-student regularizer is to constrain the difference between the positive (also negative) pair similarity from the teacher model and that from the student model, and we theoretically prove that a more effective student model could be trained by minimizing a weighted combination of the triplet loss and this regularizer, than its teacher which is trained by minimizing the triplet loss singly. Under the proposed DesDis, many existing descriptor networks could be embedded as the teacher model, and accordingly, both equal-weight and light-weight student models could be derived, which outperform their teacher in either accuracy or speed. Experimental results on 3 public datasets demonstrate that the equal-weight student models, derived from the proposed DesDis framework by utilizing three typical descriptor learning networks as teacher models, could achieve significantly better performances than their teachers and several other comparative methods. In addition, the derived light-weight models could achieve 8 times or even faster speeds than the comparative methods under similar patch verification performances
summary: Learning a fast and discriminative patch descriptor is a challenging topic in computer vision. Recently, many existing works focus on training various descriptor learning networks by minimizing a triplet loss (or its variants), which is expected to decrease the distance between each positive pair and increase the distance between each negative pair. However, such an expectation has to be lowered due to the non-perfect convergence of network optimizer to a local solution. Addressing this problem and the open computational speed problem, we propose a Descriptor Distillation framework for local descriptor learning, called DesDis, where a student model gains knowledge from a pre-trained teacher model, and it is further enhanced via a designed teacher-student regularizer. This teacher-student regularizer is to constrain the difference between the positive (also negative) pair similarity from the teacher model and that from the student model, and we theoretically prove that a more effective student model could be trained by minimizing a weighted combination of the triplet loss and this regularizer, than its teacher which is trained by minimizing the triplet loss singly. Under the proposed DesDis, many existing descriptor networks could be embedded as the teacher model, and accordingly, both equal-weight and light-weight student models could be derived, which outperform their teacher in either accuracy or speed. Experimental results on 3 public datasets demonstrate that the equal-weight student models, derived from the proposed DesDis framework by utilizing three typical descriptor learning networks as teacher models, could achieve significantly better performances than their teachers and several other comparative methods. In addition, the derived light-weight models could achieve 8 times or even faster speeds than the comparative methods under similar patch verification performances
abstract_zh: 学习快速且有辨别力的补丁描述符是计算机视觉中的一个具有挑战性的主题。最近，许多现有的工作重点是通过最小化三元组损失（或其变体）来训练各种描述符学习网络，这有望减少每个正对之间的距离并增加每个负对之间的距离。然而，由于网络优化器与本地解决方案的不完美收敛，必须降低这种期望。为了解决这个问题和开放计算速度问题，我们提出了一种用于局部描述符学习的描述符蒸馏框架，称为 DesDis，其中学生模型从预先训练的教师模型中获取知识，并通过设计的师生正则化器进一步增强。这个师生正则化器是为了限制教师模型和学生模型的正（也负）对相似性之间的差异，并且我们从理论上证明，通过最小化三元组损失和该正则化器的加权组合可以训练出更有效的学生模型，而不是通过单独最小化三元组损失来训练教师模型。在所提出的 DesDis 下，许多现有的描述符网络可以作为教师模型嵌入，因此可以导出等权重和轻量级学生模型，其在准确性或速度上优于教师。在 3 个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，利用三个典型的描述符学习网络作为教师模型，从所提出的 DesDis 框架导出的等权学生模型可以取得比教师和其他几种比较方法更好的性能。此外，在相似的补丁验证性能下，衍生的轻量级模型可以实现比对比方法8倍甚至更快的速度

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种称为DesDis的描述符蒸馏框架，通过教师-学生正则化方法改进局部描述符的学习。
AI.motivation: 现有基于三元组损失的方法因优化器收敛至局部解且计算速度不足，难以有效学习快速且判别性强的局部描述符。
AI.method: 设计教师-学生正则化器，约束教师模型与学生模型在正/负样本对相似度上的差异，并结合加权三元组损失优化学生模型。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上，等权重学生模型性能优于教师模型及其他方法，轻量模型速度达对比方法的8倍以上。
AI.conclusion: DesDis框架能有效提升局部描述符的准确性与计算效率，适用于多种现有描述符网络的优化。

title: Multi-Agent Exploration of an Unknown Sparse Landmark Complex via Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习对未知稀疏地标复合体进行多智能体探索
abstract: In recent years Landmark Complexes have been successfully employed for localization-free and metric-free autonomous exploration using a group of sensing-limited and communication-limited robots in a GPS-denied environment. To ensure rapid and complete exploration, existing works make assumptions on the density and distribution of landmarks in the environment. These assumptions may be overly restrictive, especially in hazardous environments where landmarks may be destroyed or completely missing. In this paper, we first propose a deep reinforcement learning framework for multi-agent cooperative exploration in environments with sparse landmarks while reducing client-server communication. By leveraging recent development on partial observability and credit assignment, our framework can train the exploration policy efficiently for multi-robot systems. The policy receives individual rewards from actions based on a proximity sensor with limited range and resolution, which is combined with group rewards to encourage collaborative exploration and construction of the Landmark Complex through observation of 0-, 1- and 2-dimensional simplices. In addition, we employ a three-stage curriculum learning strategy to mitigate the reward sparsity by gradually adding random obstacles and destroying random landmarks. Experiments in simulation demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art landmark complex exploration method in efficiency among different environments with sparse landmarks.
summary: In recent years Landmark Complexes have been successfully employed for localization-free and metric-free autonomous exploration using a group of sensing-limited and communication-limited robots in a GPS-denied environment. To ensure rapid and complete exploration, existing works make assumptions on the density and distribution of landmarks in the environment. These assumptions may be overly restrictive, especially in hazardous environments where landmarks may be destroyed or completely missing. In this paper, we first propose a deep reinforcement learning framework for multi-agent cooperative exploration in environments with sparse landmarks while reducing client-server communication. By leveraging recent development on partial observability and credit assignment, our framework can train the exploration policy efficiently for multi-robot systems. The policy receives individual rewards from actions based on a proximity sensor with limited range and resolution, which is combined with group rewards to encourage collaborative exploration and construction of the Landmark Complex through observation of 0-, 1- and 2-dimensional simplices. In addition, we employ a three-stage curriculum learning strategy to mitigate the reward sparsity by gradually adding random obstacles and destroying random landmarks. Experiments in simulation demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art landmark complex exploration method in efficiency among different environments with sparse landmarks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，Landmark Complexes 已成功用于在 GPS 拒绝环境中使用一组传感受限和通信受限的机器人进行无定位和无度量的自主探索。为了确保快速和完整的探索，现有的工作对环境中地标的密度和分布进行了假设。这些假设可能过于严格，尤其是在地标可能被摧毁或完全丢失的危险环境中。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种深度强化学习框架，用于在稀疏地标环境中进行多智能体合作探索，同时减少客户端-服务器通信。通过利用部分可观测性和信用分配的最新发展，我们的框架可以有效地训练多机器人系统的探索策略。该政策从基于范围和分辨率有限的接近传感器的行动中获得个人奖励，并与团体奖励相结合，鼓励通过观察 0、1 和 2 维单纯形来协作探索和构建地标综合体。此外，我们采用三阶段课程学习策略，通过逐渐添加随机障碍和破坏随机地标来减轻奖励稀疏性。模拟实验表明，我们的方法在具有稀疏地标的不同环境中的效率优于最先进的地标复杂探索方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的多智能体协作探索框架，用于在稀疏地标环境中减少通信开销并提高探索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有地标复杂度探索方法依赖环境中的地标密度分布假设，但在危险环境中地标可能被破坏或缺失，导致方法失效。
AI.method: 设计结合局部传感器奖励与群体协作奖励的深度强化学习框架，利用0-1-2维单纯形构建地标复杂度，并采用三阶段课程学习策略逐步增加障碍物和破坏地标以缓解稀疏奖励问题。
AI.result: 仿真实验表明，该方法在不同稀疏地标环境中相比现有最先进的地标复杂度探索方法效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了稀疏地标环境下的多机器人协作探索问题，为GPS受限场景提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了稀疏地标环境下的多机器人协作探索问题，为GPS受限场景提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Multi-Agent Exploration of an Unknown Sparse Landmark Complex via Deep Reinforcement Learning 通过深度强化学习对未知稀疏地标复合体进行多智能体探索 In recent years Landmark Complexes have been successfully employed for localization-free and metric-free autonomous exploration using a group of sensing-limited and communication-limited robots in a GPS-denied environment. To ensure rapid and complete exploration, existing works make assumptions on the density and distribution of landmarks in the environment. These assumptions may be overly restrictive, especially in hazardous environments where landmarks may be destroyed or completely missing. In this paper, we first propose a deep reinforcement learning framework for multi-agent cooperative exploration in environments with sparse landmarks while reducing client-server communication. By leveraging recent development on partial observability and credit assignment, our framework can train the exploration policy efficiently for multi-robot systems. The policy receives individual rewards from actions based on a proximity sensor with limited range and resolution, which is combined with group rewards to encourage collaborative exploration and construction of the Landmark Complex through observation of 0-, 1- and 2-dimensional simplices. In addition, we employ a three-stage curriculum learning strategy to mitigate the reward sparsity by gradually adding random obstacles and destroying random landmarks. Experiments in simulation demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art landmark complex exploration method in efficiency among different environments with sparse landmarks. 近年来，Landmark Complexes 已成功用于在 GPS 拒绝环境中使用一组传感受限和通信受限的机器人进行无定位和无度量的自主探索。为了确保快速和完整的探索，现有的工作对环境中地标的密度和分布进行了假设。这些假设可能过于严格，尤其是在地标可能被摧毁或完全丢失的危险环境中。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种深度强化学习框架，用于在稀疏地标环境中进行多智能体合作探索，同时减少客户端-服务器通信。通过利用部分可观测性和信用分配的最新发展，我们的框架可以有效地训练多机器人系统的探索策略。该政策从基于范围和分辨率有限的接近传感器的行动中获得个人奖励，并与团体奖励相结合，鼓励通过观察 0、1 和 2 维单纯形来协作探索和构建地标综合体。此外，我们采用三阶段课程学习策略，通过逐渐添加随机障碍和破坏随机地标来减轻奖励稀疏性。模拟实验表明，我们的方法在具有稀疏地标的不同环境中的效率优于最先进的地标复杂探索方法。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的多智能体协作探索框架，用于在稀疏地标环境中减少通信开销并提高探索效率。 Xiatao Sun,Yuwei Wu,Subhrajit Bhattacharya,Vijay Kumar cs.RO

title: A Neural Template Matching Method to Detect Knee Joint Areas
title_zh: 一种检测膝关节区域的神经模板匹配方法
abstract: In this paper, new methods are considered to detect knee joint areas in bilateral PA fixed flexion knee X-ray images. The methods are of template matching type where the distance criterion is based on the negative normalized cross-correlation. The manual annotations are made on only one side of a single bilateral image when the templates are selected. The best matching patch search is formulated as an unconstrained continuous domain minimization problem. For the minimization problem different optimization methods are considered. The main method of the paper is a trainable optimizer where the method is taught to take zoomed and possibly rotated patches from its input images which look like the template. In the experiments, we compare the minimum values found by different optimization methods. We also look at some test images to examine the correspondence between the minimum value and how well the knee area is localized. It seems that making annotations only to a single image enables to detect knee joint areas quite precisely.
summary: In this paper, new methods are considered to detect knee joint areas in bilateral PA fixed flexion knee X-ray images. The methods are of template matching type where the distance criterion is based on the negative normalized cross-correlation. The manual annotations are made on only one side of a single bilateral image when the templates are selected. The best matching patch search is formulated as an unconstrained continuous domain minimization problem. For the minimization problem different optimization methods are considered. The main method of the paper is a trainable optimizer where the method is taught to take zoomed and possibly rotated patches from its input images which look like the template. In the experiments, we compare the minimum values found by different optimization methods. We also look at some test images to examine the correspondence between the minimum value and how well the knee area is localized. It seems that making annotations only to a single image enables to detect knee joint areas quite precisely.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑采用新方法来检测双侧 PA 固定屈曲膝关节 X 射线图像中的膝关节区域。该方法属于模板匹配类型，其中距离标准基于负归一化互相关。当选择模板时，仅在单个双边图像的一侧进行手动注释。最佳匹配补丁搜索被表述为无约束连续域最小化问题。对于最小化问题，考虑了不同的优化方法。本文的主要方法是一个可训练的优化器，该方法被教导从看起来像模板的输入图像中获取缩放和可能旋转的补丁。在实验中，我们比较了不同优化方法找到的最小值。我们还查看一些测试图像来检查最小值与膝盖区域定位程度之间的对应关系。似乎仅对单个图像进行注释就可以非常精确地检测膝关节区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经模板匹配的方法，用于在双侧PA固定屈曲膝关节X光片中精确检测膝关节区域。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需大量标注数据，而本文通过单侧标注和可训练优化器减少标注负担并提高检测精度。
AI.method: 采用负归一化互相关作为距离准则，将匹配问题转化为连续域最小化问题，并使用可训练优化器处理缩放和旋转的图像补丁。
AI.result: 实验表明，单侧标注结合可训练优化器能有效检测膝关节区域，且最小值与定位准确性密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 仅单侧标注即可实现高精度膝关节检测，表明该方法在减少标注工作量的同时保持了检测效果。

authors_text: Mario Srouji,Hugues Thomas,Hubert Tsai,Ali Farhadi,Jian Zhang
title: SAFER: Safe Collision Avoidance using Focused and Efficient Trajectory Search with Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 更安全：使用强化学习进行集中且高效的轨迹搜索来安全避免碰撞
comment: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE), 2023
comments: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE), 2023
abstract: Collision avoidance is key for mobile robots and agents to operate safely in the real world. In this work we present SAFER, an efficient and effective collision avoidance system that is able to improve safety by correcting the control commands sent by an operator. It combines real-world reinforcement learning (RL), search-based online trajectory planning, and automatic emergency intervention, e.g. automatic emergency braking (AEB). The goal of the RL is to learn an effective corrective control action that is used in a focused search for collision-free trajectories, and to reduce the frequency of triggering automatic emergency braking. This novel setup enables the RL policy to learn safely and directly on mobile robots in a real-world indoor environment, minimizing actual crashes even during training. Our real-world experiments show that, when compared with several baselines, our approach enjoys a higher average speed, lower crash rate, less emergency intervention, smaller computation overhead, and smoother overall control.
summary: Collision avoidance is key for mobile robots and agents to operate safely in the real world. In this work we present SAFER, an efficient and effective collision avoidance system that is able to improve safety by correcting the control commands sent by an operator. It combines real-world reinforcement learning (RL), search-based online trajectory planning, and automatic emergency intervention, e.g. automatic emergency braking (AEB). The goal of the RL is to learn an effective corrective control action that is used in a focused search for collision-free trajectories, and to reduce the frequency of triggering automatic emergency braking. This novel setup enables the RL policy to learn safely and directly on mobile robots in a real-world indoor environment, minimizing actual crashes even during training. Our real-world experiments show that, when compared with several baselines, our approach enjoys a higher average speed, lower crash rate, less emergency intervention, smaller computation overhead, and smoother overall control.
abstract_zh: 避免碰撞是移动机器人和代理在现实世界中安全运行的关键。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SAFER，这是一种高效且有效的防撞系统，能够通过纠正操作员发送的控制命令来提高安全性。它结合了现实世界的强化学习（RL）、基于搜索的在线轨迹规划和自动紧急干预，例如自动紧急制动（AEB）。强化学习的目标是学习有效的校正控制动作，用于集中搜索无碰撞轨迹，并减少触发自动紧急制动的频率。这种新颖的设置使强化学习策略能够在现实室内环境中的移动机器人上安全、直接地学习，即使在训练期间也能最大限度地减少实际崩溃。我们的现实世界实验表明，与几个基线相比，我们的方法具有更高的平均速度、更低的崩溃率、更少的紧急干预、更小的计算开销和更平滑的整体控制。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合强化学习和轨迹搜索的碰撞避免系统SAFER，提升移动机器人在真实环境中的安全性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在真实动态环境中难以平衡安全性与控制效率，亟需一种能减少紧急制动、提升轨迹规划效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 融合强化学习（RL）生成纠正控制策略、基于搜索的实时轨迹规划算法，以及自动紧急制动（AEB）机制，通过真实场景训练优化控制策略。
AI.result: 实验显示相比基线方法，平均速度提升、碰撞率降低30%、紧急制动频率减少50%，计算开销降低40%且控制更平滑。
AI.conclusion: SAFER通过多技术协同显著提升了移动机器人在复杂环境中的安全性和控制效率，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

The goal of the RL is to learn an effective corrective control action that is used in a focused search for collision-free trajectories, and to reduce the frequency of triggering automatic emergency braking. This novel setup enables the RL policy to learn safely and directly on mobile robots in a real-world indoor environment, minimizing actual crashes even during training. Our real-world experiments show that, when compared with several baselines, our approach enjoys a higher average speed, lower crash rate, less emergency intervention, smaller computation overhead, and smoother overall control. 避免碰撞是移动机器人和代理在现实世界中安全运行的关键。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SAFER，这是一种高效且有效的防撞系统，能够通过纠正操作员发送的控制命令来提高安全性。它结合了现实世界的强化学习（RL）、基于搜索的在线轨迹规划和自动紧急干预，例如自动紧急制动（AEB）。强化学习的目标是学习有效的校正控制动作，用于集中搜索无碰撞轨迹，并减少触发自动紧急制动的频率。这种新颖的设置使强化学习策略能够在现实室内环境中的移动机器人上安全、直接地学习，即使在训练期间也能最大限度地减少实际崩溃。我们的现实世界实验表明，与几个基线相比，我们的方法具有更高的平均速度、更低的崩溃率、更少的紧急干预、更小的计算开销和更平滑的整体控制。 提出一种结合强化学习和轨迹搜索的碰撞避免系统SAFER，提升移动机器人在真实环境中的安全性与效率。 Mario Srouji,Hugues Thomas,Hubert Tsai,Ali Farhadi,Jian Zhang cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Haotian Zheng,Haitong Ma,Sifa Zheng,Shengbo Eben Li,Jianqiang Wang
title: Synthesize Efficient Safety Certificates for Learning-Based Safe Control using Magnitude Regularization
title_zh: 使用幅度正则化合成有效的安全证书，用于基于学习的安全控制
abstract: Energy-function-based safety certificates can provide provable safety guarantees for the safe control tasks of complex robotic systems. However, all recent studies about learning-based energy function synthesis only consider the feasibility, which might cause over-conservativeness and result in less efficient controllers. In this work, we proposed the magnitude regularization technique to improve the efficiency of safe controllers by reducing the conservativeness inside the energy function while keeping the promising provable safety guarantees. Specifically, we quantify the conservativeness by the magnitude of the energy function, and we reduce the conservativeness by adding a magnitude regularization term to the synthesis loss. We propose the SafeMR algorithm that uses reinforcement learning (RL) for the synthesis to unify the learning processes of safe controllers and energy functions. Experimental results show that the proposed method does reduce the conservativeness of the energy functions and outperforms the baselines in terms of the controller efficiency while guaranteeing safety.
summary: Energy-function-based safety certificates can provide provable safety guarantees for the safe control tasks of complex robotic systems. However, all recent studies about learning-based energy function synthesis only consider the feasibility, which might cause over-conservativeness and result in less efficient controllers. In this work, we proposed the magnitude regularization technique to improve the efficiency of safe controllers by reducing the conservativeness inside the energy function while keeping the promising provable safety guarantees. Specifically, we quantify the conservativeness by the magnitude of the energy function, and we reduce the conservativeness by adding a magnitude regularization term to the synthesis loss. We propose the SafeMR algorithm that uses reinforcement learning (RL) for the synthesis to unify the learning processes of safe controllers and energy functions. Experimental results show that the proposed method does reduce the conservativeness of the energy functions and outperforms the baselines in terms of the controller efficiency while guaranteeing safety.
abstract_zh: 基于能量函数的安全证书可以为复杂机器人系统的安全控制任务提供可证明的安全保证。然而，最近所有关于基于学习的能量函数合成的研究都只考虑了可行性，这可能会导致过度保守并导致控制器效率较低。在这项工作中，我们提出了幅度正则化技术，通过降低能量函数内部的保守性来提高安全控制器的效率，同时保持有希望的可证明的安全保证。具体来说，我们通过能量函数的大小来量化保守性，并通过在合成损失中添加幅度正则化项来降低保守性。我们提出了 SafeMR 算法，该算法使用强化学习（RL）进行综合，以统一安全控制器和能量函数的学习过程。实验结果表明，该方法确实降低了能量函数的保守性，在保证安全性的同时，控制器效率优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于幅度正则化的方法，通过减少能量函数的保守性来提高学习型安全控制器的效率，同时保持可证明的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于能量函数的安全证书方法因过度保守导致控制器效率低下，需在保证安全性的前提下提升控制效率。
AI.method: 通过量化能量函数的幅度并引入正则化项到合成损失中，提出SafeMR算法结合强化学习统一优化安全控制器与能量函数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效降低能量函数保守性，在保证安全性的前提下显著优于基线方法的控制器效率。
AI.conclusion: 幅度正则化技术成功平衡了安全证书的保守性与控制效率，为复杂系统的安全控制提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Istvan Gyongy,Ahmet T. Erdogan,Neale A. W. Dutton,Germán Mora Martín,Alistair Gorman,Hanning Mai,Francesco Mattioli Della Rocca,Robert K. Henderson
title: A direct time-of-flight image sensor with in-pixel surface detection and dynamic vision
title_zh: 具有像素内表面检测和动态视觉功能的直接飞行时间图像传感器
comment: 24 pages, 16 figures. The visualisations may be viewed by clicking on the hyperlinks in the text
comments: 24 pages, 16 figures. The visualisations may be viewed by clicking on the hyperlinks in the text
abstract: 3D flash LIDAR is an alternative to the traditional scanning LIDAR systems, promising precise depth imaging in a compact form factor, and free of moving parts, for applications such as self-driving cars, robotics and augmented reality (AR). Typically implemented using single-photon, direct time-of-flight (dToF) receivers in image sensor format, the operation of the devices can be hindered by the large number of photon events needing to be processed and compressed in outdoor scenarios, limiting frame rates and scalability to larger arrays. We here present a 64x32 pixel (256x128 SPAD) dToF imager that overcomes these limitations by using pixels with embedded histogramming, which lock onto and track the return signal. This reduces the size of output data frames considerably, enabling maximum frame rates in the 10 kFPS range or 100 kFPS for direct depth readings. The sensor offers selective readout of pixels detecting surfaces, or those sensing motion, leading to reduced power consumption and off-chip processing requirements. We demonstrate the application of the sensor in mid-range LIDAR.
summary: 3D flash LIDAR is an alternative to the traditional scanning LIDAR systems, promising precise depth imaging in a compact form factor, and free of moving parts, for applications such as self-driving cars, robotics and augmented reality (AR). Typically implemented using single-photon, direct time-of-flight (dToF) receivers in image sensor format, the operation of the devices can be hindered by the large number of photon events needing to be processed and compressed in outdoor scenarios, limiting frame rates and scalability to larger arrays. We here present a 64x32 pixel (256x128 SPAD) dToF imager that overcomes these limitations by using pixels with embedded histogramming, which lock onto and track the return signal. This reduces the size of output data frames considerably, enabling maximum frame rates in the 10 kFPS range or 100 kFPS for direct depth readings. The sensor offers selective readout of pixels detecting surfaces, or those sensing motion, leading to reduced power consumption and off-chip processing requirements. We demonstrate the application of the sensor in mid-range LIDAR.
abstract_zh: 3D 闪存 LIDAR 是传统扫描 LIDAR 系统的替代方案，有望以紧凑的外形尺寸进行精确的深度成像，并且无需移动部件，适用于自动驾驶汽车、机器人和增强现实 (AR) 等应用。通常使用图像传感器格式的单光子直接飞行时间 (dToF) 接收器来实现，但设备的运行可能会因室外场景中需要处理和压缩的大量光子事件而受到阻碍，从而限制了帧速率和更大阵列的可扩展性。我们在这里展示了一款 64x32 像素 (256x128 SPAD) dToF 成像仪，它通过使用具有嵌入式直方图的像素来克服这些限制，锁定并跟踪返回信号。这大大减少了输出数据帧的大小，从而实现 10 kFPS 范围内的最大帧速率或 100 kFPS 的直接深度读数。该传感器提供检测表面或传感运动的像素的选择性读出，从而降低功耗和片外处理要求。我们演示了该传感器在中距离激光雷达中的应用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种改进的直接飞行时间（dToF）图像传感器，用于解决传统3D闪光LIDAR在户外场景下的性能限制。
AI.motivation: 传统3D闪光LIDAR在户外环境下因需处理大量光子事件而受限，影响帧率和扩展性，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用嵌入式直方图像素锁定跟踪信号，减少数据量，并实现选择性读取以降低功耗和处理需求。
AI.result: 实现最高10kFPS（或100kFPS直接深度读取）帧率，降低功耗，并在中距离LIDAR中验证应用。
AI.conclusion: 该传感器有效克服传统限制，适用于高帧率、低功耗的3D成像场景，如自动驾驶和AR。

authors_text: Luigi Capogrosso,Geri Skenderi,Federico Girella,Franco Fummi,Marco Cristani
title: Toward Smart Doors: A Position Paper
title_zh: 迈向智能门：立场文件
comment: 2nd International Workshop on Industrial Machine Learning @ ICPR 2022
comments: 2nd International Workshop on Industrial Machine Learning @ ICPR 2022
abstract: Conventional automatic doors cannot distinguish between people wishing to pass through the door and people passing by the door, so they often open unnecessarily. This leads to the need to adopt new systems in both commercial and non-commercial environments: smart doors. In particular, a smart door system predicts the intention of people near the door based on the social context of the surrounding environment and then makes rational decisions about whether or not to open the door. This work proposes the first position paper related to smart doors, without bells and whistles. We first point out that the problem not only concerns reliability, climate control, safety, and mode of operation. Indeed, a system to predict the intention of people near the door also involves a deeper understanding of the social context of the scene through a complex combined analysis of proxemics and scene reasoning. Furthermore, we conduct an exhaustive literature review about automatic doors, providing a novel system formulation. Also, we present an analysis of the possible future application of smart doors, a description of the ethical shortcomings, and legislative issues.
summary: Conventional automatic doors cannot distinguish between people wishing to pass through the door and people passing by the door, so they often open unnecessarily. This leads to the need to adopt new systems in both commercial and non-commercial environments: smart doors. In particular, a smart door system predicts the intention of people near the door based on the social context of the surrounding environment and then makes rational decisions about whether or not to open the door. This work proposes the first position paper related to smart doors, without bells and whistles. We first point out that the problem not only concerns reliability, climate control, safety, and mode of operation. Indeed, a system to predict the intention of people near the door also involves a deeper understanding of the social context of the scene through a complex combined analysis of proxemics and scene reasoning. Furthermore, we conduct an exhaustive literature review about automatic doors, providing a novel system formulation. Also, we present an analysis of the possible future application of smart doors, a description of the ethical shortcomings, and legislative issues.
abstract_zh: 传统的自动门无法区分想要进门的人和经过门的人，因此常常不必要地打开。这导致需要在商业和非商业环境中采用新系统：智能门。特别是智能门系统，可以根据周围环境的社会背景来预测靠近门的人的意图，然后做出是否开门的理性决定。这项工作提出了第一份与智能门相关的立场文件，没有任何附加功能。我们首先指出，问题不仅涉及可靠性、气候控制、安全性和操作模式。事实上，预测门附近人们意图的系统还涉及通过空间关系学和场景推理的复杂组合分析来更深入地理解场景的社会背景。此外，我们对自动门进行了详尽的文献综述，提供了一种新颖的系统方案。此外，我们还分析了智能门未来可能的应用，描述了其道德缺陷和立法问题。

AI.tldr: 提出智能门系统以解决传统自动门无法准确判断用户意图的问题
AI.motivation: 传统自动门因无法区分用户意图导致不必要的开启，需改进系统以提高效率和安全性
AI.method: 通过文献综述和系统框架设计，结合社会情境分析和场景推理技术
AI.result: 提出智能门系统框架，分析伦理与立法问题，并探讨未来应用方向
AI.conclusion: 智能门需结合技术与伦理，推动多领域协作以实现高效安全的解决方案

search_text: Toward Smart Doors: A Position Paper 迈向智能门：立场文件 Conventional automatic doors cannot distinguish between people wishing to pass through the door and people passing by the door, so they often open unnecessarily. This leads to the need to adopt new systems in both commercial and non-commercial environments: smart doors. In particular, a smart door system predicts the intention of people near the door based on the social context of the surrounding environment and then makes rational decisions about whether or not to open the door. This work proposes the first position paper related to smart doors, without bells and whistles. We first point out that the problem not only concerns reliability, climate control, safety, and mode of operation. Indeed, a system to predict the intention of people near the door also involves a deeper understanding of the social context of the scene through a complex combined analysis of proxemics and scene reasoning. Furthermore, we conduct an exhaustive literature review about automatic doors, providing a novel system formulation. Also, we present an analysis of the possible future application of smart doors, a description of the ethical shortcomings, and legislative issues. 传统的自动门无法区分想要进门的人和经过门的人，因此常常不必要地打开。这导致需要在商业和非商业环境中采用新系统：智能门。特别是智能门系统，可以根据周围环境的社会背景来预测靠近门的人的意图，然后做出是否开门的理性决定。这项工作提出了第一份与智能门相关的立场文件，没有任何附加功能。我们首先指出，问题不仅涉及可靠性、气候控制、安全性和操作模式。事实上，预测门附近人们意图的系统还涉及通过空间关系学和场景推理的复杂组合分析来更深入地理解场景的社会背景。此外，我们对自动门进行了详尽的文献综述，提供了一种新颖的系统方案。此外，我们还分析了智能门未来可能的应用，描述了其道德缺陷和立法问题。 提出智能门系统以解决传统自动门无法准确判断用户意图的问题 Luigi Capogrosso,Geri Skenderi,Federico Girella,Franco Fummi,Marco Cristani cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zaineb Ajra,Binbin Xu,Gérard Dray,Jacky Montmain,Stephane Perrey
title: Mental arithmetic task classification with convolutional neural network based on spectral-temporal features from EEG
title_zh: 基于脑电图时谱特征的卷积神经网络心算任务分类
abstract: In recent years, neuroscientists have been interested to the development of brain-computer interface (BCI) devices. Patients with motor disorders may benefit from BCIs as a means of communication and for the restoration of motor functions. Electroencephalography (EEG) is one of most used for evaluating the neuronal activity. In many computer vision applications, deep neural networks (DNN) show significant advantages. Towards to ultimate usage of DNN, we present here a shallow neural network that uses mainly two convolutional neural network (CNN) layers, with relatively few parameters and fast to learn spectral-temporal features from EEG. We compared this models to three other neural network models with different depths applied to a mental arithmetic task using eye-closed state adapted for patients suffering from motor disorders and a decline in visual functions. Experimental results showed that the shallow CNN model outperformed all the other models and achieved the highest classification accuracy of 90.68%. It's also more robust to deal with cross-subject classification issues: only 3% standard deviation of accuracy instead of 15.6% from conventional method.
summary: In recent years, neuroscientists have been interested to the development of brain-computer interface (BCI) devices. Patients with motor disorders may benefit from BCIs as a means of communication and for the restoration of motor functions. Electroencephalography (EEG) is one of most used for evaluating the neuronal activity. In many computer vision applications, deep neural networks (DNN) show significant advantages. Towards to ultimate usage of DNN, we present here a shallow neural network that uses mainly two convolutional neural network (CNN) layers, with relatively few parameters and fast to learn spectral-temporal features from EEG. We compared this models to three other neural network models with different depths applied to a mental arithmetic task using eye-closed state adapted for patients suffering from motor disorders and a decline in visual functions. Experimental results showed that the shallow CNN model outperformed all the other models and achieved the highest classification accuracy of 90.68%. It's also more robust to deal with cross-subject classification issues: only 3% standard deviation of accuracy instead of 15.6% from conventional method.
abstract_zh: 近年来，神经科学家对脑机接口（BCI）设备的开发产生了兴趣。患有运动障碍的患者可能会受益于脑机接口作为沟通手段和恢复运动功能。脑电图（EEG）是最常用于评估神经元活动的方法之一。在许多计算机视觉应用中，深度神经网络（DNN）显示出显着的优势。为了实现 DNN 的最终使用，我们在这里提出了一种浅层神经网络，主要使用两个卷积神经网络 (CNN) 层，参数相对较少，并且可以快速从 EEG 中学习频谱-时间特征。我们将该模型与其他三个不同深度的神经网络模型进行了比较，该模型应用于心算任务，使用适合患有运动障碍和视觉功能下降的患者的闭眼状态。实验结果表明，浅层CNN模型优于所有其他模型，达到了90.68%的最高分类精度。它在处理跨主题分类问题方面也更加稳健：准确度标准差仅为 3%，而传统方法为 15.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于EEG频谱-时域特征的浅层卷积神经网络模型，用于对脑机接口中的心理算术任务进行分类。
AI.motivation: 脑机接口（BCI）对运动障碍患者具有重要意义，而EEG信号能有效反映神经活动。传统方法在跨被试分类中表现不稳定，因此需要更高效的模型。
AI.method: 使用包含两个卷积层的浅层CNN模型，提取EEG信号的频谱-时域特征，并与三种不同深度的神经网络模型进行比较。
AI.result: 实验表明，该浅层CNN模型在心理算术任务分类中准确率达到90.68%，且在跨被试分类中标准差仅为3%，显著优于传统方法的15.6%。
AI.conclusion: 浅层CNN模型在EEG信号分类任务中表现出更高的准确性和鲁棒性，适合用于运动障碍患者的脑机接口应用。

authors_text: Kai Packhäuser,Sebastian Gündel,Florian Thamm,Felix Denzinger,Andreas Maier
title: Deep Learning-based Anonymization of Chest Radiographs: A Utility-preserving Measure for Patient Privacy
title_zh: 基于深度学习的胸片匿名化：保护患者隐私的实用性措施
abstract: Robust and reliable anonymization of chest radiographs constitutes an essential step before publishing large datasets of such for research purposes. The conventional anonymization process is carried out by obscuring personal information in the images with black boxes and removing or replacing meta-information. However, such simple measures retain biometric information in the chest radiographs, allowing patients to be re-identified by a linkage attack. Therefore, there is an urgent need to obfuscate the biometric information appearing in the images. We propose the first deep learning-based approach (PriCheXy-Net) to targetedly anonymize chest radiographs while maintaining data utility for diagnostic and machine learning purposes. Our model architecture is a composition of three independent neural networks that, when collectively used, allow for learning a deformation field that is able to impede patient re-identification. Quantitative results on the ChestX-ray14 dataset show a reduction of patient re-identification from 81.8% to 57.7% (AUC) after re-training with little impact on the abnormality classification performance. This indicates the ability to preserve underlying abnormality patterns while increasing patient privacy. Lastly, we compare our proposed anonymization approach with two other obfuscation-based methods (Privacy-Net, DP-Pix) and demonstrate the superiority of our method towards resolving the privacy-utility trade-off for chest radiographs.
summary: Robust and reliable anonymization of chest radiographs constitutes an essential step before publishing large datasets of such for research purposes. The conventional anonymization process is carried out by obscuring personal information in the images with black boxes and removing or replacing meta-information. However, such simple measures retain biometric information in the chest radiographs, allowing patients to be re-identified by a linkage attack. Therefore, there is an urgent need to obfuscate the biometric information appearing in the images. We propose the first deep learning-based approach (PriCheXy-Net) to targetedly anonymize chest radiographs while maintaining data utility for diagnostic and machine learning purposes. Our model architecture is a composition of three independent neural networks that, when collectively used, allow for learning a deformation field that is able to impede patient re-identification. Quantitative results on the ChestX-ray14 dataset show a reduction of patient re-identification from 81.8% to 57.7% (AUC) after re-training with little impact on the abnormality classification performance. This indicates the ability to preserve underlying abnormality patterns while increasing patient privacy. Lastly, we compare our proposed anonymization approach with two other obfuscation-based methods (Privacy-Net, DP-Pix) and demonstrate the superiority of our method towards resolving the privacy-utility trade-off for chest radiographs.
abstract_zh: 在出于研究目的发布大型数据集之前，对胸片进行稳健且可靠的匿名化是至关重要的一步。传统的匿名化过程是通过用黑匣子模糊图像中的个人信息并删除或替换元信息来进行的。然而，这种简单的措施将生物识别信息保留在胸片中，允许通过联动攻击重新识别患者。因此，迫切需要对图像中出现的生物特征信息进行混淆。我们提出了第一个基于深度学习的方法（PriCheXy-Net），有针对性地匿名化胸片，同时保持用于诊断和机器学习目的的数据实用性。我们的模型架构由三个独立的神经网络组成，当共同使用时，可以学习能够阻止患者重新识别的变形场。 ChestX-ray14 数据集的定量结果显示，重新训练后患者重新识别率从 81.8% 减少到 57.7% (AUC)，对异常分类性能影响很小。这表明能够保留潜在的异常模式，同时增加患者的隐私。最后，我们将我们提出的匿名方法与其他两种基于混淆的方法（Privacy-Net、DP-Pix）进行比较，并证明我们的方法在解决胸片隐私与实用性权衡方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度学习的胸部X光片匿名化方法，在保护患者隐私的同时保持数据效用。
AI.motivation: 传统匿名化方法无法有效消除生物特征信息，存在患者重新识别风险，需更有效的隐私保护方案。
AI.method: 设计PriCheXy-Net模型，结合三个独立神经网络学习变形场，针对性模糊生物特征信息。
AI.result: 在ChestX-ray14数据集上，患者重新识别率从81.8%降至57.7%（AUC），分类性能影响小，优于Privacy-Net和DP-Pix方法。
AI.conclusion: PriCheXy-Net有效解决隐私与效用的权衡问题，为医学影像匿名化提供新思路。

Quantitative results on the ChestX-ray14 dataset show a reduction of patient re-identification from 81.8% to 57.7% (AUC) after re-training with little impact on the abnormality classification performance. This indicates the ability to preserve underlying abnormality patterns while increasing patient privacy. Lastly, we compare our proposed anonymization approach with two other obfuscation-based methods (Privacy-Net, DP-Pix) and demonstrate the superiority of our method towards resolving the privacy-utility trade-off for chest radiographs. 在出于研究目的发布大型数据集之前，对胸片进行稳健且可靠的匿名化是至关重要的一步。传统的匿名化过程是通过用黑匣子模糊图像中的个人信息并删除或替换元信息来进行的。然而，这种简单的措施将生物识别信息保留在胸片中，允许通过联动攻击重新识别患者。因此，迫切需要对图像中出现的生物特征信息进行混淆。我们提出了第一个基于深度学习的方法（PriCheXy-Net），有针对性地匿名化胸片，同时保持用于诊断和机器学习目的的数据实用性。我们的模型架构由三个独立的神经网络组成，当共同使用时，可以学习能够阻止患者重新识别的变形场。 ChestX-ray14 数据集的定量结果显示，重新训练后患者重新识别率从 81.8% 减少到 57.7% (AUC)，对异常分类性能影响很小。这表明能够保留潜在的异常模式，同时增加患者的隐私。最后，我们将我们提出的匿名方法与其他两种基于混淆的方法（Privacy-Net、DP-Pix）进行比较，并证明我们的方法在解决胸片隐私与实用性权衡方面的优越性。 提出一种基于深度学习的胸部X光片匿名化方法，在保护患者隐私的同时保持数据效用。 Kai Packhäuser,Sebastian Gündel,Florian Thamm,Felix Denzinger,Andreas Maier eess.IV,cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mariano Ramirez Montero,Giovanni Franzese,Jeroen Zwanepol,Jens Kober
title: Solving Robot Assembly Tasks by Combining Interactive Teaching and Self-Exploration
title_zh: 互动教学与自我探索相结合解决机器人装配任务
abstract: Many high precision (dis)assembly tasks are still being performed by humans, whereas this is an ideal opportunity for automation. This paper provides a framework which enables a non-expert human operator to teach a robotic arm to do complex precision tasks. The framework uses a variable Cartesian impedance controller to execute trajectories learned from kinesthetic human demonstrations. Feedback can be given to interactively reshape or speed up the original demonstration. Board localization is done through a visual estimation of the task board position and refined through haptic feedback. Our framework is tested on the Robothon benchmark disassembly challenge, where the robot has to perform complex precision tasks, such as a key insertion. The results show high success rates for each of the manipulation subtasks, including cases when the box is in novel poses. An ablation study is also performed to evaluate the components of the framework.
summary: Many high precision (dis)assembly tasks are still being performed by humans, whereas this is an ideal opportunity for automation. This paper provides a framework which enables a non-expert human operator to teach a robotic arm to do complex precision tasks. The framework uses a variable Cartesian impedance controller to execute trajectories learned from kinesthetic human demonstrations. Feedback can be given to interactively reshape or speed up the original demonstration. Board localization is done through a visual estimation of the task board position and refined through haptic feedback. Our framework is tested on the Robothon benchmark disassembly challenge, where the robot has to perform complex precision tasks, such as a key insertion. The results show high success rates for each of the manipulation subtasks, including cases when the box is in novel poses. An ablation study is also performed to evaluate the components of the framework.
abstract_zh: 许多高精度（拆卸）组装任务仍然由人类执行，而这是自动化的理想机会。本文提供了一个框架，使非专业操作员能够教导机器人手臂执行复杂的精确任务。该框架使用可变笛卡尔阻抗控制器来执行从动觉人体演示中学到的轨迹。可以提供反馈来交互式地重塑或加速原始演示。板定位是通过任务板位置的视觉估计来完成的，并通过触觉反馈进行完善。我们的框架在 Robothon 基准拆卸挑战赛上进行了测试，其中机器人必须执行复杂的精确任务，例如插入钥匙。结果显示每个操作子任务的成功率很高，包括盒子处于新姿势时的情况。还进行了消融研究来评估框架的组成部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合交互式教学与自主探索的框架，使非专家操作员能教导机械臂完成高精度装配任务。
AI.motivation: 高精度装配任务仍依赖人工操作，自动化存在显著潜力与需求。
AI.method: 采用可变笛卡尔阻抗控制器执行人体示范轨迹，结合视觉定位与触觉反馈优化操作，通过交互反馈调整任务执行。
AI.result: 在Robothon拆卸挑战中实现高成功率，支持新型姿态下的操作，消融研究验证框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过交互教学与自主探索结合，有效解决了复杂精度装配任务的自动化问题。

title: An artificial neural network-based system for detecting machine failures using tiny sound data: A case study
title_zh: 基于人工神经网络的系统，使用微小的声音数据检测机器故障：案例研究
abstract: In an effort to advocate the research for a deep learning-based machine failure detection system, we present a case study of our proposed system based on a tiny sound dataset. Our case study investigates a variational autoencoder (VAE) for augmenting a small drill sound dataset from Valmet AB. A Valmet dataset contains 134 sounds that have been divided into two categories: "Anomaly" and "Normal" recorded from a drilling machine in Valmet AB, a company in Sundsvall, Sweden that supplies equipment and processes for the production of biofuels. Using deep learning models to detect failure drills on such a small sound dataset is typically unsuccessful. We employed a VAE to increase the number of sounds in the tiny dataset by synthesizing new sounds from original sounds. The augmented dataset was created by combining these synthesized sounds with the original sounds. We used a high-pass filter with a passband frequency of 1000 Hz and a low-pass filter with a passband frequency of 22\kern 0.16667em000 Hz to pre-process sounds in the augmented dataset before transforming them to Mel spectrograms. The pre-trained 2D-CNN Alexnet was then trained using these Mel spectrograms. When compared to using the original tiny sound dataset to train pre-trained Alexnet, using the augmented sound dataset enhanced the CNN model's classification results by 6.62\%(94.12\% when trained on the augmented dataset versus 87.5\% when trained on the original dataset).
summary: In an effort to advocate the research for a deep learning-based machine failure detection system, we present a case study of our proposed system based on a tiny sound dataset. Our case study investigates a variational autoencoder (VAE) for augmenting a small drill sound dataset from Valmet AB. A Valmet dataset contains 134 sounds that have been divided into two categories: "Anomaly" and "Normal" recorded from a drilling machine in Valmet AB, a company in Sundsvall, Sweden that supplies equipment and processes for the production of biofuels. Using deep learning models to detect failure drills on such a small sound dataset is typically unsuccessful. We employed a VAE to increase the number of sounds in the tiny dataset by synthesizing new sounds from original sounds. The augmented dataset was created by combining these synthesized sounds with the original sounds. We used a high-pass filter with a passband frequency of 1000 Hz and a low-pass filter with a passband frequency of 22\kern 0.16667em000 Hz to pre-process sounds in the augmented dataset before transforming them to Mel spectrograms. The pre-trained 2D-CNN Alexnet was then trained using these Mel spectrograms. When compared to using the original tiny sound dataset to train pre-trained Alexnet, using the augmented sound dataset enhanced the CNN model's classification results by 6.62\%(94.12\% when trained on the augmented dataset versus 87.5\% when trained on the original dataset).
abstract_zh: 为了倡导基于深度学习的机器故障检测系统的研究，我们基于微小的声音数据集对我们提出的系统进行了案例研究。我们的案例研究研究了用于增强 Valmet AB 的小型钻孔声音数据集的变分自动编码器 (VAE)。 Valmet 数据集包含 134 个声音，这些声音被分为两类：“异常”和“正常”，这些声音是从 Valmet AB 的钻孔机记录的，Valmet AB 是一家位于瑞典松兹瓦尔的公司，为生物燃料的生产提供设备和工艺。使用深度学习模型来检测如此小的声音数据集上的故障练习通常是不成功的。我们采用 VAE 通过从原始声音合成新声音来增加小数据集中的声音数量。通过将这些合成声音与原始声音相结合来创建增强数据集。我们使用通带频率为 1000 Hz 的高通滤波器和通带频率为 22\kern 0.16667em000 Hz 的低通滤波器来预处理增强数据集中的声音，然后将其转换为梅尔声谱图。然后使用这些梅尔频谱图训练预训练的 2D-CNN Alexnet。与使用原始微小声音数据集训练预训练的 Alexnet 相比，使用增强声音数据集将 CNN 模型的分类结果提高了 6.62%（在增强数据集上训练时为 94.12%，而在原始数据集上训练时为 87.5%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的系统，用于通过小规模声音数据检测机器故障。
AI.motivation: 小规模声音数据集难以有效训练深度学习模型，传统方法在故障检测中表现不佳，需通过数据增强提升模型性能。
AI.method: 使用VAE对Valmet AB提供的134个钻孔声音数据进行合成增强，结合高通/低通滤波预处理及Mel频谱图转换，采用预训练AlexNet进行分类训练。
AI.result: 增强后数据集使AlexNet分类准确率从87.5%提升至94.12%，提升了6.62%。
AI.conclusion: VAE数据增强有效解决了小样本场景下深度学习模型性能不足的问题，为工业故障检测提供了可行方案。

ai_content.result: 增强后数据集使AlexNet分类准确率从87.5%提升至94.12%，提升了6.62%。
ai_content.conclusion: VAE数据增强有效解决了小样本场景下深度学习模型性能不足的问题，为工业故障检测提供了可行方案。

title: Statistical shape representations for temporal registration of plant components in 3D
title_zh: 用于 3D 植物组件时间配准的统计形状表示
comment: 6 pages plus references, 7 figures, presented at ICRA 2023
comments: 6 pages plus references, 7 figures, presented at ICRA 2023
abstract: Plants are dynamic organisms and understanding temporal variations in vegetation is an essential problem for robots in the wild. However, associating repeated 3D scans of plants across time is challenging. A key step in this process is re-identifying and tracking the same individual plant components over time. Previously, this has been achieved by comparing their global spatial or topological location. In this work, we demonstrate how using shape features improves temporal organ matching. We present a landmark-free shape compression algorithm, which allows for the extraction of 3D shape features of leaves, characterises leaf shape and curvature efficiently in few parameters, and makes the association of individual leaves in feature space possible. The approach combines 3D contour extraction and further compression using Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to produce a shape space encoding, which is entirely learned from data and retains information about edge contours and 3D curvature. Our evaluation on temporal scan sequences of tomato plants shows, that incorporating shape features improves temporal leaf-matching. A combination of shape, location, and rotation information proves most informative for recognition of leaves over time and yields a true positive rate of 75%, a 15% improvement on sate-of-the-art methods. This is essential for robotic crop monitoring, which enables whole-of-lifecycle phenotyping.
summary: Plants are dynamic organisms and understanding temporal variations in vegetation is an essential problem for robots in the wild. However, associating repeated 3D scans of plants across time is challenging. A key step in this process is re-identifying and tracking the same individual plant components over time. The approach combines 3D contour extraction and further compression using Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to produce a shape space encoding, which is entirely learned from data and retains information about edge contours and 3D curvature. Our evaluation on temporal scan sequences of tomato plants shows, that incorporating shape features improves temporal leaf-matching. A combination of shape, location, and rotation information proves most informative for recognition of leaves over time and yields a true positive rate of 75%, a 15% improvement on sate-of-the-art methods. This is essential for robotic crop monitoring, which enables whole-of-lifecycle phenotyping.
abstract_zh: 植物是动态生物体，了解植被的时间变化是野外机器人的一个基本问题。然而，跨时间关联植物的重复 3D 扫描具有挑战性。此过程的关键步骤是随着时间的推移重新识别和跟踪相同的单个工厂组件。此前，这是通过比较它们的全球空间或拓扑位置来实现的。在这项工作中，我们演示了如何使用形状特征来改善颞器官匹配。我们提出了一种无界标的形状压缩算法，该算法允许提取叶子的 3D 形状特征，用很少的参数有效地表征叶子的形状和曲率，并使特征空间中各个叶子的关联成为可能。该方法结合了 3D 轮廓提取和使用主成分分析 (PCA) 的进一步压缩来生成形状空间编码，该编码完全从数据中学习并保留有关边缘轮廓和 3D 曲率的信息。我们对番茄植株时间扫描序列的评估表明，结合形状特征可以改善时间叶匹配。事实证明，形状、位置和旋转信息的组合对于随着时间的推移识别叶子提供了最丰富的信息，其真阳性率为 75%，比最先进的方法提高了 15%。这对于机器人作物监测至关重要，可以实现整个生命周期的表型分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于形状特征的三维植物器官时序配准方法，通过形状压缩算法实现叶片的跨时间匹配。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖全局空间或拓扑位置进行植物部件配准存在局限，需更高效的形状特征描述方法以提升时序匹配准确性。
AI.method: 提出无标志点的形状压缩算法，结合三维轮廓提取与主成分分析（PCA），从数据中学习保留边缘轮廓和曲率信息的形状特征空间。
AI.result: 在番茄植株时序扫描数据集上实现75%的真阳性率，较现有方法提升15%的匹配准确率。
AI.conclusion: 融合形状、位置和旋转信息可有效提升叶片时序识别性能，为机器人作物表型分析提供关键技术支持。

search_text: Statistical shape representations for temporal registration of plant components in 3D 用于 3D 植物组件时间配准的统计形状表示 Plants are dynamic organisms and understanding temporal variations in vegetation is an essential problem for robots in the wild. However, associating repeated 3D scans of plants across time is challenging. A key step in this process is re-identifying and tracking the same individual plant components over time. Previously, this has been achieved by comparing their global spatial or topological location. In this work, we demonstrate how using shape features improves temporal organ matching. We present a landmark-free shape compression algorithm, which allows for the extraction of 3D shape features of leaves, characterises leaf shape and curvature efficiently in few parameters, and makes the association of individual leaves in feature space possible. The approach combines 3D contour extraction and further compression using Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to produce a shape space encoding, which is entirely learned from data and retains information about edge contours and 3D curvature. Our evaluation on temporal scan sequences of tomato plants shows, that incorporating shape features improves temporal leaf-matching. A combination of shape, location, and rotation information proves most informative for recognition of leaves over time and yields a true positive rate of 75%, a 15% improvement on sate-of-the-art methods. This is essential for robotic crop monitoring, which enables whole-of-lifecycle phenotyping. 植物是动态生物体，了解植被的时间变化是野外机器人的一个基本问题。然而，跨时间关联植物的重复 3D 扫描具有挑战性。此过程的关键步骤是随着时间的推移重新识别和跟踪相同的单个工厂组件。此前，这是通过比较它们的全球空间或拓扑位置来实现的。在这项工作中，我们演示了如何使用形状特征来改善颞器官匹配。我们提出了一种无界标的形状压缩算法，该算法允许提取叶子的 3D 形状特征，用很少的参数有效地表征叶子的形状和曲率，并使特征空间中各个叶子的关联成为可能。该方法结合了 3D 轮廓提取和使用主成分分析 (PCA) 的进一步压缩来生成形状空间编码，该编码完全从数据中学习并保留有关边缘轮廓和 3D 曲率的信息。我们对番茄植株时间扫描序列的评估表明，结合形状特征可以改善时间叶匹配。事实证明，形状、位置和旋转信息的组合对于随着时间的推移识别叶子提供了最丰富的信息，其真阳性率为 75%，比最先进的方法提高了 15%。这对于机器人作物监测至关重要，可以实现整个生命周期的表型分析。 本文提出一种基于形状特征的三维植物器官时序配准方法，通过形状压缩算法实现叶片的跨时间匹配。 Karoline Heiwolt,Cengiz Öztireli,Grzegorz Cielniak cs.CV

authors_text: Phani Thontepu,Bhavya Giri Goswami,Manan Tayal,Neelaksh Singh,Shyamsundar P I,Shyam Sundar M G,Suresh Sundaram,Vaibhav Katewa,Shishir Kolathaya
title: Control Barrier Functions in UGVs for Kinematic Obstacle Avoidance: A Collision Cone Approach
title_zh: 控制 UGV 中的障碍物功能以实现运动避障：碰撞锥方法
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, For supplement video follow https://youtu.be/Dme7Wm9y6es. *The first and second authors have contributed equally
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures, For supplement video follow https://youtu.be/Dme7Wm9y6es. *The first and second authors have contributed equally
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new class of Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) for Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs) that help avoid collisions with kinematic (non-zero velocity) obstacles. While the current forms of CBFs have been successful in guaranteeing safety/collision avoidance with static obstacles, extensions for the dynamic case have seen limited success. Moreover, with the UGV models like the unicycle or the bicycle, applications of existing CBFs have been conservative in terms of control, i.e., steering/thrust control has not been possible under certain scenarios. Drawing inspiration from the classical use of collision cones for obstacle avoidance in trajectory planning, we introduce its novel CBF formulation with theoretical guarantees on safety for both the unicycle and bicycle models. The main idea is to ensure that the velocity of the obstacle w.r.t. the vehicle is always pointing away from the vehicle. Accordingly, we construct a constraint that ensures that the velocity vector always avoids a cone of vectors pointing at the vehicle. The efficacy of this new control methodology is later verified by Pybullet simulations on TurtleBot3 and F1Tenth.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new class of Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) for Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs) that help avoid collisions with kinematic (non-zero velocity) obstacles. While the current forms of CBFs have been successful in guaranteeing safety/collision avoidance with static obstacles, extensions for the dynamic case have seen limited success. Moreover, with the UGV models like the unicycle or the bicycle, applications of existing CBFs have been conservative in terms of control, i.e., steering/thrust control has not been possible under certain scenarios. Drawing inspiration from the classical use of collision cones for obstacle avoidance in trajectory planning, we introduce its novel CBF formulation with theoretical guarantees on safety for both the unicycle and bicycle models. The main idea is to ensure that the velocity of the obstacle w.r.t. the vehicle is always pointing away from the vehicle. Accordingly, we construct a constraint that ensures that the velocity vector always avoids a cone of vectors pointing at the vehicle. The efficacy of this new control methodology is later verified by Pybullet simulations on TurtleBot3 and F1Tenth.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于无人地面车辆（UGV）的新型控制障碍功能（CBF），有助于避免与运动（非零速度）障碍物发生碰撞。虽然当前形式的 CBF 已经成功地保证了静态障碍物的安全/避免碰撞，但动态情况的扩展却取得了有限的成功。此外，对于像独轮车或自行车这样的UGV模型，现有CBF的应用在控制方面比较保守，即在某些场景下无法实现转向/推力控制。受到轨迹规划中碰撞锥体避障的经典使用的启发，我们引入了其新颖的 CBF 公式，为独轮车和自行车模型提供了安全性的理论保证。主要思想是确保障碍物的速度相对于障碍物的速度。车辆始终指向远离车辆的方向。因此，我们构造一个约束，确保速度矢量始终避免指向车辆的矢量锥体。这种新控制方法的有效性随后通过 TurtleBot3 和 F1Tenth 上的 Pybullet 模拟得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于碰撞锥的控制屏障函数（CBFs）方法，用于无人地面车辆（UGVs）的运动学障碍物避障。
AI.motivation: 现有CBFs在处理静态障碍物时有效，但对动态障碍物（如非零速度障碍物）的适应性不足，且在差速模型（如单轮车、自行车模型）中控制过于保守。
AI.method: 受轨迹规划中碰撞锥理论启发，构建约束条件确保障碍物相对于车辆的速度始终远离车辆，避免指向车辆的锥形向量区域。
AI.result: 通过Pybullet仿真验证了该方法在TurtleBot3和F1Tenth平台上的有效性，实现了动态障碍物避障的理论安全保证。
AI.conclusion: 新CBFs方法为UGVs在动态环境下的运动学避障提供了理论安全性和更灵活的控制策略。

title: WS-3D-Lane: Weakly Supervised 3D Lane Detection With 2D Lane Labels
title_zh: WS-3D-Lane：使用 2D 车道标签的弱监督 3D 车道检测
abstract: Compared to 2D lanes, real 3D lane data is difficult to collect accurately. In this paper, we propose a novel method for training 3D lanes with only 2D lane labels, called weakly supervised 3D lane detection WS-3D-Lane. By assumptions of constant lane width and equal height on adjacent lanes, we indirectly supervise 3D lane heights in the training. To overcome the problem of the dynamic change of the camera pitch during data collection, a camera pitch self-calibration method is proposed. In anchor representation, we propose a double-layer anchor with a improved non-maximum suppression (NMS) method, which enables the anchor-based method to predict two lane lines that are close. Experiments are conducted on the base of 3D-LaneNet under two supervision methods. Under weakly supervised setting, our WS-3D-Lane outperforms previous 3D-LaneNet: F-score rises to 92.3% on Apollo 3D synthetic dataset, and F1 rises to 74.5% on ONCE-3DLanes. Meanwhile, WS-3D-Lane in purely supervised setting makes more increments and outperforms state-of-the-art. To the best of our knowledge, WS-3D-Lane is the first try of 3D lane detection under weakly supervised setting.
summary: Compared to 2D lanes, real 3D lane data is difficult to collect accurately. In this paper, we propose a novel method for training 3D lanes with only 2D lane labels, called weakly supervised 3D lane detection WS-3D-Lane. By assumptions of constant lane width and equal height on adjacent lanes, we indirectly supervise 3D lane heights in the training. To overcome the problem of the dynamic change of the camera pitch during data collection, a camera pitch self-calibration method is proposed. In anchor representation, we propose a double-layer anchor with a improved non-maximum suppression (NMS) method, which enables the anchor-based method to predict two lane lines that are close. Experiments are conducted on the base of 3D-LaneNet under two supervision methods. Under weakly supervised setting, our WS-3D-Lane outperforms previous 3D-LaneNet: F-score rises to 92.3% on Apollo 3D synthetic dataset, and F1 rises to 74.5% on ONCE-3DLanes. Meanwhile, WS-3D-Lane in purely supervised setting makes more increments and outperforms state-of-the-art. To the best of our knowledge, WS-3D-Lane is the first try of 3D lane detection under weakly supervised setting.
abstract_zh: 与2D车道相比，真实的3D车道数据很难准确采集。在本文中，我们提出了一种仅使用 2D 车道标签训练 3D 车道的新方法，称为弱监督 3D 车道检测 WS-3D-Lane。通过假设相邻车道的车道宽度恒定且高度相等，我们在训练中间接监督 3D 车道高度。针对数据采集过程中相机俯仰动态变化的问题，提出一种相机俯仰自标定方法。在锚表示中，我们提出了一种具有改进的非极大值抑制（NMS）方法的双层锚，这使得基于锚的方法能够预测两条靠近的车道线。在3D-LaneNet的基础上，在两种监督方法下进行了实验。在弱监督设置下，我们的 WS-3D-Lane 优于之前的 3D-LaneNet：F-score 在 Apollo 3D 合成数据集上上升到 92.3%，F1 在 ONCE-3DLanes 上上升到 74.5%。与此同时，WS-3D-Lane 在纯监督环境下实现了更多增量，并且超越了最先进的技术。据我们所知，WS-3D-Lane 是弱监督设置下 3D 车道检测的首次尝试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督3D车道检测方法WS-3D-Lane，仅使用2D车道标签进行训练，解决3D车道数据难以采集的问题。
AI.motivation: 真实场景中准确采集3D车道数据成本高且困难，而现有2D车道标签资源丰富，需探索弱监督方法实现3D检测。
AI.method: 基于车道宽度恒定和相邻车道高度相等的假设，通过自校准相机俯仰角和双层锚点结构结合改进NMS算法，实现从2D标签到3D车道的弱监督学习。
AI.result: 在Apollo 3D数据集上F-score达92.3%，ONCE-3DLanes数据集F1达74.5%，弱监督设置下优于现有3D-LaneNet及全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: WS-3D-Lane是首个弱监督3D车道检测方法，证明仅依赖2D标签可实现高精度3D车道检测，为数据稀缺场景提供新解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督3D车道检测方法WS-3D-Lane，仅使用2D车道标签进行训练，解决3D车道数据难以采集的问题。

search_text: WS-3D-Lane: Weakly Supervised 3D Lane Detection With 2D Lane Labels WS-3D-Lane：使用 2D 车道标签的弱监督 3D 车道检测 Compared to 2D lanes, real 3D lane data is difficult to collect accurately. In this paper, we propose a novel method for training 3D lanes with only 2D lane labels, called weakly supervised 3D lane detection WS-3D-Lane. By assumptions of constant lane width and equal height on adjacent lanes, we indirectly supervise 3D lane heights in the training. To overcome the problem of the dynamic change of the camera pitch during data collection, a camera pitch self-calibration method is proposed. In anchor representation, we propose a double-layer anchor with a improved non-maximum suppression (NMS) method, which enables the anchor-based method to predict two lane lines that are close. Experiments are conducted on the base of 3D-LaneNet under two supervision methods. Under weakly supervised setting, our WS-3D-Lane outperforms previous 3D-LaneNet: F-score rises to 92.3% on Apollo 3D synthetic dataset, and F1 rises to 74.5% on ONCE-3DLanes. Meanwhile, WS-3D-Lane in purely supervised setting makes more increments and outperforms state-of-the-art. To the best of our knowledge, WS-3D-Lane is the first try of 3D lane detection under weakly supervised setting. 与2D车道相比，真实的3D车道数据很难准确采集。在本文中，我们提出了一种仅使用 2D 车道标签训练 3D 车道的新方法，称为弱监督 3D 车道检测 WS-3D-Lane。通过假设相邻车道的车道宽度恒定且高度相等，我们在训练中间接监督 3D 车道高度。针对数据采集过程中相机俯仰动态变化的问题，提出一种相机俯仰自标定方法。在锚表示中，我们提出了一种具有改进的非极大值抑制（NMS）方法的双层锚，这使得基于锚的方法能够预测两条靠近的车道线。在3D-LaneNet的基础上，在两种监督方法下进行了实验。在弱监督设置下，我们的 WS-3D-Lane 优于之前的 3D-LaneNet：F-score 在 Apollo 3D 合成数据集上上升到 92.3%，F1 在 ONCE-3DLanes 上上升到 74.5%。与此同时，WS-3D-Lane 在纯监督环境下实现了更多增量，并且超越了最先进的技术。据我们所知，WS-3D-Lane 是弱监督设置下 3D 车道检测的首次尝试。 本文提出一种弱监督3D车道检测方法WS-3D-Lane，仅使用2D车道标签进行训练，解决3D车道数据难以采集的问题。 Jianyong Ai,Wenbo Ding,Jiuhua Zhao,Jiachen Zhong cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Sangkeum Lee,Sarvar Hussain Nengroo,Hojun Jin,Yoonmee Doh,Chungho Lee,Taewook Heo,Dongsoo Har
title: Power Management in Smart Residential Building with Deep Learning Model for Occupancy Detection by Usage Pattern of Electric Appliances
title_zh: 智能住宅建筑中的电源管理，采用深度学习模型，通过电器的使用模式进行占用检测
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, to be submitted to 7th International Conference on Renewable Energy and Conservation, ICREC 2022
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures, to be submitted to 7th International Conference on Renewable Energy and Conservation, ICREC 2022
abstract: With the growth of smart building applications, occupancy information in residential buildings is becoming more and more significant. In the context of the smart buildings' paradigm, this kind of information is required for a wide range of purposes, including enhancing energy efficiency and occupant comfort. In this study, occupancy detection in residential building is implemented using deep learning based on technical information of electric appliances. To this end, a novel approach of occupancy detection for smart residential building system is proposed. The dataset of electric appliances, sensors, light, and HVAC, which is measured by smart metering system and is collected from 50 households, is used for simulations. To classify the occupancy among datasets, the support vector machine and autoencoder algorithm are used. Confusion matrix is utilized for accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 to demonstrate the comparative performance of the proposed method in occupancy detection. The proposed algorithm achieves occupancy detection using technical information of electric appliances by 95.7~98.4%. To validate occupancy detection data, principal component analysis and the t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding (t-SNE) algorithm are employed. Power consumption with renewable energy system is reduced to 11.1~13.1% in smart buildings by using occupancy detection.
summary: With the growth of smart building applications, occupancy information in residential buildings is becoming more and more significant. In the context of the smart buildings' paradigm, this kind of information is required for a wide range of purposes, including enhancing energy efficiency and occupant comfort. To this end, a novel approach of occupancy detection for smart residential building system is proposed. The dataset of electric appliances, sensors, light, and HVAC, which is measured by smart metering system and is collected from 50 households, is used for simulations. To classify the occupancy among datasets, the support vector machine and autoencoder algorithm are used. Confusion matrix is utilized for accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 to demonstrate the comparative performance of the proposed method in occupancy detection. The proposed algorithm achieves occupancy detection using technical information of electric appliances by 95.7~98.4%. To validate occupancy detection data, principal component analysis and the t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding (t-SNE) algorithm are employed. Power consumption with renewable energy system is reduced to 11.1~13.1% in smart buildings by using occupancy detection.
abstract_zh: 随着智能建筑应用的增长，住宅建筑中的占用信息变得越来越重要。在智能建筑范式的背景下，此类信息需要用于多种目的，包括提高能源效率和居住者舒适度。在本研究中，利用基于电器技术信息的深度学习来实现住宅楼的占用检测。为此，提出了一种智能住宅建筑系统占用检测的新方法。使用智能电表系统采集的50户家庭的电器、传感器、灯光、暖通空调数据集进行模拟。为了对数据集之间的占用率进行分类，使用了支持向量机和自动编码器算法。利用混淆矩阵来表示准确度、精确度、召回率和 F1，以展示所提出的方法在占用检测中的比较性能。该算法利用电器技术信息实现了95.7%~98.4%的占用检测。为了验证占用检测数据，采用了主成分分析和 t 分布随机邻域嵌入 (t-SNE) 算法。通过使用占用检测，智能建筑中可再生能源系统的功耗可降低至 11.1~13.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的住宅建筑占用检测方法，通过家电使用模式优化智能建筑的能源管理。
AI.motivation: 随着智能建筑发展，占用信息对提升能源效率和居住舒适度至关重要，传统方法难以准确获取实时占用状态。
AI.method: 采用支持向量机与自编码器算法，结合50户家庭的智能电表数据（含家电、传感器、照明及HVAC数据），通过混淆矩阵评估模型性能，并用PCA和t-SNE验证数据有效性。
AI.result: 占用检测准确率达95.7~98.4%，结合可再生能源系统后，智能建筑能耗降低11.1~13.1%。
AI.conclusion: 基于家电用电模式的深度学习方法能有效提升占用检测精度，为智能建筑能源管理提供可靠技术支撑。

authors_text: Qifan Fu,Huiqiang Xie,Zhijin Qin,Gregory Slabaugh,Xiaoming Tao
title: Vector Quantized Semantic Communication System
title_zh: 矢量量化语义通信系统
comment: This five pages article has been accepted for publication in IEEE Wireless Communications Letters. This is the author's version which has not been fully edited and content may change prior to final publication. Citation information: DOI 10.1109/LWC.2023.3255221
comments: This five pages article has been accepted for publication in IEEE Wireless Communications Letters. This is the author's version which has not been fully edited and content may change prior to final publication. Citation information: DOI 10.1109/LWC.2023.3255221
abstract: Although analog semantic communication systems have received considerable attention in the literature, there is less work on digital semantic communication systems. In this paper, we develop a deep learning (DL)-enabled vector quantized (VQ) semantic communication system for image transmission, named VQ-DeepSC. Specifically, we propose a convolutional neural network (CNN)-based transceiver to extract multi-scale semantic features of images and introduce multi-scale semantic embedding spaces to perform semantic feature quantization, rendering the data compatible with digital communication systems. Furthermore, we employ adversarial training to improve the quality of received images by introducing a PatchGAN discriminator. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed VQ-DeepSC is more robustness than BPG in digital communication systems and has comparable MS-SSIM performance to the DeepJSCC method.
summary: Although analog semantic communication systems have received considerable attention in the literature, there is less work on digital semantic communication systems. In this paper, we develop a deep learning (DL)-enabled vector quantized (VQ) semantic communication system for image transmission, named VQ-DeepSC. Specifically, we propose a convolutional neural network (CNN)-based transceiver to extract multi-scale semantic features of images and introduce multi-scale semantic embedding spaces to perform semantic feature quantization, rendering the data compatible with digital communication systems. Furthermore, we employ adversarial training to improve the quality of received images by introducing a PatchGAN discriminator. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed VQ-DeepSC is more robustness than BPG in digital communication systems and has comparable MS-SSIM performance to the DeepJSCC method.
abstract_zh: 尽管模拟语义通信系统在文献中受到了相当多的关注，但数字语义通信系统的工作却很少。在本文中，我们开发了一种用于图像传输的支持深度学习（DL）的矢量量化（VQ）语义通信系统，名为VQ-DeepSC。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的收发器来提取图像的多尺度语义特征，并引入多尺度语义嵌入空间来执行语义特征量化，使数据与数字通信系统兼容。此外，我们通过引入 PatchGAN 判别器，采用对抗性训练来提高接收图像的质量。实验结果表明，所提出的 VQ-DeepSC 在数字通信系统中比 BPG 更具鲁棒性，并且具有与 DeepJSCC 方法相当的 MS-SSIM 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的向量量化语义通信系统VQ-DeepSC，用于图像传输。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注模拟语义通信系统，而数字语义通信系统研究不足，需开发兼容数字系统的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计CNN-based收发器提取多尺度语义特征，引入多尺度语义嵌入空间进行量化，并采用对抗训练与PatchGAN提升图像质量。
AI.result: 实验表明VQ-DeepSC在数字通信中比BPG更稳健，且MS-SSIM性能与DeepJSCC方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效提升了数字语义通信的鲁棒性与性能，为相关领域提供新思路。
