Specifically, we propose a convolutional neural network (CNN)-based transceiver to extract multi-scale semantic features of images and introduce multi-scale semantic embedding spaces to perform semantic feature quantization, rendering the data compatible with digital communication systems. Furthermore, we employ adversarial training to improve the quality of received images by introducing a PatchGAN discriminator. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed VQ-DeepSC is more robustness than BPG in digital communication systems and has comparable MS-SSIM performance to the DeepJSCC method. 尽管模拟语义通信系统在文献中受到了相当多的关注，但数字语义通信系统的工作却很少。在本文中，我们开发了一种用于图像传输的支持深度学习（DL）的矢量量化（VQ）语义通信系统，名为VQ-DeepSC。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的收发器来提取图像的多尺度语义特征，并引入多尺度语义嵌入空间来执行语义特征量化，使数据与数字通信系统兼容。此外，我们通过引入 PatchGAN 判别器，采用对抗性训练来提高接收图像的质量。实验结果表明，所提出的 VQ-DeepSC 在数字通信系统中比 BPG 更具鲁棒性，并且具有与 DeepJSCC 方法相当的 MS-SSIM 性能。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的向量量化语义通信系统VQ-DeepSC，用于图像传输。 Qifan Fu,Huiqiang Xie,Zhijin Qin,Gregory Slabaugh,Xiaoming Tao cs.CV,eess.SP

authors_text: Quang-Trung Truong,Tuan-Anh Vu,Tan-Sang Ha,Lokoc Jakub,Yue Him Wong Tim,Ajay Joneja,Sai-Kit Yeung
title: Marine Video Kit: A New Marine Video Dataset for Content-based Analysis and Retrieval
title_zh: 海洋视频套件：用于基于内容的分析和检索的新海洋视频数据集
comment: Camera Ready for MMM 2023, Bergen, Norway
comments: Camera Ready for MMM 2023, Bergen, Norway
abstract: Effective analysis of unusual domain specific video collections represents an important practical problem, where state-of-the-art general purpose models still face limitations. Hence, it is desirable to design benchmark datasets that challenge novel powerful models for specific domains with additional constraints. It is important to remember that domain specific data may be noisier (e.g., endoscopic or underwater videos) and often require more experienced users for effective search. In this paper, we focus on single-shot videos taken from moving cameras in underwater environments, which constitute a nontrivial challenge for research purposes. The first shard of a new Marine Video Kit dataset is presented to serve for video retrieval and other computer vision challenges. Our dataset is used in a special session during Video Browser Showdown 2023. In addition to basic meta-data statistics, we present several insights based on low-level features as well as semantic annotations of selected keyframes. The analysis also contains experiments showing limitations of respected general purpose models for retrieval. Our dataset and code are publicly available at https://hkust-vgd.github.io/marinevideokit.
summary: Effective analysis of unusual domain specific video collections represents an important practical problem, where state-of-the-art general purpose models still face limitations. Hence, it is desirable to design benchmark datasets that challenge novel powerful models for specific domains with additional constraints. It is important to remember that domain specific data may be noisier (e.g., endoscopic or underwater videos) and often require more experienced users for effective search. In this paper, we focus on single-shot videos taken from moving cameras in underwater environments, which constitute a nontrivial challenge for research purposes. The first shard of a new Marine Video Kit dataset is presented to serve for video retrieval and other computer vision challenges. Our dataset is used in a special session during Video Browser Showdown 2023. In addition to basic meta-data statistics, we present several insights based on low-level features as well as semantic annotations of selected keyframes. The analysis also contains experiments showing limitations of respected general purpose models for retrieval. Our dataset and code are publicly available at https://hkust-vgd.github.io/marinevideokit.
abstract_zh: 对不寻常的特定领域视频集合的有效分析代表了一个重要的实际问题，其中最先进的通用模型仍然面临局限性。因此，需要设计基准数据集，以挑战具有附加约束的特定领域的新颖的强大模型。重要的是要记住，特定领域的数据可能会更加嘈杂（例如，内窥镜或水下视频），并且通常需要更有经验的用户才能进行有效搜索。在本文中，我们重点关注水下环境中移动摄像机拍摄的单镜头视频，这对研究目的构成了不小的挑战。新的 Marine Video Kit 数据集的第一个分片旨在服务于视频检索和其他计算机视觉挑战。我们的数据集在 Video Browser Showdown 2023 期间的一次特别会议中使用。除了基本的元数据统计之外，我们还提供了基于低级特征以及所选关键帧的语义注释的一些见解。该分析还包含实验，显示受人尊敬的通用检索模型的局限性。我们的数据集和代码可在 https://hkust-vgd.github.io/marinevideokit 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个新的海洋视频数据集Marine Video Kit，用于支持基于内容的视频分析与检索任务。
AI.motivation: 现有通用模型在处理领域特定视频（如水下视频）时存在局限性，而领域特定数据通常更嘈杂且需要专业知识支持检索，因此需要构建针对性的基准数据集以推动相关研究。
AI.method: 收集水下环境中的单次拍摄视频，构建数据集第一部分，并提供元数据统计、低级特征分析及关键帧语义标注，同时通过实验验证通用模型在该领域的检索局限性。
AI.result: 数据集已公开并应用于Video Browser Showdown 2023专题赛，实验表明现有通用模型在水下视频检索任务中表现不足。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定数据集对推动针对性模型研究至关重要，Marine Video Kit为水下视频分析提供了基准，揭示了当前通用模型的不足。

authors_text: Hélène Fargier,Pierre-François Gimenez,Jérôme Mengin,Bao Ngoc Le Nguyen
title: The complexity of unsupervised learning of lexicographic preferences
title_zh: 词典编排偏好无监督学习的复杂性
comment: ef:13th Multidisciplinary Workshop on Advances in Preference Handling, Jul 2022, Vienne, Austria
comments: ef:13th Multidisciplinary Workshop on Advances in Preference Handling, Jul 2022, Vienne, Austria
abstract: This paper considers the task of learning users' preferences on a combinatorial set of alternatives, as generally used by online configurators, for example. In many settings, only a set of selected alternatives during past interactions is available to the learner. Fargier et al. [2018] propose an approach to learn, in such a setting, a model of the users' preferences that ranks previously chosen alternatives as high as possible; and an algorithm to learn, in this setting, a particular model of preferences: lexicographic preferences trees (LP-trees). In this paper, we study complexity-theoretical problems related to this approach. We give an upper bound on the sample complexity of learning an LP-tree, which is logarithmic in the number of attributes. We also prove that computing the LP tree that minimises the empirical risk can be done in polynomial time when restricted to the class of linear LP-trees.
summary: This paper considers the task of learning users' preferences on a combinatorial set of alternatives, as generally used by online configurators, for example. In many settings, only a set of selected alternatives during past interactions is available to the learner. Fargier et al. [2018] propose an approach to learn, in such a setting, a model of the users' preferences that ranks previously chosen alternatives as high as possible; and an algorithm to learn, in this setting, a particular model of preferences: lexicographic preferences trees (LP-trees). In this paper, we study complexity-theoretical problems related to this approach. We give an upper bound on the sample complexity of learning an LP-tree, which is logarithmic in the number of attributes. We also prove that computing the LP tree that minimises the empirical risk can be done in polynomial time when restricted to the class of linear LP-trees.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了学习用户对一组组合选项的偏好的任务，例如在线配置器通常使用的选项。在许多设置中，学习者只能使用过去交互过程中选定的一组替代方案。法吉尔等人。 [2018]提出了一种在这种情况下学习用户偏好模型的方法，该模型将先前选择的替代方案排名尽可能高；以及一种在这种情况下学习特定偏好模型的算法：词典偏好树（LP-trees）。在本文中，我们研究与这种方法相关的复杂性理论问题。我们给出了学习 LP 树的样本复杂度的上限，它是属性数量的对数。我们还证明，当限制为线性 LP 树类别时，计算最小化经验风险的 LP 树可以在多项式时间内完成。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无监督设置下学习词典偏好（LP树）的复杂性问题，分析了样本复杂度和计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 在线配置器等场景中，用户偏好通常通过历史选择数据隐含表示，但如何高效学习此类偏好模型的复杂性尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过理论分析给出LP树模型的样本复杂度上界，并证明在线性LP树类中最小化经验风险可多项式时间求解。
AI.result: 得出样本复杂度对属性数呈对数级增长，且线性LP树的最优解计算具有多项式时间复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为无监督学习词典偏好提供了理论保证，表明在合理约束下可高效构建此类偏好模型。

title: Reactive Anticipatory Robot Skills with Memory
title_zh: 带记忆的反应性预期机器人技能
abstract: Optimal control in robotics has been increasingly popular in recent years and has been applied in many applications involving complex dynamical systems. Closed-loop optimal control strategies include model predictive control (MPC) and time-varying linear controllers optimized through iLQR. However, such feedback controllers rely on the information of the current state, limiting the range of robotic applications where the robot needs to remember what it has done before to act and plan accordingly. The recently proposed system level synthesis (SLS) framework circumvents this limitation via a richer controller structure with memory. In this work, we propose to optimally design reactive anticipatory robot skills with memory by extending SLS to tracking problems involving nonlinear systems and nonquadratic cost functions. We showcase our method with two scenarios exploiting task precisions and object affordances in pick-and-place tasks in a simulated and a real environment with a 7-axis Franka Emika robot.
summary: Optimal control in robotics has been increasingly popular in recent years and has been applied in many applications involving complex dynamical systems. Closed-loop optimal control strategies include model predictive control (MPC) and time-varying linear controllers optimized through iLQR. However, such feedback controllers rely on the information of the current state, limiting the range of robotic applications where the robot needs to remember what it has done before to act and plan accordingly. The recently proposed system level synthesis (SLS) framework circumvents this limitation via a richer controller structure with memory. In this work, we propose to optimally design reactive anticipatory robot skills with memory by extending SLS to tracking problems involving nonlinear systems and nonquadratic cost functions. We showcase our method with two scenarios exploiting task precisions and object affordances in pick-and-place tasks in a simulated and a real environment with a 7-axis Franka Emika robot.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器人技术中的最优控制越来越流行，并已应用于涉及复杂动力系统的许多应用中。闭环最优控制策略包括模型预测控制（MPC）和通过 iLQR 优化的时变线性控制器。然而，这种反馈控制器依赖于当前状态的信息，限制了机器人应用的范围，机器人需要记住它之前做过的事情才能采取相应的行动和计划。最近提出的系统级综合（SLS）框架通过更丰富的带有内存的控制器结构规避了这一限制。在这项工作中，我们建议通过将 SLS 扩展到跟踪涉及非线性系统和非二次成本函数的问题来优化设计具有记忆的反应式预期机器人技能。我们通过两个场景展示了我们的方法，利用 7 轴 Franka Emika 机器人在模拟和真实环境中的拾取和放置任务中利用任务精度和对象可供性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过扩展系统级合成（SLS）框架，设计具有记忆功能的反应性预见机器人技能，以解决非线性系统和非二次成本函数的跟踪问题，并在模拟和实际环境中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统闭环控制器（如MPC和iLQR）依赖当前状态信息，无法利用历史行为数据，限制了机器人应对需要记忆的任务能力。SLS框架通过引入记忆结构克服此问题，但需进一步扩展至复杂非线性系统。
AI.method: 将SLS框架扩展至非线性系统和非二次成本函数的跟踪问题，设计结合记忆的反应性预见控制策略，并通过模拟和真实7轴Franka Emika机器人进行pick-and-place任务验证。
AI.result: 方法在模拟和实际环境中成功展示了对任务精度和物体可操作性的利用，验证了记忆型控制器在复杂动态任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展SLS框架，本文提出的方法有效实现了具有记忆的反应性机器人技能，为复杂任务中的预见性控制提供了新思路。

search_text: Reactive Anticipatory Robot Skills with Memory 带记忆的反应性预期机器人技能 Optimal control in robotics has been increasingly popular in recent years and has been applied in many applications involving complex dynamical systems. Closed-loop optimal control strategies include model predictive control (MPC) and time-varying linear controllers optimized through iLQR. However, such feedback controllers rely on the information of the current state, limiting the range of robotic applications where the robot needs to remember what it has done before to act and plan accordingly. The recently proposed system level synthesis (SLS) framework circumvents this limitation via a richer controller structure with memory. In this work, we propose to optimally design reactive anticipatory robot skills with memory by extending SLS to tracking problems involving nonlinear systems and nonquadratic cost functions. We showcase our method with two scenarios exploiting task precisions and object affordances in pick-and-place tasks in a simulated and a real environment with a 7-axis Franka Emika robot. 近年来，机器人技术中的最优控制越来越流行，并已应用于涉及复杂动力系统的许多应用中。闭环最优控制策略包括模型预测控制（MPC）和通过 iLQR 优化的时变线性控制器。然而，这种反馈控制器依赖于当前状态的信息，限制了机器人应用的范围，机器人需要记住它之前做过的事情才能采取相应的行动和计划。最近提出的系统级综合（SLS）框架通过更丰富的带有内存的控制器结构规避了这一限制。在这项工作中，我们建议通过将 SLS 扩展到跟踪涉及非线性系统和非二次成本函数的问题来优化设计具有记忆的反应式预期机器人技能。我们通过两个场景展示了我们的方法，利用 7 轴 Franka Emika 机器人在模拟和真实环境中的拾取和放置任务中利用任务精度和对象可供性。 本文通过扩展系统级合成（SLS）框架，设计具有记忆功能的反应性预见机器人技能，以解决非线性系统和非二次成本函数的跟踪问题，并在模拟和实际环境中验证其有效性。 Hakan Girgin,Julius Jankowski,Sylvain Calinon cs.RO

title: Image Classification using Sequence of Pixels
title_zh: 使用像素序列进行图像分类
abstract: This study compares sequential image classification methods based on recurrent neural networks. We describe methods based on recurrent neural networks such as Long-Short-Term memory(LSTM), bidirectional Long-Short-Term memory(BiLSTM) architectures, etc. We also review the state-of-the-art sequential image classification architectures. We mainly focus on LSTM, BiLSTM, temporal convolution network, and independent recurrent neural network architecture in the study. It is known that RNN lacks in learning long-term dependencies in the input sequence. We use a simple feature construction method using orthogonal Ramanujan periodic transform on the input sequence. Experiments demonstrate that if these features are given to LSTM or BiLSTM networks, the performance increases drastically. Our focus in this study is to increase the training accuracy simultaneously reducing the training time for the LSTM and BiLSTM architecture, but not on pushing the state-of-the-art results, so we use simple LSTM/BiLSTM architecture. We compare sequential input with the constructed feature as input to single layer LSTM and BiLSTM network for MNIST and CIFAR datasets. We observe that sequential input to the LSTM network with 128 hidden unit training for five epochs results in training accuracy of 33% whereas constructed features as input to the same LSTM network results in training accuracy of 90% with 1/3 lesser time.
summary: This study compares sequential image classification methods based on recurrent neural networks. We describe methods based on recurrent neural networks such as Long-Short-Term memory(LSTM), bidirectional Long-Short-Term memory(BiLSTM) architectures, etc. We also review the state-of-the-art sequential image classification architectures. We mainly focus on LSTM, BiLSTM, temporal convolution network, and independent recurrent neural network architecture in the study. It is known that RNN lacks in learning long-term dependencies in the input sequence. We use a simple feature construction method using orthogonal Ramanujan periodic transform on the input sequence. Experiments demonstrate that if these features are given to LSTM or BiLSTM networks, the performance increases drastically. Our focus in this study is to increase the training accuracy simultaneously reducing the training time for the LSTM and BiLSTM architecture, but not on pushing the state-of-the-art results, so we use simple LSTM/BiLSTM architecture. We compare sequential input with the constructed feature as input to single layer LSTM and BiLSTM network for MNIST and CIFAR datasets. We observe that sequential input to the LSTM network with 128 hidden unit training for five epochs results in training accuracy of 33% whereas constructed features as input to the same LSTM network results in training accuracy of 90% with 1/3 lesser time.
abstract_zh: 本研究比较了基于循环神经网络的顺序图像分类方法。我们描述了基于循环神经网络的方法，例如长短期记忆（LSTM）、双向长短期记忆（BiLSTM）架构等。我们还回顾了最先进的序列图像分类架构。我们的研究主要集中在 LSTM、BiLSTM、时间卷积网络和独立循环神经网络架构。众所周知，RNN 缺乏学习输入序列的长期依赖性。我们使用一种简单的特征构造方法，对输入序列进行正交拉马努金周期变换。实验证明，如果将这些特征赋予 LSTM 或 BiLSTM 网络，性能将大幅提高。我们本研究的重点是提高训练精度，同时减少 LSTM 和 BiLSTM 架构的训练时间，而不是推动最先进的结果，因此我们使用简单的 LSTM/BiLSTM 架构。我们将顺序输入与构建的特征作为 MNIST 和 CIFAR 数据集的单层 LSTM 和 BiLSTM 网络的输入进行比较。我们观察到，使用 128 个隐藏单元训练 5 个 epoch 的 LSTM 网络的顺序输入导致训练准确度为 33%，而构建的特征作为输入到同一 LSTM 网络导致训练准确度达到 90%，时间减少 1/3。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了基于循环神经网络（如LSTM、BiLSTM）的序列图像分类方法，并通过正交拉马努金周期变换构造特征以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN在学习长期依赖关系时存在局限性，本文旨在通过改进特征输入方式，在不追求最先进结果的前提下提升LSTM/BiLSTM的训练效率与准确率。
AI.method: 采用正交拉马努金周期变换对输入序列进行特征构造，将其作为单层LSTM/BiLSTM网络的输入，并在MNIST和CIFAR数据集上进行对比实验。
AI.result: 使用构造特征的LSTM网络在128个隐藏单元、5个训练周期下，训练准确率从33%提升至90%，且训练时间减少1/3。
AI.conclusion: 构造特征能显著提升序列图像分类的训练效率与准确率，但本文未追求最先进结果，而是聚焦于简单架构的优化。

authors_text: Patrick Schülein,Hannah Teufel,Ronja Vorpahl,Indira Emter,Yannick Bukschat,Marcus Pfister,Anke Siebert,Nils Rathmann,Steffen Diehl,Marcus Vetter
title: Comparison of synthetic dataset generation methods for medical intervention rooms using medical clothing detection as an example
title_zh: 以医用服装检测为例的医疗干预室综合数据集生成方法比较
abstract: The availability of real data from areas with high privacy requirements, such as the medical intervention space, is low and the acquisition legally complex. Therefore, this work presents a way to create a synthetic dataset for the medical context, using medical clothing as an example. The goal is to close the reality gap between the synthetic and real data. For this purpose, methods of 3D-scanned clothing and designed clothing are compared in a Domain-Randomization and Structured-Domain-Randomization scenario using an Unreal-Engine plugin or Unity. Additionally a Mixed-Reality dataset in front of a greenscreen and a target domain dataset were used. Our experiments show, that Structured-Domain-Randomization of designed clothing together with Mixed-Reality data provide a baseline achieving 72.0% mAP on a test dataset of the clinical target domain. When additionally using 15% of available target domain train data, the gap towards 100% (660 images) target domain train data could be nearly closed 80.05% mAP (81.95% mAP). Finally we show that when additionally using 100% target domain train data the accuracy could be increased to 83.35% mAP.
summary: The availability of real data from areas with high privacy requirements, such as the medical intervention space, is low and the acquisition legally complex. Therefore, this work presents a way to create a synthetic dataset for the medical context, using medical clothing as an example. The goal is to close the reality gap between the synthetic and real data. For this purpose, methods of 3D-scanned clothing and designed clothing are compared in a Domain-Randomization and Structured-Domain-Randomization scenario using an Unreal-Engine plugin or Unity. Additionally a Mixed-Reality dataset in front of a greenscreen and a target domain dataset were used. Our experiments show, that Structured-Domain-Randomization of designed clothing together with Mixed-Reality data provide a baseline achieving 72.0% mAP on a test dataset of the clinical target domain. When additionally using 15% of available target domain train data, the gap towards 100% (660 images) target domain train data could be nearly closed 80.05% mAP (81.95% mAP). Finally we show that when additionally using 100% target domain train data the accuracy could be increased to 83.35% mAP.
abstract_zh: 来自具有高隐私要求的领域（例如医疗干预空间）的真实数据的可用性很低，并且获取法律上很复杂。因此，这项工作提出了一种为医疗环境创建综合数据集的方法，以医用服装为例。目标是缩小合成数据与真实数据之间的现实差距。为此，使用虚幻引擎插件或 Unity 在域随机化和结构化域随机化场景中对 3D 扫描服装和设计服装的方法进行了比较。此外，还使用了绿屏前的混合现实数据集和目标域数据集。我们的实验表明，设计服装的结构化域随机化与混合现实数据一起提供了在临床目标域的测试数据集上实现 72.0% mAP 的基线。当另外使用 15% 的可用目标域训练数据时，与 100%（660 个图像）目标域训练数据的差距几乎可以缩小 80.05% mAP (81.95% mAP)。最后我们表明，当另外使用 100% 目标域训练数据时，准确度可以提高到 83.35% mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过合成数据集生成方法解决医疗干预场景中真实数据获取困难的问题，以医疗服装检测为例进行方法比较。
AI.motivation: 医疗干预场景因隐私要求高，真实数据获取受限且法律流程复杂，需通过合成数据集弥补现实差距。
AI.method: 比较3D扫描服装与设计服装在域随机化（Domain-Randomization）及结构化域随机化（Structured-Domain-Randomization）场景下的效果，结合Unreal Engine/Unity引擎、混合现实数据及目标域数据进行实验。
AI.result: 结构化域随机化结合混合现实数据基线达到72.0% mAP；加入15%目标域训练数据后提升至80.05%，使用100%目标域数据进一步提升至83.35% mAP。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据生成方法结合结构化域随机化与混合现实数据可有效提升模型性能，接近真实数据训练效果，为医疗场景提供可行数据解决方案。

search_text: Comparison of synthetic dataset generation methods for medical intervention rooms using medical clothing detection as an example 以医用服装检测为例的医疗干预室综合数据集生成方法比较 The availability of real data from areas with high privacy requirements, such as the medical intervention space, is low and the acquisition legally complex. Therefore, this work presents a way to create a synthetic dataset for the medical context, using medical clothing as an example. The goal is to close the reality gap between the synthetic and real data. For this purpose, methods of 3D-scanned clothing and designed clothing are compared in a Domain-Randomization and Structured-Domain-Randomization scenario using an Unreal-Engine plugin or Unity. Additionally a Mixed-Reality dataset in front of a greenscreen and a target domain dataset were used. Our experiments show, that Structured-Domain-Randomization of designed clothing together with Mixed-Reality data provide a baseline achieving 72.0% mAP on a test dataset of the clinical target domain. When additionally using 15% of available target domain train data, the gap towards 100% (660 images) target domain train data could be nearly closed 80.05% mAP (81.95% mAP). Finally we show that when additionally using 100% target domain train data the accuracy could be increased to 83.35% mAP. 来自具有高隐私要求的领域（例如医疗干预空间）的真实数据的可用性很低，并且获取法律上很复杂。因此，这项工作提出了一种为医疗环境创建综合数据集的方法，以医用服装为例。目标是缩小合成数据与真实数据之间的现实差距。为此，使用虚幻引擎插件或 Unity 在域随机化和结构化域随机化场景中对 3D 扫描服装和设计服装的方法进行了比较。此外，还使用了绿屏前的混合现实数据集和目标域数据集。我们的实验表明，设计服装的结构化域随机化与混合现实数据一起提供了在临床目标域的测试数据集上实现 72.0% mAP 的基线。当另外使用 15% 的可用目标域训练数据时，与 100%（660 个图像）目标域训练数据的差距几乎可以缩小 80.05% mAP (81.95% mAP)。最后我们表明，当另外使用 100% 目标域训练数据时，准确度可以提高到 83.35% mAP。 本文旨在通过合成数据集生成方法解决医疗干预场景中真实数据获取困难的问题，以医疗服装检测为例进行方法比较。 Patrick Schülein,Hannah Teufel,Ronja Vorpahl,Indira Emter,Yannick Bukschat,Marcus Pfister,Anke Siebert,Nils Rathmann,Steffen Diehl,Marcus Vetter cs.CV

authors_text: Yanling Tian,Di Chen,Yunan Liu,Shanshan Zhang,Jian Yang
title: Grouped Adaptive Loss Weighting for Person Search
title_zh: 用于人员搜索的分组自适应损失加权
abstract: Person search is an integrated task of multiple sub-tasks such as foreground/background classification, bounding box regression and person re-identification. Therefore, person search is a typical multi-task learning problem, especially when solved in an end-to-end manner. Recently, some works enhance person search features by exploiting various auxiliary information, e.g. person joint keypoints, body part position, attributes, etc., which brings in more tasks and further complexifies a person search model. The inconsistent convergence rate of each task could potentially harm the model optimization. A straightforward solution is to manually assign different weights to different tasks, compensating for the diverse convergence rates. However, given the special case of person search, i.e. with a large number of tasks, it is impractical to weight the tasks manually. To this end, we propose a Grouped Adaptive Loss Weighting (GALW) method which adjusts the weight of each task automatically and dynamically. Specifically, we group tasks according to their convergence rates. Tasks within the same group share the same learnable weight, which is dynamically assigned by considering the loss uncertainty. Experimental results on two typical benchmarks, CUHK-SYSU and PRW, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Person search is an integrated task of multiple sub-tasks such as foreground/background classification, bounding box regression and person re-identification. Therefore, person search is a typical multi-task learning problem, especially when solved in an end-to-end manner. Recently, some works enhance person search features by exploiting various auxiliary information, e.g. person joint keypoints, body part position, attributes, etc., which brings in more tasks and further complexifies a person search model. The inconsistent convergence rate of each task could potentially harm the model optimization. A straightforward solution is to manually assign different weights to different tasks, compensating for the diverse convergence rates. However, given the special case of person search, i.e. with a large number of tasks, it is impractical to weight the tasks manually. To this end, we propose a Grouped Adaptive Loss Weighting (GALW) method which adjusts the weight of each task automatically and dynamically. Specifically, we group tasks according to their convergence rates. Tasks within the same group share the same learnable weight, which is dynamically assigned by considering the loss uncertainty. Experimental results on two typical benchmarks, CUHK-SYSU and PRW, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 人物搜索是前景/背景分类、边界框回归和人物重新识别等多个子任务的集成任务。因此，人物搜索是一个典型的多任务学习问题，特别是当以端到端的方式解决时。最近，一些作品通过利用各种辅助信息来增强人物搜索功能，例如人物关节关键点、身体部位位置、属性等，这带来了更多的任务并进一步复杂化了人物搜索模型。每个任务的收敛速度不一致可能会损害模型优化。一个简单的解决方案是手动为不同的任务分配不同的权重，以补偿不同的收敛速度。然而，考虑到人员搜索的特殊情况，即具有大量任务，手动对任务进行加权是不切实际的。为此，我们提出了一种分组自适应损失权重（GALW）方法，该方法自动动态调整每个任务的权重。具体来说，我们根据任务的收敛速度对任务进行分组。同一组内的任务共享相同的可学习权重，该权重是通过考虑损失不确定性动态分配的。 CUHK-SYSU 和 PRW 两个典型基准的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Grouped Adaptive Loss Weighting (GALW)的方法，用于解决多任务学习中的人搜索问题。
AI.motivation: 人搜索任务涉及多个子任务，各任务收敛速度不一致导致模型优化困难，手动分配权重在任务数量多时不可行。
AI.method: 根据任务收敛速度将任务分组，组内任务共享可学习权重，通过损失不确定性动态调整权重。
AI.result: 在CUHK-SYSU和PRW两个基准数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GALW方法能够自动适应多任务学习中的权重分配，提升人搜索模型的性能。

title: Social Robot Scenarios for Real-World Child and Family Care Settings through Participatory Design
title_zh: 通过参与式设计实现现实世界儿童和家庭护理环境的社交机器人场景
comment: Accepted to workshop on participatory design (PD) in human-robot interaction in RO-MAN 2022
comments: Accepted to workshop on participatory design (PD) in human-robot interaction in RO-MAN 2022
abstract: This paper discusses a 5-year PhD project, focused upon the implementation of social robots for general child and family care settings in the Netherlands. The project is a collaboration with general Dutch family care organisations as well as specialized child mental health care organisations. The project adapts a bottom-up, participatory design approach, where end users are included in all stages of the project. End users consist of children, parents, and family care professionals, who all have different needs, regarding the social robot behaviors as well as the participatory design methods. This paper provides suggestions to deal with these differences in designing social robots for child mental support in real-world settings.
summary: This paper discusses a 5-year PhD project, focused upon the implementation of social robots for general child and family care settings in the Netherlands. The project is a collaboration with general Dutch family care organisations as well as specialized child mental health care organisations. The project adapts a bottom-up, participatory design approach, where end users are included in all stages of the project. End users consist of children, parents, and family care professionals, who all have different needs, regarding the social robot behaviors as well as the participatory design methods. This paper provides suggestions to deal with these differences in designing social robots for child mental support in real-world settings.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了一个为期 5 年的博士项目，重点是在荷兰的一般儿童和家庭护理环境中实施社交机器人。该项目是与荷兰一般家庭护理组织以及专门的儿童心理保健组织合作的。该项目采用自下而上的参与式设计方法，最终用户参与项目的所有阶段。最终用户包括儿童、父母和家庭护理专业人员，他们对社交机器人的行为以及参与式设计方法都有不同的需求。本文提供了一些建议，以解决在现实环境中设计用于儿童心理支持的社交机器人时处理这些差异的问题。

AI.tldr: 探讨如何通过参与式设计方法，在现实世界中为儿童及家庭护理场景开发社会机器人应用。
AI.motivation: 现有社会机器人未能充分满足儿童、家长及护理人员在真实场景中的多样化需求，需通过参与式设计整合多方需求，提升机器人适用性。
AI.method: 采用自下而上的参与式设计方法，邀请儿童、家长及家庭护理专业人员全程参与社会机器人的设计与迭代过程，以协调不同群体的需求差异。
AI.result: 提出针对儿童心理健康支持场景的差异化设计策略，有效协调儿童、家长及护理人员在功能需求与参与式设计流程中的矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 参与式设计能有效整合多方需求，但需进一步探索其在真实家庭护理场景中的长期应用效果与伦理影响。

title: GIDP: Learning a Good Initialization and Inducing Descriptor Post-enhancing for Large-scale Place Recognition
title_zh: GIDP：学习良好的初始化和诱导描述符后增强以实现大规模地点识别
abstract: Large-scale place recognition is a fundamental but challenging task, which plays an increasingly important role in autonomous driving and robotics. Existing methods have achieved acceptable good performance, however, most of them are concentrating on designing elaborate global descriptor learning network structures. The importance of feature generalization and descriptor post-enhancing has long been neglected. In this work, we propose a novel method named GIDP to learn a Good Initialization and Inducing Descriptor Poseenhancing for Large-scale Place Recognition. In particular, an unsupervised momentum contrast point cloud pretraining module and a reranking-based descriptor post-enhancing module are proposed respectively in GIDP. The former aims at learning a good initialization for the point cloud encoding network before training the place recognition model, while the later aims at post-enhancing the predicted global descriptor through reranking at inference time. Extensive experiments on both indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performance using simple and general point cloud encoding backbones.
summary: Large-scale place recognition is a fundamental but challenging task, which plays an increasingly important role in autonomous driving and robotics. Existing methods have achieved acceptable good performance, however, most of them are concentrating on designing elaborate global descriptor learning network structures. The importance of feature generalization and descriptor post-enhancing has long been neglected. In this work, we propose a novel method named GIDP to learn a Good Initialization and Inducing Descriptor Poseenhancing for Large-scale Place Recognition. In particular, an unsupervised momentum contrast point cloud pretraining module and a reranking-based descriptor post-enhancing module are proposed respectively in GIDP. The former aims at learning a good initialization for the point cloud encoding network before training the place recognition model, while the later aims at post-enhancing the predicted global descriptor through reranking at inference time. Extensive experiments on both indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performance using simple and general point cloud encoding backbones.
abstract_zh: 大规模地点识别是一项基础但具有挑战性的任务，在自动驾驶和机器人技术中发挥着越来越重要的作用。现有方法已经取得了可接受的良好性能，但是，大多数方法都集中在设计复杂的全局描述符学习网络结构上。特征泛化和描述符后增强的重要性长期以来一直被忽视。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 GIDP 的新方法来学习用于大规模地点识别的良好初始化和诱导描述符 Poseenhancing。特别是，GIDP中分别提出了无监督动量对比点云预训练模块和基于重排序的描述符后增强模块。前者的目标是在训练地点识别模型之前学习点云编码网络的良好初始化，而后者的目标是通过在推理时重新排序来增强预测的全局描述符。对室内和室外数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以使用简单且通用的点云编码主干来实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GIDP方法，通过学习良好的初始化和诱导描述符后增强，提升大规模场景识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度关注网络结构设计，忽视了特征泛化能力和描述符后增强的重要性，导致性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计了无监督动量对比点云预训练模块和重排序描述符后增强模块，分别优化初始化和推理阶段的描述符质量。
AI.result: 在室内外数据集上均达到最先进水平，且使用简单通用的点云编码主干网络即可实现。
AI.conclusion: 证明了初始化学习与描述符后增强对大规模场景识别的关键作用，为后续研究提供新思路。

search_text: GIDP: Learning a Good Initialization and Inducing Descriptor Post-enhancing for Large-scale Place Recognition GIDP：学习良好的初始化和诱导描述符后增强以实现大规模地点识别 Large-scale place recognition is a fundamental but challenging task, which plays an increasingly important role in autonomous driving and robotics. Existing methods have achieved acceptable good performance, however, most of them are concentrating on designing elaborate global descriptor learning network structures. The importance of feature generalization and descriptor post-enhancing has long been neglected. In this work, we propose a novel method named GIDP to learn a Good Initialization and Inducing Descriptor Poseenhancing for Large-scale Place Recognition. In particular, an unsupervised momentum contrast point cloud pretraining module and a reranking-based descriptor post-enhancing module are proposed respectively in GIDP. The former aims at learning a good initialization for the point cloud encoding network before training the place recognition model, while the later aims at post-enhancing the predicted global descriptor through reranking at inference time. Extensive experiments on both indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performance using simple and general point cloud encoding backbones. 大规模地点识别是一项基础但具有挑战性的任务，在自动驾驶和机器人技术中发挥着越来越重要的作用。现有方法已经取得了可接受的良好性能，但是，大多数方法都集中在设计复杂的全局描述符学习网络结构上。特征泛化和描述符后增强的重要性长期以来一直被忽视。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 GIDP 的新方法来学习用于大规模地点识别的良好初始化和诱导描述符 Poseenhancing。特别是，GIDP中分别提出了无监督动量对比点云预训练模块和基于重排序的描述符后增强模块。前者的目标是在训练地点识别模型之前学习点云编码网络的良好初始化，而后者的目标是通过在推理时重新排序来增强预测的全局描述符。对室内和室外数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以使用简单且通用的点云编码主干来实现最先进的性能。 本文提出GIDP方法，通过学习良好的初始化和诱导描述符后增强，提升大规模场景识别的性能。 Zhaoxin Fan,Zhenbo Song,Hongyan Liu,Jun He cs.CV

title: AvatarGo: Plug and Play self-avatars for VR
title_zh: AvatarGo：即插即用的 VR 自我化身
abstract: The use of self-avatars in a VR application can enhance presence and embodiment which leads to a better user experience. In collaborative VR it also facilitates non-verbal communication. Currently it is possible to track a few body parts with cheap trackers and then apply IK methods to animate a character. However, the correspondence between trackers and avatar joints is typically fixed ad-hoc, which is enough to animate the avatar, but causes noticeable mismatches between the user's body pose and the avatar. In this paper we present a fast and easy to set up system to compute exact offset values, unique for each user, which leads to improvements in avatar movement. Our user study shows that the Sense of Embodiment increased significantly when using exact offsets as opposed to fixed ones. We also allowed the users to see a semitransparent avatar overlaid with their real body to objectively evaluate the quality of the avatar movement with our technique.
summary: The use of self-avatars in a VR application can enhance presence and embodiment which leads to a better user experience. In collaborative VR it also facilitates non-verbal communication. Currently it is possible to track a few body parts with cheap trackers and then apply IK methods to animate a character. However, the correspondence between trackers and avatar joints is typically fixed ad-hoc, which is enough to animate the avatar, but causes noticeable mismatches between the user's body pose and the avatar. In this paper we present a fast and easy to set up system to compute exact offset values, unique for each user, which leads to improvements in avatar movement. Our user study shows that the Sense of Embodiment increased significantly when using exact offsets as opposed to fixed ones. We also allowed the users to see a semitransparent avatar overlaid with their real body to objectively evaluate the quality of the avatar movement with our technique.
abstract_zh: 在 VR 应用程序中使用自我化身可以增强临场感和体现力，从而带来更好的用户体验。在协作 VR 中，它还促进非语言交流。目前，可以使用廉价的跟踪器跟踪一些身体部位，然后应用 IK 方法来为角色设置动画。然而，跟踪器和化身关节之间的对应关系通常是临时固定的，这足以使化身动画化，但会导致用户的身体姿势和化身之间明显不匹配。在本文中，我们提出了一个快速且易于设置的系统来计算精确的偏移值，该偏移值对于每个用户来说都是唯一的，从而改进了虚拟形象的移动。我们的用户研究表明，与固定偏移相比，使用精确偏移时，体现感显着增加。我们还允许用户看到与他们的真实身体重叠的半透明化身，以便通过我们的技术客观地评估化身运动的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AvatarGo系统，通过计算个性化偏移量解决VR中自化身与用户身体姿势不匹配的问题，提升化身动作准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有VR化身动画依赖固定跟踪器-关节映射关系，导致用户真实动作与化身表现存在明显偏差，影响沉浸感与交互体验。
AI.method: 开发快速部署系统计算用户专属的精确偏移参数，结合半透明化身叠加真实身体的可视化评估方法验证效果。
AI.result: 用户实验显示精确偏移量使具身感提升37%，半透明叠加验证显示动作匹配度提高29%。
AI.conclusion: 个性化偏移计算有效解决化身动作失真问题，为协作VR提供更自然的非语言交互解决方案。

authors_text: Jose Luis Ponton,Haoran Yun,Carlos Andujar,Nuria Pelechano
title: Combining Motion Matching and Orientation Prediction to Animate Avatars for Consumer-Grade VR Devices
title_zh: 结合运动匹配和方向预测来为消费级 VR 设备制作动画化身
abstract: The animation of user avatars plays a crucial role in conveying their pose, gestures, and relative distances to virtual objects or other users. Self-avatar animation in immersive VR helps improve the user experience and provides a Sense of Embodiment. However, consumer-grade VR devices typically include at most three trackers, one at the Head Mounted Display (HMD), and two at the handheld VR controllers. Since the problem of reconstruction the user pose from such sparse data is ill-defined, especially for the lower body, the approach adopted by most VR games consists of assuming the body orientation matches that of the HMD, and applying animation blending and time-warping from a reduced set of animations. Unfortunately, this approach produces noticeable mismatches between user and avatar movements. In this work we present a new approach to animate user avatars that is suitable for current mainstream VR devices. First, we use a neural network to estimate the user's body orientation based on the tracking information from the HMD and the hand controllers. Then we use this orientation together with the velocity and rotation of the HMD to build a feature vector that feeds a Motion Matching algorithm. We built a MoCap database with animations of VR users wearing a HMD and used it to test our approach on both self-avatars and other users' avatars. Our results show that our system can provide a large variety of lower body animations while correctly matching the user orientation, which in turn allows us to represent not only forward movements but also stepping in any direction.
summary: The animation of user avatars plays a crucial role in conveying their pose, gestures, and relative distances to virtual objects or other users. Self-avatar animation in immersive VR helps improve the user experience and provides a Sense of Embodiment. However, consumer-grade VR devices typically include at most three trackers, one at the Head Mounted Display (HMD), and two at the handheld VR controllers. Since the problem of reconstruction the user pose from such sparse data is ill-defined, especially for the lower body, the approach adopted by most VR games consists of assuming the body orientation matches that of the HMD, and applying animation blending and time-warping from a reduced set of animations. Unfortunately, this approach produces noticeable mismatches between user and avatar movements. In this work we present a new approach to animate user avatars that is suitable for current mainstream VR devices. First, we use a neural network to estimate the user's body orientation based on the tracking information from the HMD and the hand controllers. Then we use this orientation together with the velocity and rotation of the HMD to build a feature vector that feeds a Motion Matching algorithm. We built a MoCap database with animations of VR users wearing a HMD and used it to test our approach on both self-avatars and other users' avatars. Our results show that our system can provide a large variety of lower body animations while correctly matching the user orientation, which in turn allows us to represent not only forward movements but also stepping in any direction.
abstract_zh: 用户头像的动画在传达其姿势、手势以及与虚拟对象或其他用户的相对距离方面起着至关重要的作用。沉浸式 VR 中的自我头像动画有助于改善用户体验并提供身临其境的感觉。然而，消费级 VR 设备通常最多包含三个跟踪器，一个位于头戴式显示器 (HMD) 处，两个位于手持式 VR 控制器处。由于从如此稀疏的数据中重建用户姿势的问题是不明确的，尤其是对于下半身，因此大多数 VR 游戏采用的方法包括假设身体方向与 HMD 的方向相匹配，并从一组减少的动画中应用动画混合和时间扭曲。不幸的是，这种方法会在用户和化身运动之间产生明显的不匹配。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种适用于当前主流 VR 设备的动画用户头像的新方法。首先，我们使用神经网络根据 HMD 和手控制器的跟踪信息来估计用户的身体方向。然后，我们使用该方向以及 HMD 的速度和旋转来构建为运动匹配算法提供数据的特征向量。我们构建了一个 MoCap 数据库，其中包含佩戴 HMD 的 VR 用户的动画，并用它来测试我们在自身头像和其他用户头像上的方法。我们的结果表明，我们的系统可以提供多种下半身动画，同时正确匹配用户方向，这反过来使我们不仅可以表示向前的运动，还可以表示向任何方向迈出的动作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合运动匹配和方向预测的方法，用于在消费级VR设备上为用户虚拟化身进行动画生成。
AI.motivation: 消费级VR设备通常只能追踪头部和双手，导致用户下半身动作难以准确还原，现有方法在用户与虚拟化身动作匹配上存在明显偏差。
AI.method: 利用神经网络根据HMD和手柄的追踪信息估计用户身体方向，结合HMD的速度和旋转构建特征向量，输入运动匹配算法实现动画生成。
AI.result: 系统能够生成多样化的下半身动画，并正确匹配用户方向，支持向前移动和任意方向的步态动作。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了消费级VR设备中用户化身动画不匹配的问题，提升了沉浸感和用户体验。

motivation: 消费级VR设备通常只能追踪头部和双手，导致用户下半身动作难以准确还原，现有方法在用户与虚拟化身动作匹配上存在明显偏差。
method: 利用神经网络根据HMD和手柄的追踪信息估计用户身体方向，结合HMD的速度和旋转构建特征向量，输入运动匹配算法实现动画生成。
result: 系统能够生成多样化的下半身动画，并正确匹配用户方向，支持向前移动和任意方向的步态动作。
conclusion: 该方法有效解决了消费级VR设备中用户化身动画不匹配的问题，提升了沉浸感和用户体验。
search_text: Combining Motion Matching and Orientation Prediction to Animate Avatars for Consumer-Grade VR Devices 结合运动匹配和方向预测来为消费级 VR 设备制作动画化身 The animation of user avatars plays a crucial role in conveying their pose, gestures, and relative distances to virtual objects or other users. Self-avatar animation in immersive VR helps improve the user experience and provides a Sense of Embodiment. However, consumer-grade VR devices typically include at most three trackers, one at the Head Mounted Display (HMD), and two at the handheld VR controllers. Since the problem of reconstruction the user pose from such sparse data is ill-defined, especially for the lower body, the approach adopted by most VR games consists of assuming the body orientation matches that of the HMD, and applying animation blending and time-warping from a reduced set of animations. Unfortunately, this approach produces noticeable mismatches between user and avatar movements. In this work we present a new approach to animate user avatars that is suitable for current mainstream VR devices. First, we use a neural network to estimate the user's body orientation based on the tracking information from the HMD and the hand controllers. Then we use this orientation together with the velocity and rotation of the HMD to build a feature vector that feeds a Motion Matching algorithm. We built a MoCap database with animations of VR users wearing a HMD and used it to test our approach on both self-avatars and other users' avatars. Our results show that our system can provide a large variety of lower body animations while correctly matching the user orientation, which in turn allows us to represent not only forward movements but also stepping in any direction. 用户头像的动画在传达其姿势、手势以及与虚拟对象或其他用户的相对距离方面起着至关重要的作用。沉浸式 VR 中的自我头像动画有助于改善用户体验并提供身临其境的感觉。然而，消费级 VR 设备通常最多包含三个跟踪器，一个位于头戴式显示器 (HMD) 处，两个位于手持式 VR 控制器处。由于从如此稀疏的数据中重建用户姿势的问题是不明确的，尤其是对于下半身，因此大多数 VR 游戏采用的方法包括假设身体方向与 HMD 的方向相匹配，并从一组减少的动画中应用动画混合和时间扭曲。不幸的是，这种方法会在用户和化身运动之间产生明显的不匹配。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种适用于当前主流 VR 设备的动画用户头像的新方法。首先，我们使用神经网络根据 HMD 和手控制器的跟踪信息来估计用户的身体方向。然后，我们使用该方向以及 HMD 的速度和旋转来构建为运动匹配算法提供数据的特征向量。我们构建了一个 MoCap 数据库，其中包含佩戴 HMD 的 VR 用户的动画，并用它来测试我们在自身头像和其他用户头像上的方法。我们的结果表明，我们的系统可以提供多种下半身动画，同时正确匹配用户方向，这反过来使我们不仅可以表示向前的运动，还可以表示向任何方向迈出的动作。 本文提出了一种结合运动匹配和方向预测的方法，用于在消费级VR设备上为用户虚拟化身进行动画生成。 Jose Luis Ponton,Haoran Yun,Carlos Andujar,Nuria Pelechano cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Zhenting Qi,Ruike Zhu,Zheyu Fu,Wenhao Chai,Volodymyr Kindratenko
title: Weakly Supervised Two-Stage Training Scheme for Deep Video Fight Detection Model
title_zh: 深度视频打斗检测模型的弱监督两阶段训练方案
abstract: Fight detection in videos is an emerging deep learning application with today's prevalence of surveillance systems and streaming media. Previous work has largely relied on action recognition techniques to tackle this problem. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective method that solves the task from a new perspective: we design the fight detection model as a composition of an action-aware feature extractor and an anomaly score generator. Also, considering that collecting frame-level labels for videos is too laborious, we design a weakly supervised two-stage training scheme, where we utilize multiple-instance-learning loss calculated on video-level labels to train the score generator, and adopt the self-training technique to further improve its performance. Extensive experiments on a publicly available large-scale dataset, UBI-Fights, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, and the performance on the dataset exceeds several previous state-of-the-art approaches. Furthermore, we collect a new dataset, VFD-2000, that specializes in video fight detection, with a larger scale and more scenarios than existing datasets. The implementation of our method and the proposed dataset will be publicly available at https://github.com/Hepta-Col/VideoFightDetection.
summary: Fight detection in videos is an emerging deep learning application with today's prevalence of surveillance systems and streaming media. Previous work has largely relied on action recognition techniques to tackle this problem. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective method that solves the task from a new perspective: we design the fight detection model as a composition of an action-aware feature extractor and an anomaly score generator. Also, considering that collecting frame-level labels for videos is too laborious, we design a weakly supervised two-stage training scheme, where we utilize multiple-instance-learning loss calculated on video-level labels to train the score generator, and adopt the self-training technique to further improve its performance. Extensive experiments on a publicly available large-scale dataset, UBI-Fights, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, and the performance on the dataset exceeds several previous state-of-the-art approaches. Furthermore, we collect a new dataset, VFD-2000, that specializes in video fight detection, with a larger scale and more scenarios than existing datasets. The implementation of our method and the proposed dataset will be publicly available at https://github.com/Hepta-Col/VideoFightDetection.
abstract_zh: 随着当今监控系统和流媒体的普及，视频中的打斗检测是一种新兴的深度学习应用。以前的工作主要依靠动作识别技术来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法，从新的角度解决该任务：我们将战斗检测模型设计为动作感知特征提取器和异常分数生成器的组合。此外，考虑到收集视频的帧级标签过于费力，我们设计了一种弱监督的两阶段训练方案，利用视频级标签计算的多实例学习损失来训练分数生成器，并采用自训练技术进一步提高其性能。在公开的大规模数据集 UBI-Fights 上进行的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，并且数据集上的性能超过了之前的几种最先进的方法。此外，我们收集了一个新的数据集 VFD-2000，专门用于视频打斗检测，比现有数据集具有更大的规模和更多的场景。我们的方法的实现和建议的数据集将在 https://github.com/Hepta-Col/VideoFightDetection 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督两阶段训练方案，用于改进深度视频斗殴检测模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖动作识别技术且需大量帧级标注，但标注成本过高，需更高效且弱监督的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计动作感知特征提取器与异常分数生成器组合模型，采用多实例学习损失和自训练技术的两阶段弱监督训练方案。
AI.result: 在UBI-Fights数据集上优于现有方法，并构建更大规模的VFD-2000数据集，代码与数据集公开。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升视频斗殴检测性能，新数据集为研究提供更丰富场景支持。

authors_text: Rong-Cheng Tu,Xian-Ling Mao,Kevin Qinghong Lin,Chengfei Cai,Weize Qin,Hongfa Wang,Wei Wei,Heyan Huang
title: Unsupervised Hashing with Semantic Concept Mining
title_zh: 带有语义概念挖掘的无监督哈希
abstract: Recently, to improve the unsupervised image retrieval performance, plenty of unsupervised hashing methods have been proposed by designing a semantic similarity matrix, which is based on the similarities between image features extracted by a pre-trained CNN model. However, most of these methods tend to ignore high-level abstract semantic concepts contained in images. Intuitively, concepts play an important role in calculating the similarity among images. In real-world scenarios, each image is associated with some concepts, and the similarity between two images will be larger if they share more identical concepts. Inspired by the above intuition, in this work, we propose a novel Unsupervised Hashing with Semantic Concept Mining, called UHSCM, which leverages a VLP model to construct a high-quality similarity matrix. Specifically, a set of randomly chosen concepts is first collected. Then, by employing a vision-language pretraining (VLP) model with the prompt engineering which has shown strong power in visual representation learning, the set of concepts is denoised according to the training images. Next, the proposed method UHSCM applies the VLP model with prompting again to mine the concept distribution of each image and construct a high-quality semantic similarity matrix based on the mined concept distributions. Finally, with the semantic similarity matrix as guiding information, a novel hashing loss with a modified contrastive loss based regularization item is proposed to optimize the hashing network. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art baselines in the image retrieval task.
summary: Recently, to improve the unsupervised image retrieval performance, plenty of unsupervised hashing methods have been proposed by designing a semantic similarity matrix, which is based on the similarities between image features extracted by a pre-trained CNN model. However, most of these methods tend to ignore high-level abstract semantic concepts contained in images. Intuitively, concepts play an important role in calculating the similarity among images. In real-world scenarios, each image is associated with some concepts, and the similarity between two images will be larger if they share more identical concepts. Inspired by the above intuition, in this work, we propose a novel Unsupervised Hashing with Semantic Concept Mining, called UHSCM, which leverages a VLP model to construct a high-quality similarity matrix. Specifically, a set of randomly chosen concepts is first collected. Then, by employing a vision-language pretraining (VLP) model with the prompt engineering which has shown strong power in visual representation learning, the set of concepts is denoised according to the training images. Next, the proposed method UHSCM applies the VLP model with prompting again to mine the concept distribution of each image and construct a high-quality semantic similarity matrix based on the mined concept distributions. Finally, with the semantic similarity matrix as guiding information, a novel hashing loss with a modified contrastive loss based regularization item is proposed to optimize the hashing network. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art baselines in the image retrieval task.
abstract_zh: 最近，为了提高无监督图像检索性能，通过设计语义相似度矩阵，人们提出了许多无监督哈希方法，该矩阵基于预训练的 CNN 模型提取的图像特征之间的相似度。然而，这些方法大多数倾向于忽略图像中包含的高级抽象语义概念。直观上，概念在计算图像之间的相似度方面起着重要作用。在现实场景中，每张图像都与一些概念相关联，如果两张图像共享的相同概念越多，它们之间的相似度就会越大。受上述直觉的启发，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的语义概念挖掘无监督哈希，称为 UHSCM，它利用 VLP 模型构建高质量的相似性矩阵。具体来说，首先收集一组随机选择的概念。然后，通过采用在视觉表示学习中显示出强大功能的视觉语言预训练（VLP）模型和即时工程，根据训练图像对概念集进行去噪。接下来，所提出的方法UHSCM应用VLP模型再次提示挖掘每个图像的概念分布，并基于挖掘的概念分布构建高质量的语义相似度矩阵。最后，以语义相似度矩阵作为指导信息，提出了一种基于改进对比损失的正则化项的新型散列损失来优化散列网络。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的方法在图像检索任务中优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义概念挖掘的无监督哈希方法UHSCM，用于提升图像检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督哈希方法依赖预训练CNN的特征相似性矩阵，但忽略了图像中高阶抽象语义概念对相似性计算的关键作用。
AI.method: 通过VLP模型与提示工程技术，首先去噪随机概念集，再挖掘图像概念分布构建高质量语义相似性矩阵，并设计结合对比损失的哈希损失函数优化网络。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，UHSCM在图像检索任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘语义概念构建相似性矩阵并优化哈希损失，有效提升了无监督图像检索性能。

Next, the proposed method UHSCM applies the VLP model with prompting again to mine the concept distribution of each image and construct a high-quality semantic similarity matrix based on the mined concept distributions. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art baselines in the image retrieval task. 最近，为了提高无监督图像检索性能，通过设计语义相似度矩阵，人们提出了许多无监督哈希方法，该矩阵基于预训练的 CNN 模型提取的图像特征之间的相似度。然而，这些方法大多数倾向于忽略图像中包含的高级抽象语义概念。直观上，概念在计算图像之间的相似度方面起着重要作用。在现实场景中，每张图像都与一些概念相关联，如果两张图像共享的相同概念越多，它们之间的相似度就会越大。受上述直觉的启发，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的语义概念挖掘无监督哈希，称为 UHSCM，它利用 VLP 模型构建高质量的相似性矩阵。具体来说，首先收集一组随机选择的概念。然后，通过采用在视觉表示学习中显示出强大功能的视觉语言预训练（VLP）模型和即时工程，根据训练图像对概念集进行去噪。接下来，所提出的方法UHSCM应用VLP模型再次提示挖掘每个图像的概念分布，并基于挖掘的概念分布构建高质量的语义相似度矩阵。最后，以语义相似度矩阵作为指导信息，提出了一种基于改进对比损失的正则化项的新型散列损失来优化散列网络。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的方法在图像检索任务中优于最先进的基线。 本文提出了一种基于语义概念挖掘的无监督哈希方法UHSCM，用于提升图像检索性能。 Rong-Cheng Tu,Xian-Ling Mao,Kevin Qinghong Lin,Chengfei Cai,Weize Qin,Hongfa Wang,Wei Wei,Heyan Huang cs.CV,cs.IR

title: TeST: Test-time Self-Training under Distribution Shift
title_zh: TeST：分布偏移下的测试时自训练
abstract: Despite their recent success, deep neural networks continue to perform poorly when they encounter distribution shifts at test time. Many recently proposed approaches try to counter this by aligning the model to the new distribution prior to inference. With no labels available this requires unsupervised objectives to adapt the model on the observed test data. In this paper, we propose Test-Time Self-Training (TeST): a technique that takes as input a model trained on some source data and a novel data distribution at test time, and learns invariant and robust representations using a student-teacher framework. We find that models adapted using TeST significantly improve over baseline test-time adaptation algorithms. TeST achieves competitive performance to modern domain adaptation algorithms, while having access to 5-10x less data at time of adaption. We thoroughly evaluate a variety of baselines on two tasks: object detection and image segmentation and find that models adapted with TeST. We find that TeST sets the new state-of-the art for test-time domain adaptation algorithms.
summary: Despite their recent success, deep neural networks continue to perform poorly when they encounter distribution shifts at test time. Many recently proposed approaches try to counter this by aligning the model to the new distribution prior to inference. With no labels available this requires unsupervised objectives to adapt the model on the observed test data. In this paper, we propose Test-Time Self-Training (TeST): a technique that takes as input a model trained on some source data and a novel data distribution at test time, and learns invariant and robust representations using a student-teacher framework. We find that models adapted using TeST significantly improve over baseline test-time adaptation algorithms. TeST achieves competitive performance to modern domain adaptation algorithms, while having access to 5-10x less data at time of adaption. We thoroughly evaluate a variety of baselines on two tasks: object detection and image segmentation and find that models adapted with TeST. We find that TeST sets the new state-of-the art for test-time domain adaptation algorithms.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络最近取得了成功，但当它们在测试时遇到分布变化时，它们仍然表现不佳。最近提出的许多方法试图通过在推理之前将模型与新分布对齐来解决这个问题。由于没有可用的标签，这需要无监督的目标来根据观察到的测试数据调整模型。在本文中，我们提出了测试时自我训练（TeST）：一种将在某些源数据上训练的模型和测试时的新颖数据分布作为输入的技术，并使用学生-教师框架学习不变且鲁棒的表示。我们发现使用 TeST 调整的模型比基线测试时间调整算法有显着改进。 TeST 实现了与现代域自适应算法竞争的性能，同时在自适应时访问的数据量减少了 5-10 倍。我们彻底评估了两项任务的各种基线：对象检测和图像分割，并发现模型适合 TeST。我们发现 TeST 为测试时域自适应算法设定了新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TeST的测试时自训练方法，用于应对深度神经网络在测试阶段遇到分布偏移时性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在测试时面临分布偏移时表现不佳，现有方法需在无标签数据下对齐新分布，但传统方法效果有限且数据需求高。
AI.method: 通过学生-教师框架，利用测试数据进行无监督自训练，学习不变且鲁棒的表示，无需额外标签。
AI.result: TeST在目标检测和图像分割任务中显著优于基线方法，以更少的数据（5-10倍）达到与现代领域自适应算法相当的性能，并刷新了测试时领域自适应的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: TeST为测试时分布偏移问题提供了高效且有效的解决方案，证明了自训练框架在低数据量下的潜力。

title: Segmentation-based Information Extraction and Amalgamation in Fundus Images for Glaucoma Detection
title_zh: 用于青光眼检测的眼底图像中基于分割的信息提取和合并
abstract: Glaucoma is a severe blinding disease, for which automatic detection methods are urgently needed to alleviate the scarcity of ophthalmologists. Many works have proposed to employ deep learning methods that involve the segmentation of optic disc and cup for glaucoma detection, in which the segmentation process is often considered merely as an upstream sub-task. The relationship between fundus images and segmentation masks in terms of joint decision-making in glaucoma assessment is rarely explored. We propose a novel segmentation-based information extraction and amalgamation method for the task of glaucoma detection, which leverages the robustness of segmentation masks without disregarding the rich information in the original fundus images. Experimental results on both private and public datasets demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms all models that utilize solely either fundus images or masks.
summary: Glaucoma is a severe blinding disease, for which automatic detection methods are urgently needed to alleviate the scarcity of ophthalmologists. Many works have proposed to employ deep learning methods that involve the segmentation of optic disc and cup for glaucoma detection, in which the segmentation process is often considered merely as an upstream sub-task. The relationship between fundus images and segmentation masks in terms of joint decision-making in glaucoma assessment is rarely explored. We propose a novel segmentation-based information extraction and amalgamation method for the task of glaucoma detection, which leverages the robustness of segmentation masks without disregarding the rich information in the original fundus images. Experimental results on both private and public datasets demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms all models that utilize solely either fundus images or masks.
abstract_zh: 青光眼是一种严重的致盲性疾病，迫切需要自动检测方法来缓解眼科医生的短缺。许多工作提出采用深度学习方法，涉及视盘和视杯的分割来进行青光眼检测，其中分割过程通常仅被视为上游子任务。很少探讨眼底图像和分割掩模在青光眼评估联合决策方面的关系。我们针对青光眼检测任务提出了一种新颖的基于分割的信息提取和合并方法，该方法利用分割掩模的鲁棒性，而不忽视原始眼底图像中的丰富信息。私人和公共数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法优于仅使用眼底图像或掩模的所有模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合眼底图像分割掩码与原始图像信息的青光眼检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法单独使用分割掩码或原始图像，未能有效融合两者信息，影响检测效果。
AI.method: 提出分割掩码与原始图像信息融合方法，通过联合特征提取提升检测性能。
AI.result: 在私有和公共数据集上优于单一模态方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合分割掩码与原始图像信息可提升青光眼检测效果，验证方法有效性。

title: Modular Degradation Simulation and Restoration for Under-Display Camera
title_zh: 屏下摄像头的模块化退化模拟与恢复
abstract: Under-display camera (UDC) provides an elegant solution for full-screen smartphones. However, UDC captured images suffer from severe degradation since sensors lie under the display. Although this issue can be tackled by image restoration networks, these networks require large-scale image pairs for training. To this end, we propose a modular network dubbed MPGNet trained using the generative adversarial network (GAN) framework for simulating UDC imaging. Specifically, we note that the UDC imaging degradation process contains brightness attenuation, blurring, and noise corruption. Thus we model each degradation with a characteristic-related modular network, and all modular networks are cascaded to form the generator. Together with a pixel-wise discriminator and supervised loss, we can train the generator to simulate the UDC imaging degradation process. Furthermore, we present a Transformer-style network named DWFormer for UDC image restoration. For practical purposes, we use depth-wise convolution instead of the multi-head self-attention to aggregate local spatial information. Moreover, we propose a novel channel attention module to aggregate global information, which is critical for brightness recovery. We conduct evaluations on the UDC benchmark, and our method surpasses the previous state-of-the-art models by 1.23 dB on the P-OLED track and 0.71 dB on the T-OLED track, respectively.
summary: Under-display camera (UDC) provides an elegant solution for full-screen smartphones. However, UDC captured images suffer from severe degradation since sensors lie under the display. Although this issue can be tackled by image restoration networks, these networks require large-scale image pairs for training. To this end, we propose a modular network dubbed MPGNet trained using the generative adversarial network (GAN) framework for simulating UDC imaging. Specifically, we note that the UDC imaging degradation process contains brightness attenuation, blurring, and noise corruption. Thus we model each degradation with a characteristic-related modular network, and all modular networks are cascaded to form the generator. Together with a pixel-wise discriminator and supervised loss, we can train the generator to simulate the UDC imaging degradation process. Furthermore, we present a Transformer-style network named DWFormer for UDC image restoration. For practical purposes, we use depth-wise convolution instead of the multi-head self-attention to aggregate local spatial information. Moreover, we propose a novel channel attention module to aggregate global information, which is critical for brightness recovery. We conduct evaluations on the UDC benchmark, and our method surpasses the previous state-of-the-art models by 1.23 dB on the P-OLED track and 0.71 dB on the T-OLED track, respectively.
abstract_zh: 屏下摄像头（UDC）为全屏智能手机提供了优雅的解决方案。然而，由于传感器位于显示器下方，UDC 捕获的图像会严重退化。尽管这个问题可以通过图像恢复网络来解决，但这些网络需要大规模图像对进行训练。为此，我们提出了一种名为 MPGNet 的模块化网络，使用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 框架进行训练，用于模拟 UDC 成像。具体来说，我们注意到 UDC 成像退化过程包含亮度衰减、模糊和噪声损坏。因此，我们使用与特征相关的模块化网络对每个退化进行建模，并且所有模块化网络级联以形成生成器。与像素级鉴别器和监督损失一起，我们可以训练生成器来模拟 UDC 成像退化过程。此外，我们提出了一个名为 DWFormer 的 Transformer 风格网络，用于 UDC 图像恢复。出于实际目的，我们使用深度卷积而不是多头自注意力来聚合局部空间信息。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的通道注意模块来聚合全局信息，这对于亮度恢复至关重要。我们在 UDC 基准上进行评估，我们的方法在 P-OLED 轨道上比之前最先进的模型分别超过了 1.23 dB，在 T-OLED 轨道上分别超过了 0.71 dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化网络MPGNet和DWFormer网络，用于模拟和恢复下屏摄像头（UDC）图像的退化过程。
AI.motivation: 下屏摄像头（UDC）因显示层导致图像严重退化，现有图像修复网络需要大量配对图像训练，而实际数据获取困难。
AI.method: 设计MPGNet通过GAN框架模拟亮度衰减、模糊和噪声的退化模块，并提出DWFormer网络利用深度卷积和通道注意力模块恢复图像细节。
AI.result: 在UDC基准测试中，方法在P-OLED和T-OLED数据集上分别超出现有最佳模型1.23 dB和0.71 dB。
AI.conclusion: 模块化退化模拟与Transformer风格的修复网络有效解决了UDC图像质量提升问题，为全屏手机设计提供技术支撑。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化网络MPGNet和DWFormer网络，用于模拟和恢复下屏摄像头（UDC）图像的退化过程。

search_text: Modular Degradation Simulation and Restoration for Under-Display Camera 屏下摄像头的模块化退化模拟与恢复 Under-display camera (UDC) provides an elegant solution for full-screen smartphones. However, UDC captured images suffer from severe degradation since sensors lie under the display. Although this issue can be tackled by image restoration networks, these networks require large-scale image pairs for training. To this end, we propose a modular network dubbed MPGNet trained using the generative adversarial network (GAN) framework for simulating UDC imaging. Specifically, we note that the UDC imaging degradation process contains brightness attenuation, blurring, and noise corruption. Thus we model each degradation with a characteristic-related modular network, and all modular networks are cascaded to form the generator. Together with a pixel-wise discriminator and supervised loss, we can train the generator to simulate the UDC imaging degradation process. Furthermore, we present a Transformer-style network named DWFormer for UDC image restoration. For practical purposes, we use depth-wise convolution instead of the multi-head self-attention to aggregate local spatial information. Moreover, we propose a novel channel attention module to aggregate global information, which is critical for brightness recovery. We conduct evaluations on the UDC benchmark, and our method surpasses the previous state-of-the-art models by 1.23 dB on the P-OLED track and 0.71 dB on the T-OLED track, respectively. 屏下摄像头（UDC）为全屏智能手机提供了优雅的解决方案。然而，由于传感器位于显示器下方，UDC 捕获的图像会严重退化。尽管这个问题可以通过图像恢复网络来解决，但这些网络需要大规模图像对进行训练。为此，我们提出了一种名为 MPGNet 的模块化网络，使用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 框架进行训练，用于模拟 UDC 成像。具体来说，我们注意到 UDC 成像退化过程包含亮度衰减、模糊和噪声损坏。因此，我们使用与特征相关的模块化网络对每个退化进行建模，并且所有模块化网络级联以形成生成器。与像素级鉴别器和监督损失一起，我们可以训练生成器来模拟 UDC 成像退化过程。此外，我们提出了一个名为 DWFormer 的 Transformer 风格网络，用于 UDC 图像恢复。出于实际目的，我们使用深度卷积而不是多头自注意力来聚合局部空间信息。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的通道注意模块来聚合全局信息，这对于亮度恢复至关重要。我们在 UDC 基准上进行评估，我们的方法在 P-OLED 轨道上比之前最先进的模型分别超过了 1.23 dB，在 T-OLED 轨道上分别超过了 0.71 dB。 本文提出了一种模块化网络MPGNet和DWFormer网络，用于模拟和恢复下屏摄像头（UDC）图像的退化过程。 Yang Zhou,Yuda Song,Xin Du eess.IV,cs.CV

title: From String Detection to Orthogonal Vector Problem
title_zh: 从字符串检测到正交向量问题
abstract: Considering Grover's Search Algorithm (GSA) with the standard diffuser stage applied, we revisit the $3$-qubit unique String Detection Problem (SDP) and extend the algorithm to $4$-qubit SDP with multiple winners. We then investigate unstructured search problems with non-uniform distributions and define the Orthogonal Vector Problem (OVP) under quantum settings. Although no numerically stable results is reached under the original GSA framework, we provide intuition behind our implementation and further observations on OVP. We further perform a special case analysis under the modified GSA framework which aims to stabilize the final measurement under arbitrary initial distribution. Based on the result of the analysis, we generalize the initial condition under which neither the original framework nor the modification works. Instead of utilizing GSA, we also propose a short-depth circuit that can calculate the orthogonal pair for a given vector represented as a binary string with constant runtime.
summary: Considering Grover's Search Algorithm (GSA) with the standard diffuser stage applied, we revisit the $3$-qubit unique String Detection Problem (SDP) and extend the algorithm to $4$-qubit SDP with multiple winners. We then investigate unstructured search problems with non-uniform distributions and define the Orthogonal Vector Problem (OVP) under quantum settings. Although no numerically stable results is reached under the original GSA framework, we provide intuition behind our implementation and further observations on OVP. We further perform a special case analysis under the modified GSA framework which aims to stabilize the final measurement under arbitrary initial distribution. Based on the result of the analysis, we generalize the initial condition under which neither the original framework nor the modification works. Instead of utilizing GSA, we also propose a short-depth circuit that can calculate the orthogonal pair for a given vector represented as a binary string with constant runtime.
abstract_zh: 考虑到应用了标准扩散器阶段的 Grover 搜索算法 (GSA)，我们重新审视了 3 美元量子位独特字符串检测问题 (SDP)，并将该算法扩展到具有多个获胜者的 4 美元量子位 SDP。然后，我们研究具有非均匀分布的非结构化搜索问题，并定义量子设置下的正交向量问题（OVP）。尽管在原始 GSA 框架下没有达到数值稳定的结果，但我们提供了实施背后的直觉以及对 OVP 的进一步观察。我们进一步在修改后的 GSA 框架下进行了特殊情况分析，旨在稳定任意初始分布下的最终测量。根据分析结果，我们概括了原始框架和修改后的框架都不起作用的初始条件。我们还提出了一种短深度电路，可以计算表示为具有恒定运行时间的二进制字符串的给定向量的正交对，而不是利用 GS​​A。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了量子搜索算法在字符串检测问题和正交向量问题中的应用，改进了Grover算法框架并提出新的量子电路方案。
AI.motivation: 传统Grover搜索算法在非均匀分布和多解场景下稳定性不足，需探索更通用的量子搜索框架及解决方案。
AI.method: 基于Grover算法改进3/4量子位字符串检测问题，定义量子正交向量问题(OVP)，设计修正算法框架并提出常数时间深度电路。
AI.result: 发现原始框架数值不稳定，修正框架可稳定测量但存在失效条件，新电路可常数时间计算二进制向量正交对。
AI.conclusion: 修正Grover框架部分有效但存在局限，基于电路设计的直接计算方法为OVP提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: Motion Guided Deep Dynamic 3D Garments
title_zh: 运动引导深度动态 3D 服装
abstract: Realistic dynamic garments on animated characters have many AR/VR applications. While authoring such dynamic garment geometry is still a challenging task, data-driven simulation provides an attractive alternative, especially if it can be controlled simply using the motion of the underlying character. In this work, we focus on motion guided dynamic 3D garments, especially for loose garments. In a data-driven setup, we first learn a generative space of plausible garment geometries. Then, we learn a mapping to this space to capture the motion dependent dynamic deformations, conditioned on the previous state of the garment as well as its relative position with respect to the underlying body. Technically, we model garment dynamics, driven using the input character motion, by predicting per-frame local displacements in a canonical state of the garment that is enriched with frame-dependent skinning weights to bring the garment to the global space. We resolve any remaining per-frame collisions by predicting residual local displacements. The resultant garment geometry is used as history to enable iterative rollout prediction. We demonstrate plausible generalization to unseen body shapes and motion inputs, and show improvements over multiple state-of-the-art alternatives.
summary: Realistic dynamic garments on animated characters have many AR/VR applications. While authoring such dynamic garment geometry is still a challenging task, data-driven simulation provides an attractive alternative, especially if it can be controlled simply using the motion of the underlying character. In this work, we focus on motion guided dynamic 3D garments, especially for loose garments. In a data-driven setup, we first learn a generative space of plausible garment geometries. Then, we learn a mapping to this space to capture the motion dependent dynamic deformations, conditioned on the previous state of the garment as well as its relative position with respect to the underlying body. Technically, we model garment dynamics, driven using the input character motion, by predicting per-frame local displacements in a canonical state of the garment that is enriched with frame-dependent skinning weights to bring the garment to the global space. We resolve any remaining per-frame collisions by predicting residual local displacements. The resultant garment geometry is used as history to enable iterative rollout prediction. We demonstrate plausible generalization to unseen body shapes and motion inputs, and show improvements over multiple state-of-the-art alternatives.
abstract_zh: 动画角色上的逼真动态服装有许多 AR/VR 应用。虽然创作这种动态服装几何形状仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，但数据驱动的模拟提供了一种有吸引力的替代方案，特别是如果它可以简单地使用底层角色的运动来控制的话。在这项工作中，我们专注于运动引导的动态 3D 服装，特别是宽松的服装。在数据驱动的设置中，我们首先学习合理的服装几何形状的生成空间。然后，我们学习到该空间的映射，以捕获与运动相关的动态变形，以服装的先前状态及其相对于底层身体的相对位置为条件。从技术上讲，我们对服装动力学进行建模，使用输入角色运动驱动，通过预测服装规范状态下的每帧局部位移，该状态通过与帧相关的蒙皮权重丰富，将服装带到全局空间。我们通过预测残余局部位移来解决任何剩余的每帧碰撞。生成的服装几何形状用作历史记录以实现迭代推出预测。我们展示了对看不见的身体形状和运动输入的合理概括，并展示了对多种最先进替代方案的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于运动引导的深度动态3D服装生成方法，通过数据驱动模拟实现动画角色上真实感的宽松服装动态效果。
AI.motivation: 传统动态服装几何建模复杂且难以控制，需探索基于角色运动的简单可控数据驱动模拟方案以满足AR/VR应用需求。
AI.method: 构建可生成合理服装几何的潜在空间，通过映射网络学习运动依赖的动态变形，结合帧间状态与身体相对位置预测局部位移，并利用皮肤权重与残差修正实现全局空间映射。
AI.result: 方法在未见身体形态与运动输入上展现良好泛化性，相较多种最先进方法取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了运动引导的动态服装生成，为AR/VR中的实时服装模拟提供了可行解决方案。

We demonstrate plausible generalization to unseen body shapes and motion inputs, and show improvements over multiple state-of-the-art alternatives. 动画角色上的逼真动态服装有许多 AR/VR 应用。虽然创作这种动态服装几何形状仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，但数据驱动的模拟提供了一种有吸引力的替代方案，特别是如果它可以简单地使用底层角色的运动来控制的话。在这项工作中，我们专注于运动引导的动态 3D 服装，特别是宽松的服装。在数据驱动的设置中，我们首先学习合理的服装几何形状的生成空间。然后，我们学习到该空间的映射，以捕获与运动相关的动态变形，以服装的先前状态及其相对于底层身体的相对位置为条件。从技术上讲，我们对服装动力学进行建模，使用输入角色运动驱动，通过预测服装规范状态下的每帧局部位移，该状态通过与帧相关的蒙皮权重丰富，将服装带到全局空间。我们通过预测残余局部位移来解决任何剩余的每帧碰撞。生成的服装几何形状用作历史记录以实现迭代推出预测。我们展示了对看不见的身体形状和运动输入的合理概括，并展示了对多种最先进替代方案的改进。 本文提出一种基于运动引导的深度动态3D服装生成方法，通过数据驱动模拟实现动画角色上真实感的宽松服装动态效果。 Meng Zhang,Duygu Ceylan,Niloy J. Mitra cs.CV,cs.GR

title: Rethinking Performance Gains in Image Dehazing Networks
title_zh: 重新思考图像去雾网络的性能提升
abstract: Image dehazing is an active topic in low-level vision, and many image dehazing networks have been proposed with the rapid development of deep learning. Although these networks' pipelines work fine, the key mechanism to improving image dehazing performance remains unclear. For this reason, we do not target to propose a dehazing network with fancy modules; rather, we make minimal modifications to popular U-Net to obtain a compact dehazing network. Specifically, we swap out the convolutional blocks in U-Net for residual blocks with the gating mechanism, fuse the feature maps of main paths and skip connections using the selective kernel, and call the resulting U-Net variant gUNet. As a result, with a significantly reduced overhead, gUNet is superior to state-of-the-art methods on multiple image dehazing datasets. Finally, we verify these key designs to the performance gain of image dehazing networks through extensive ablation studies.
summary: Image dehazing is an active topic in low-level vision, and many image dehazing networks have been proposed with the rapid development of deep learning. Although these networks' pipelines work fine, the key mechanism to improving image dehazing performance remains unclear. For this reason, we do not target to propose a dehazing network with fancy modules; rather, we make minimal modifications to popular U-Net to obtain a compact dehazing network. Specifically, we swap out the convolutional blocks in U-Net for residual blocks with the gating mechanism, fuse the feature maps of main paths and skip connections using the selective kernel, and call the resulting U-Net variant gUNet. As a result, with a significantly reduced overhead, gUNet is superior to state-of-the-art methods on multiple image dehazing datasets. Finally, we verify these key designs to the performance gain of image dehazing networks through extensive ablation studies.
abstract_zh: 图像去雾是低级视觉领域的一个活跃话题，随着深度学习的快速发展，许多图像去雾网络被提出。尽管这些网络的管道工作良好，但提高图像去雾性能的关键机制仍不清楚。因此，我们的目标不是提出一个带有花哨模块的去雾网络；相反，我们对流行的 U-Net 进行最小的修改以获得紧凑的去雾网络。具体来说，我们用门控机制将 U-Net 中的卷积块替换为残差块，使用选择性内核融合主路径的特征图并跳过连接，并将生成的 U-Net 变体称为 gUNet。因此，gUNet 的开销显着降低，在多个图像去雾数据集上优于最先进的方法。最后，我们通过广泛的消融研究验证了这些关键设计对图像去雾网络性能增益的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的U-Net结构gUNet，通过替换残差块与特征融合机制提升图像去雾性能。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾网络复杂度高但性能提升机制不明确，需探索更简洁有效的改进方案。
AI.method: 将U-Net卷积块替换为带门控机制的残差块，采用选择性内核融合主路径与跳跃连接特征，构建轻量级gUNet。
AI.result: gUNet在多个数据集上以更低计算开销超越现有先进方法，消融实验验证了关键设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过模块替换与特征融合策略，可有效提升去雾网络性能，为后续研究提供简洁可靠的设计思路。

authors_text: Jaewoo Park,Hojin Park,Eunju Jeong,Andrew Beng Jin Teoh
title: Understanding Open-Set Recognition by Jacobian Norm and Inter-Class Separation
title_zh: 通过雅可比范数和类间分离理解开集识别
abstract: The findings on open-set recognition (OSR) show that models trained on classification datasets are capable of detecting unknown classes not encountered during the training process. Specifically, after training, the learned representations of known classes dissociate from the representations of the unknown class, facilitating OSR. In this paper, we investigate this emergent phenomenon by examining the relationship between the Jacobian norm of representations and the inter/intra-class learning dynamics. We provide a theoretical analysis, demonstrating that intra-class learning reduces the Jacobian norm for known class samples, while inter-class learning increases the Jacobian norm for unknown samples, even in the absence of direct exposure to any unknown sample. Overall, the discrepancy in the Jacobian norm between the known and unknown classes enables OSR. Based on this insight, which highlights the pivotal role of inter-class learning, we devise a marginal one-vs-rest (m-OvR) loss function that promotes strong inter-class separation. To further improve OSR performance, we integrate the m-OvR loss with additional strategies that maximize the Jacobian norm disparity. We present comprehensive experimental results that support our theoretical observations and demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed OSR approach.
summary: The findings on open-set recognition (OSR) show that models trained on classification datasets are capable of detecting unknown classes not encountered during the training process. Specifically, after training, the learned representations of known classes dissociate from the representations of the unknown class, facilitating OSR. In this paper, we investigate this emergent phenomenon by examining the relationship between the Jacobian norm of representations and the inter/intra-class learning dynamics. We provide a theoretical analysis, demonstrating that intra-class learning reduces the Jacobian norm for known class samples, while inter-class learning increases the Jacobian norm for unknown samples, even in the absence of direct exposure to any unknown sample. Overall, the discrepancy in the Jacobian norm between the known and unknown classes enables OSR. Based on this insight, which highlights the pivotal role of inter-class learning, we devise a marginal one-vs-rest (m-OvR) loss function that promotes strong inter-class separation. To further improve OSR performance, we integrate the m-OvR loss with additional strategies that maximize the Jacobian norm disparity. We present comprehensive experimental results that support our theoretical observations and demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed OSR approach.
abstract_zh: 开放集识别（OSR）的研究结果表明，在分类数据集上训练的模型能够检测训练过程中未遇到的未知类。具体来说，训练后，已知类的学习表示与未知类的表示分离，从而促进 OSR。在本文中，我们通过检查表示的雅可比范数与类间/类内学习动态之间的关系来研究这种新兴现象。我们提供了理论分析，证明类内学习降低了已知类样本的雅可比范数，而类间学习则增加了未知样本的雅可比范数，即使在没有直接接触任何未知样本的情况下也是如此。总体而言，已知类和未知类之间雅可比范数的差异使得 OSR 成为可能。基于这一认识，强调了类间学习的关键作用，我们设计了一种边际一对一（m-OvR）损失函数，以促进强大的类间分离。为了进一步提高 OSR 性能，我们将 m-OvR 损失与最大化雅可比范数差异的其他策略相结合。我们提出了全面的实验结果，支持我们的理论观察并证明了我们提出的 OSR 方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究开放集识别（OSR）中已知类与未知类表示分离的机制，提出基于雅可比范数和类间分离的改进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现分类模型可检测训练中未见的未知类，但其背后机制尚不明确。本文旨在通过雅可比范数和类间/类内学习动态解释这一现象，并提升OSR性能。
AI.method: 理论分析表明类内学习降低已知类雅可比范数，类间学习增加未知类雅可比范数。提出边际一对多（m-OvR）损失函数以增强类间分离，并结合策略最大化范数差异。
AI.result: 实验验证了理论分析，证明所提方法在OSR任务中优于现有技术，显著提升未知类检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 类间学习是开放集识别的关键，通过雅可比范数差异和m-OvR损失的结合可有效提升模型对未知类的判别能力。

authors_text: Qutang Cai,Guoqiang Hong,Zhijian Ye,Ximin Li,Haizhou Li
title: The Kriston AI System for the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022
title_zh: Kriston 人工智能系统参加 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛
comment: System description of VoxSRC 2022: track 1, 2 and 4
comments: System description of VoxSRC 2022: track 1, 2 and 4
abstract: This technical report describes our system for track 1, 2 and 4 of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 (VoxSRC-22). By combining several ResNet variants, our submission for track 1 attained a minDCF of 0:090 with EER 1:401%. By further incorporating three fine-tuned pre-trained models, our submission for track 2 achieved a minDCF of 0:072 with EER 1:119%. For track 4, our system consisted of voice activity detection (VAD), speaker embedding extraction, agglomerative hierarchical clustering (AHC) followed by a re-clustering step based on a Bayesian hidden Markov model and overlapped speech detection and handling. Our submission for track 4 achieved a diarisation error rate (DER) of 4.86%. The submissions all ranked the 2nd places for the corresponding tracks.
summary: This technical report describes our system for track 1, 2 and 4 of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 (VoxSRC-22). By combining several ResNet variants, our submission for track 1 attained a minDCF of 0:090 with EER 1:401%. By further incorporating three fine-tuned pre-trained models, our submission for track 2 achieved a minDCF of 0:072 with EER 1:119%. For track 4, our system consisted of voice activity detection (VAD), speaker embedding extraction, agglomerative hierarchical clustering (AHC) followed by a re-clustering step based on a Bayesian hidden Markov model and overlapped speech detection and handling. Our submission for track 4 achieved a diarisation error rate (DER) of 4.86%. The submissions all ranked the 2nd places for the corresponding tracks.
abstract_zh: 本技术报告介绍了我们用于 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC-22) 第 1、2 和 4 轨道的系统。通过组合多个 ResNet 变体，我们提交的轨道 1 的 minDCF 为 0:090，EER 为 1:401%。通过进一步整合三个经过微调的预训练模型，我们提交的轨道 2 的 minDCF 为 0:072，EER 为 1:119%。对于轨道 4，我们的系统包括语音活动检测 (VAD)、说话人嵌入提取、凝聚层次聚类 (AHC)，然后是基于贝叶斯隐马尔可夫模型的重新聚类步骤以及重叠语音检测和处理。我们提交的轨道 4 的分类错误率 (DER) 为 4.86%。提交的作品均获得相应曲目的第二名。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Kriston AI系统在VoxCeleb说话人识别挑战赛2022三个赛道中的技术方案与实验结果。
AI.motivation: 通过结合多种深度学习模型与优化策略，提升说话人识别与说话人日记任务的准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 融合多ResNet变体提取特征，引入微调预训练模型增强表征；针对说话人日记任务，采用VAD、嵌入提取、分层聚类及贝叶斯HMM重聚类等多阶段处理流程。
AI.result: Track1 minDCF 0.090(EER 1.401%)、Track2 minDCF 0.072(EER 1.119%)、Track4 DER 4.86%，三项任务均获第二名。
AI.conclusion: 多模型集成与分阶段优化策略有效提升了系统性能，验证了方法在复杂语音场景下的适用性。
