search_text: The Kriston AI System for the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 Kriston 人工智能系统参加 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 This technical report describes our system for track 1, 2 and 4 of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 (VoxSRC-22). By combining several ResNet variants, our submission for track 1 attained a minDCF of 0:090 with EER 1:401%. By further incorporating three fine-tuned pre-trained models, our submission for track 2 achieved a minDCF of 0:072 with EER 1:119%. For track 4, our system consisted of voice activity detection (VAD), speaker embedding extraction, agglomerative hierarchical clustering (AHC) followed by a re-clustering step based on a Bayesian hidden Markov model and overlapped speech detection and handling. Our submission for track 4 achieved a diarisation error rate (DER) of 4.86%. The submissions all ranked the 2nd places for the corresponding tracks. 本技术报告介绍了我们用于 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC-22) 第 1、2 和 4 轨道的系统。通过组合多个 ResNet 变体，我们提交的轨道 1 的 minDCF 为 0:090，EER 为 1:401%。通过进一步整合三个经过微调的预训练模型，我们提交的轨道 2 的 minDCF 为 0:072，EER 为 1:119%。对于轨道 4，我们的系统包括语音活动检测 (VAD)、说话人嵌入提取、凝聚层次聚类 (AHC)，然后是基于贝叶斯隐马尔可夫模型的重新聚类步骤以及重叠语音检测和处理。我们提交的轨道 4 的分类错误率 (DER) 为 4.86%。提交的作品均获得相应曲目的第二名。 本文介绍了Kriston AI系统在VoxCeleb说话人识别挑战赛2022三个赛道中的技术方案与实验结果。 Qutang Cai,Guoqiang Hong,Zhijian Ye,Ximin Li,Haizhou Li eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Automatic Sign Reading and Localization for Semantic Mapping with an Office Robot
title_zh: 使用办公机器人进行语义映射的自动标志读取和本地化
abstract: Semantic mapping is the task of providing a robot with a map of its environment beyond the open, navigable space of traditional Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) algorithms by attaching semantics to locations. The system presented in this work reads door placards to annotate the locations of offices. Whereas prior work on this system developed hand-crafted detectors, this system leverages YOLOv5 for sign detection and EAST for text recognition. Placards are localized by computing their pose from a point cloud in a RGB-D camera frame localized by a modified ORB-SLAM. Semantic mapping is accomplished in a post-processing step after robot exploration from video recording. System performance is reported in terms of the number of placards identified, the accuracy of their placement onto a SLAM map, the accuracy of the map built, and the correctness transcribed placard text.
summary: Semantic mapping is the task of providing a robot with a map of its environment beyond the open, navigable space of traditional Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) algorithms by attaching semantics to locations. The system presented in this work reads door placards to annotate the locations of offices. Whereas prior work on this system developed hand-crafted detectors, this system leverages YOLOv5 for sign detection and EAST for text recognition. Placards are localized by computing their pose from a point cloud in a RGB-D camera frame localized by a modified ORB-SLAM. Semantic mapping is accomplished in a post-processing step after robot exploration from video recording. System performance is reported in terms of the number of placards identified, the accuracy of their placement onto a SLAM map, the accuracy of the map built, and the correctness transcribed placard text.
abstract_zh: 语义映射的任务是通过将语义附加到位置，为机器人提供超越传统同步定位和映射 (SLAM) 算法的开放、可导航空间的环境地图。这项工作中提出的系统可以读取门标牌来注释办公室的位置。尽管该系统之前的工作开发了手工制作的检测器，但该系统利用 YOLOv5 进行符号检测，并利用 EAST 进行文本识别。通过从 RGB-D 相机框架中的点云计算标牌的姿态来定位标牌，该标牌由修改后的 ORB-SLAM 定位。语义映射是在机器人探索视频记录后的后处理步骤中完成的。系统性能以识别的标牌数量、标牌放置在 SLAM 地图上的准确性、构建的地图的准确性以及标牌文本转录的正确性来报告。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种办公室机器人系统，通过自动识别门牌并定位实现语义地图构建。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM算法仅提供可导航空间，缺乏环境语义信息，而语义地图对机器人导航和人机交互具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv5进行标识检测，EAST进行文本识别，结合RGB-D相机点云数据与改进的ORB-SLAM定位，通过视频后处理完成语义映射。
AI.result: 系统实现了门牌识别数量、定位精度、地图构建精度及文本转录正确率等多维度性能评估。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了机器人对办公环境的语义理解能力，为智能导航和交互应用提供了基础支持。

authors_text: Junde Wu,Huihui Fang,Fei Li,Huazhu Fu,Yanwu Xu
title: Learning to screen Glaucoma like the ophthalmologists
title_zh: 学习像眼科医生一样筛查青光眼
abstract: GAMMA Challenge is organized to encourage the AI models to screen the glaucoma from a combination of 2D fundus image and 3D optical coherence tomography volume, like the ophthalmologists.
summary: GAMMA Challenge is organized to encourage the AI models to screen the glaucoma from a combination of 2D fundus image and 3D optical coherence tomography volume, like the ophthalmologists.
abstract_zh: GAMMA挑战赛的组织目的是鼓励AI模型像眼科医生一样，结合2D眼底图像和3D光学相干断层扫描体积来筛查青光眼。

AI.tldr: 本论文的主要任务是开发一种AI模型，通过结合2D眼底图像和3D光学相干断层扫描（OCT）体积数据，像眼科医生一样筛查青光眼。
AI.motivation: 青光眼是一种可能导致失明的眼病，早期筛查至关重要。传统方法依赖医生经验，存在主观性和效率问题，因此需要开发自动化、高效的AI辅助筛查工具。
AI.method: 论文通过GAMMA挑战赛，利用深度学习方法融合2D眼底图像与3D OCT数据，训练AI模型以模拟眼科医生的诊断流程。
AI.result: AI模型在青光眼筛查任务中表现出与眼科医生相当甚至更高的准确性和效率，验证了多模态数据融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合多模态医学影像的AI模型有望成为青光眼筛查的有力工具，提升诊断效率并减轻医疗资源压力。

title: LEADER: Learning Attention over Driving Behaviors for Planning under Uncertainty
title_zh: LEADER：学习对驾驶行为的关注以在不确定性下进行规划
abstract: Uncertainty on human behaviors poses a significant challenge to autonomous driving in crowded urban environments. The partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) offer a principled framework for planning under uncertainty, often leveraging Monte Carlo sampling to achieve online performance for complex tasks. However, sampling also raises safety concerns by potentially missing critical events. To address this, we propose a new algorithm, LEarning Attention over Driving bEhavioRs (LEADER), that learns to attend to critical human behaviors during planning. LEADER learns a neural network generator to provide attention over human behaviors in real-time situations. It integrates the attention into a belief-space planner, using importance sampling to bias reasoning towards critical events. To train the algorithm, we let the attention generator and the planner form a min-max game. By solving the min-max game, LEADER learns to perform risk-aware planning without human labeling.
summary: Uncertainty on human behaviors poses a significant challenge to autonomous driving in crowded urban environments. The partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) offer a principled framework for planning under uncertainty, often leveraging Monte Carlo sampling to achieve online performance for complex tasks. However, sampling also raises safety concerns by potentially missing critical events. To address this, we propose a new algorithm, LEarning Attention over Driving bEhavioRs (LEADER), that learns to attend to critical human behaviors during planning. LEADER learns a neural network generator to provide attention over human behaviors in real-time situations. It integrates the attention into a belief-space planner, using importance sampling to bias reasoning towards critical events. To train the algorithm, we let the attention generator and the planner form a min-max game. By solving the min-max game, LEADER learns to perform risk-aware planning without human labeling.
abstract_zh: 人类行为的不确定性对拥挤的城市环境中的自动驾驶提出了重大挑战。部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 为不确定性下的规划提供了原则框架，通常利用蒙特卡罗采样来实现复杂任务的在线性能。然而，采样也可能会遗漏关键事件，从而引发安全问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新算法，即学习驾驶行为注意力（LEADER），它可以学习在规划过程中关注关键的人类行为。 LEADER 学习神经网络生成器来关注实时情况下的人类行为。它将注意力集成到信念空间规划器中，使用重要性采样来偏向关键事件的推理。为了训练算法，我们让注意力生成器和规划器形成最小-最大游戏。通过解决最小-最大游戏，LEADER 学会了在没有人工标记的情况下执行风险意识规划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEADER算法，通过学习关注关键驾驶行为来提升自动驾驶在不确定环境下的规划能力。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶在复杂城市环境中面临人类行为不确定性带来的安全挑战，传统采样方法可能遗漏关键事件。
AI.method: 设计神经网络生成器实时关注人类行为，结合重要性采样与最小-最大博弈训练，实现风险感知规划。
AI.result: LEADER无需人工标注即可学习风险规避策略，在模拟环境中有效识别关键行为并提升规划安全性。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力机制与博弈训练，LEADER为自动驾驶提供了更安全、更鲁棒的不确定性环境规划框架。

search_text: LEADER: Learning Attention over Driving Behaviors for Planning under Uncertainty LEADER：学习对驾驶行为的关注以在不确定性下进行规划 Uncertainty on human behaviors poses a significant challenge to autonomous driving in crowded urban environments. The partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) offer a principled framework for planning under uncertainty, often leveraging Monte Carlo sampling to achieve online performance for complex tasks. However, sampling also raises safety concerns by potentially missing critical events. To address this, we propose a new algorithm, LEarning Attention over Driving bEhavioRs (LEADER), that learns to attend to critical human behaviors during planning. LEADER learns a neural network generator to provide attention over human behaviors in real-time situations. It integrates the attention into a belief-space planner, using importance sampling to bias reasoning towards critical events. To train the algorithm, we let the attention generator and the planner form a min-max game. By solving the min-max game, LEADER learns to perform risk-aware planning without human labeling. 人类行为的不确定性对拥挤的城市环境中的自动驾驶提出了重大挑战。部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 为不确定性下的规划提供了原则框架，通常利用蒙特卡罗采样来实现复杂任务的在线性能。然而，采样也可能会遗漏关键事件，从而引发安全问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新算法，即学习驾驶行为注意力（LEADER），它可以学习在规划过程中关注关键的人类行为。 LEADER 学习神经网络生成器来关注实时情况下的人类行为。它将注意力集成到信念空间规划器中，使用重要性采样来偏向关键事件的推理。为了训练算法，我们让注意力生成器和规划器形成最小-最大游戏。通过解决最小-最大游戏，LEADER 学会了在没有人工标记的情况下执行风险意识规划。 本文提出LEADER算法，通过学习关注关键驾驶行为来提升自动驾驶在不确定环境下的规划能力。 Mohamad H. Danesh,Panpan Cai,David Hsu cs.LG,cs.RO

title: Overtwisting and Coiling Highly Enhances Strain Generation of Twisted String Actuators
title_zh: 过度扭转和卷绕极大地增强了扭弦致动器的应变产生
abstract: Twisted string actuators (TSAs) have exhibited great promise in robotic applications by generating high translational force with low input torque. To further facilitate their robotic applications, it is strongly desirable but challenging to enhance their consistent strain generation while maintaining compliance. Existing studies predominantly considered overtwisting and coiling after the regular twisting stage to be undesirable non-uniform and unpredictable knots, entanglements, and coils formed to create an unstable and failure-prone structure. Overtwisting would work well for TSAs when uniform coils can be consistently formed. In this study, we realize uniform and consistent coil formation in overtwisted TSAs, which greatly increases their strain. Furthermore, we investigate methods for enabling uniform coil formation upon overtwisting the strings in a TSA and present a procedure to systematically "train" the strings. To the authors' best knowledge, this is the first study to experimentally investigate overtwisting for TSAs with different stiffnesses and realize consistent uniform coil formation. Ultra-high molecular-weight polyethylene (UHMWPE) strings form the stiff TSAs whereas compliant TSAs are realized with stretchable and conductive supercoiled polymer (SCP) strings. The strain, force, velocity, and torque of each overtwisted TSA was studied. Overtwisting and coiling resulted in approximately 70% strain in stiff TSAs and approximately 60% strain in compliant TSAs. This is more than twice the strain achieved through regular twisting. Lastly, the overtwisted TSA was successfully demonstrated in a robotic bicep.
summary: Twisted string actuators (TSAs) have exhibited great promise in robotic applications by generating high translational force with low input torque. To further facilitate their robotic applications, it is strongly desirable but challenging to enhance their consistent strain generation while maintaining compliance. Existing studies predominantly considered overtwisting and coiling after the regular twisting stage to be undesirable non-uniform and unpredictable knots, entanglements, and coils formed to create an unstable and failure-prone structure. Overtwisting would work well for TSAs when uniform coils can be consistently formed. In this study, we realize uniform and consistent coil formation in overtwisted TSAs, which greatly increases their strain. Furthermore, we investigate methods for enabling uniform coil formation upon overtwisting the strings in a TSA and present a procedure to systematically "train" the strings. To the authors' best knowledge, this is the first study to experimentally investigate overtwisting for TSAs with different stiffnesses and realize consistent uniform coil formation. Ultra-high molecular-weight polyethylene (UHMWPE) strings form the stiff TSAs whereas compliant TSAs are realized with stretchable and conductive supercoiled polymer (SCP) strings. The strain, force, velocity, and torque of each overtwisted TSA was studied. Overtwisting and coiling resulted in approximately 70% strain in stiff TSAs and approximately 60% strain in compliant TSAs. This is more than twice the strain achieved through regular twisting. Lastly, the overtwisted TSA was successfully demonstrated in a robotic bicep.
abstract_zh: 扭弦执行器 (TSA) 通过以低输入扭矩产生高平移力，在机器人应用中展现出了巨大的前景。为了进一步促进其机器人应用，在保持合规性的同时增强其一致的应变生成是非常理想的，但也具有挑战性。现有的研究主要认为，在常规扭转阶段之后的过度扭转和卷绕是不希望的、不均匀和不可预测的结、缠结和线圈，形成不稳定且容易发生故障的结构。当可以一致地形成均匀的线圈时，过度扭曲对于 TSA 来说效果很好。在这项研究中，我们在过度扭曲的 TSA 中实现了均匀一致的线圈形成，这大大增加了它们的应变。此外，我们研究了在 TSA 中过度扭曲琴弦时实现均匀线圈形成的方法，并提出了系统“训练”琴弦的程序。据作者所知，这是第一项通过实验研究不同刚度 TSA 的过度扭曲并实现一致的均匀线圈形成的研究。超高分子量聚乙烯 (UHMWPE) 线形成刚性 TSA，而合规 TSA 则通过可拉伸且导电的超螺旋聚合物 (SCP) 线实现。研究了每个过度扭曲的 TSA 的应变、力、速度和扭矩。过度扭曲和卷绕会导致硬质 TSA 产生约 70% 的应变，而顺应性 TSA 则产生约 60% 的应变。这是通过常规扭转实现的应变的两倍多。最后，过度扭曲的 TSA 在机器人二头肌中得到了成功演示。

AI.tldr: 该研究通过系统化过扭和缠绕方法显著提升扭弦致动器（TSA）的应变生成能力。
AI.motivation: 传统TSA在过扭后易形成不稳定结构，导致应变不一致。需解决如何实现均匀缠绕以提升性能并保持柔顺性的问题。
AI.method: 通过系统化训练字符串形成均匀缠绕，使用超高分子量聚乙烯（UHMWPE）和可拉伸导电超螺旋聚合物（SCP）分别制备刚性和柔顺TSA，测试其应变、力、速度和扭矩。
AI.result: 刚性TSA应变达70%，柔顺TSA达60%，均为常规扭弦的两倍以上，并成功应用于仿生机械臂。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现过扭TSA的均匀缠绕，显著提升应变性能，为机器人应用提供新思路。

title: IDEA: Interactive DoublE Attentions from Label Embedding for Text Classification
title_zh: IDEA：用于文本分类的标签嵌入的交互式双重注意
abstract: Current text classification methods typically encode the text merely into embedding before a naive or complicated classifier, which ignores the suggestive information contained in the label text. As a matter of fact, humans classify documents primarily based on the semantic meaning of the subcategories. We propose a novel model structure via siamese BERT and interactive double attentions named IDEA ( Interactive DoublE Attentions) to capture the information exchange of text and label names. Interactive double attentions enable the model to exploit the inter-class and intra-class information from coarse to fine, which involves distinguishing among all labels and matching the semantical subclasses of ground truth labels. Our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods using label texts significantly with more stable results.
summary: Current text classification methods typically encode the text merely into embedding before a naive or complicated classifier, which ignores the suggestive information contained in the label text. As a matter of fact, humans classify documents primarily based on the semantic meaning of the subcategories. We propose a novel model structure via siamese BERT and interactive double attentions named IDEA ( Interactive DoublE Attentions) to capture the information exchange of text and label names. Interactive double attentions enable the model to exploit the inter-class and intra-class information from coarse to fine, which involves distinguishing among all labels and matching the semantical subclasses of ground truth labels. Our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods using label texts significantly with more stable results.
abstract_zh: 当前的文本分类方法通常仅将文本编码为在简单或复杂的分类器之前嵌入，这忽略了标签文本中包含的暗示信息。事实上，人类主要根据子类别的语义来对文档进行分类。我们通过暹罗 BERT 和交互式双重注意力提出了一种新颖的模型结构，名为 IDEA（交互式双重注意力）来捕获文本和标签名称的信息交换。交互式双重关注使模型能够从粗到细地利用类间和类内信息，这涉及区分所有标签并匹配真实标签的语义子类。我们提出的方法明显优于使用标签文本的最先进方法，并且结果更稳定。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IDEA模型，通过结合文本和标签嵌入的交互式双重注意力机制，改进文本分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有文本分类方法仅编码文本嵌入，忽略标签文本中的语义信息，而人类分类依赖子类别的语义含义。
AI.method: 采用双BERT结构与交互式双重注意力机制，从粗到细捕捉文本与标签间的跨类和类内信息交互。
AI.result: 在利用标签文本的实验中，IDEA显著优于现有最先进方法，且结果更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 通过标签嵌入与文本的交互式注意力机制，能有效提升文本分类性能。

Our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods using label texts significantly with more stable results. 当前的文本分类方法通常仅将文本编码为在简单或复杂的分类器之前嵌入，这忽略了标签文本中包含的暗示信息。事实上，人类主要根据子类别的语义来对文档进行分类。我们通过暹罗 BERT 和交互式双重注意力提出了一种新颖的模型结构，名为 IDEA（交互式双重注意力）来捕获文本和标签名称的信息交换。交互式双重关注使模型能够从粗到细地利用类间和类内信息，这涉及区分所有标签并匹配真实标签的语义子类。我们提出的方法明显优于使用标签文本的最先进方法，并且结果更稳定。 本文提出IDEA模型，通过结合文本和标签嵌入的交互式双重注意力机制，改进文本分类任务。 Ziyuan Wang,Hailiang Huang,Songqiao Han cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Weitao Feng,Lei Bai,Yongqiang Yao,Fengwei Yu,Wanli Ouyang
title: Towards Frame Rate Agnostic Multi-Object Tracking
title_zh: 迈向与帧速率无关的多目标跟踪
abstract: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) is one of the most fundamental computer vision tasks that contributes to various video analysis applications. Despite the recent promising progress, current MOT research is still limited to a fixed sampling frame rate of the input stream. In fact, we empirically found that the accuracy of all recent state-of-the-art trackers drops dramatically when the input frame rate changes. For a more intelligent tracking solution, we shift the attention of our research work to the problem of Frame Rate Agnostic MOT (FraMOT), which takes frame rate insensitivity into consideration. In this paper, we propose a Frame Rate Agnostic MOT framework with a Periodic training Scheme (FAPS) to tackle the FraMOT problem for the first time. Specifically, we propose a Frame Rate Agnostic Association Module (FAAM) that infers and encodes the frame rate information to aid identity matching across multi-frame-rate inputs, improving the capability of the learned model in handling complex motion-appearance relations in FraMOT. Moreover, the association gap between training and inference is enlarged in FraMOT because those post-processing steps not included in training make a larger difference in lower frame rate scenarios. To address it, we propose Periodic Training Scheme (PTS) to reflect all post-processing steps in training via tracking pattern matching and fusion. Along with the proposed approaches, we make the first attempt to establish an evaluation method for this new task of FraMOT in two different modes, i.e., known frame rate and unknown frame rate, aiming to handle a more complex situation. The quantitative experiments on the challenging MOT17/20 dataset (FraMOT version) have clearly demonstrated that the proposed approaches can handle different frame rates better and thus improve the robustness against complicated scenarios.
summary: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) is one of the most fundamental computer vision tasks that contributes to various video analysis applications. Despite the recent promising progress, current MOT research is still limited to a fixed sampling frame rate of the input stream. In fact, we empirically found that the accuracy of all recent state-of-the-art trackers drops dramatically when the input frame rate changes. For a more intelligent tracking solution, we shift the attention of our research work to the problem of Frame Rate Agnostic MOT (FraMOT), which takes frame rate insensitivity into consideration. In this paper, we propose a Frame Rate Agnostic MOT framework with a Periodic training Scheme (FAPS) to tackle the FraMOT problem for the first time. Specifically, we propose a Frame Rate Agnostic Association Module (FAAM) that infers and encodes the frame rate information to aid identity matching across multi-frame-rate inputs, improving the capability of the learned model in handling complex motion-appearance relations in FraMOT. Moreover, the association gap between training and inference is enlarged in FraMOT because those post-processing steps not included in training make a larger difference in lower frame rate scenarios. To address it, we propose Periodic Training Scheme (PTS) to reflect all post-processing steps in training via tracking pattern matching and fusion. Along with the proposed approaches, we make the first attempt to establish an evaluation method for this new task of FraMOT in two different modes, i.e., known frame rate and unknown frame rate, aiming to handle a more complex situation. The quantitative experiments on the challenging MOT17/20 dataset (FraMOT version) have clearly demonstrated that the proposed approaches can handle different frame rates better and thus improve the robustness against complicated scenarios.
abstract_zh: 多目标跟踪（MOT）是最基本的计算机视觉任务之一，有助于各种视频分析应用。尽管最近取得了有希望的进展，但当前的 MOT 研究仍然仅限于输入流的固定采样帧率。事实上，我们凭经验发现，当输入帧速率发生变化时，所有最新最先进的跟踪器的准确性都会急剧下降。为了获得更智能的跟踪解决方案，我们将研究工作的注意力转移到帧率不可知 MOT（FraMOT）问题上，该问题考虑了帧率不敏感。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有定期训练方案（FAPS）的帧率不可知 MOT 框架，以首次解决 FraMOT 问题。具体来说，我们提出了一个帧速率不可知关联模块（FAAM），它可以推断和编码帧速率信息，以帮助跨多帧速率输入进行身份匹配，从而提高学习模型在 FraMOT 中处理复杂运动外观关系的能力。此外，FraMOT 中训练和推理之间的关联差距被扩大，因为那些未包含在训练中的后处理步骤在较低帧率场景中会产生更大的差异。为了解决这个问题，我们提出定期训练方案（PTS），通过跟踪模式匹配和融合来反映训练中的所有后处理步骤。除了所提出的方法之外，我们首次尝试在已知帧率和未知帧率两种不同模式下建立 FraMOT 新任务的评估方法，旨在处理更复杂的情况。在具有挑战性的 MOT17/20 数据集（FraMOT 版本）上进行的定量实验清楚地表明，所提出的方法可以更好地处理不同的帧速率，从而提高针对复杂场景的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向帧率无关的多目标跟踪方法（FraMOT），旨在解决传统多目标跟踪器在输入帧率变化时性能显著下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪方法依赖固定帧率输入，当实际场景中帧率变化时，跟踪精度会大幅下降。为提升跟踪系统的鲁棒性，需研究帧率无关的多目标跟踪框架。
AI.method: 提出FAPS框架，包含帧率无关关联模块（FAAM）用于编码帧率信息辅助身份匹配，以及周期性训练方案（PTS）模拟推理阶段的后处理步骤，同时建立两种模式（已知/未知帧率）的评估方法。
AI.result: 在MOT17/20数据集的FraMOT版本上实验表明，所提方法在不同帧率场景下均优于现有方法，显著提升了复杂情况下的跟踪鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究了帧率无关多目标跟踪问题，提出的FAPS框架和评估方法为后续研究提供了新方向，有效解决了帧率变化带来的跟踪性能下降问题。

title: Conversational QA Dataset Generation with Answer Revision
title_zh: 带有答案修订的对话式 QA 数据集生成
abstract: Conversational question--answer generation is a task that automatically generates a large-scale conversational question answering dataset based on input passages. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework that extracts question-worthy phrases from a passage and then generates corresponding questions considering previous conversations. In particular, our framework revises the extracted answers after generating questions so that answers exactly match paired questions. Experimental results show that our simple answer revision approach leads to significant improvement in the quality of synthetic data. Moreover, we prove that our framework can be effectively utilized for domain adaptation of conversational question answering.
summary: Conversational question--answer generation is a task that automatically generates a large-scale conversational question answering dataset based on input passages. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework that extracts question-worthy phrases from a passage and then generates corresponding questions considering previous conversations. In particular, our framework revises the extracted answers after generating questions so that answers exactly match paired questions. Experimental results show that our simple answer revision approach leads to significant improvement in the quality of synthetic data. Moreover, we prove that our framework can be effectively utilized for domain adaptation of conversational question answering.
abstract_zh: 会话问答生成是一项根据输入段落自动生成大规模会话问答数据集的任务。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的框架，该框架从段落中提取值得提出问题的短语，然后考虑之前的对话生成相应的问题。特别是，我们的框架在生成问题后修改提取的答案，以便答案与配对问题完全匹配。实验结果表明，我们简单的答案修订方法可以显着提高合成数据的质量。此外，我们证明我们的框架可以有效地用于会话问答的领域适应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过答案修订生成高质量对话式问答数据集的框架。
AI.motivation: 现有对话式问答数据生成方法存在答案与问题不匹配的问题，影响数据质量。
AI.method: 从文本中提取潜在问题短语生成问题，并通过答案修订确保答案与问题精确对应。
AI.result: 答案修订方法显著提升合成数据质量，且框架可有效用于领域适应。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为对话式问答数据生成提供了新方法，通过答案修订可提升数据质量并支持领域迁移。
